subject: We’ll get right to the point
body:
| | We’ll get right to the point, Peter: Marie is facing her next major FEC deadline on Tuesday, and we urgently need your help reaching our $50,000 goal. [Can you help with $10 right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116014010/572193422/-1068804189?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_250926_2_4&refcode2=b0b5d926-359b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGI1ZDkyNi0zNTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyeJdp7FriarmcskYTo39AVjnQzqL9QFObKrWD-zaKo=)

What we’ve seen over the past few months has made it clear that this is a crucial deadline for Marie:

**FIRST:** The NRCC named Marie as a **top target to defeat this cycle** , and a far-right Super PAC already placed a quarter-million ad buy against her.

**THEN:** A **GOP challenger** officially jumped in the race against Marie.

**NOW:** **We know the next fundraising numbers we report will be scrutinized to determine whether the grassroots team that carried Marie to victory twice is still going strong**.

[Do you still have Marie’s back? Any amount you can contribute before midnight on Tuesday will go a long way to proving Marie’s grassroots team is still standing with her:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116014012/572193430/-1068804189?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_250926_2_4&refcode2=b0b5d926-359b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGI1ZDkyNi0zNTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyeJdp7FriarmcskYTo39AVjnQzqL9QFObKrWD-zaKo=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116014014/572193432/-1068804189?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_250926_2_4&refcode2=b0b5d926-359b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGI1ZDkyNi0zNTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyeJdp7FriarmcskYTo39AVjnQzqL9QFObKrWD-zaKo=)**

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Three elections you need to know:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
This fall, Democrats are fighting on three critical fronts:
* Virginia – control of the House of Delegates and the Governor's race
* Pennsylvania – the State Supreme Court
* New Jersey – the Governor’s mansion
First and foremost, these races matter because they decide whether decent people or MAGA Republicans will hold power and shape the future of those states.
But second, if we win all three battlegrounds , it won’t just be a victory -- it will be tide-turning momentum heading into 2026. The kind of momentum that can’t be dismissed as a fluke.
And Republicans know this, Peter. They’re already pouring money into these races to stop us, because they know winning here sets the stage for taking back Congress in 2026.
GOTV PAC is all-in to support Democrats across these three battlegrounds, but we need your help to make it happen. Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today so we can win in Virginia, Pennsylvania, and New Jersey – and set the stage for 2026? Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

body:
Arizona is at a crossroads. The values that make our communities strong, our faith, freedom, and opportunity, are under attack by the radical left. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5053e837667c/im-their-worst-nightmare-13905291?e=36b5d8efc6)
---
| | [ ](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=e85a9cc488&e=36b5d8efc6)
---
| | Patriot,

Arizona is at a crossroads. The values that make our communities strong; our faith, freedom, and opportunity, are under attack by the radical left.

_With our current Congressman retiring, this seat is wide open and Democrats are looking to flip it._

That's why it's critical that we keep it in the hands of someone who can represent **YOU**.

But we’re facing a dilemma.

**Right now, we’re just days away from our first end-of-quarter deadline. **

When the clock strikes midnight, every dollar we’ve raised will be public for everyone to see, including the media and our opponents.
---
| [HELP ME MEET THIS DEADLINE!](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=e161c92d42&e=36b5d8efc6 "HELP ME MEET THIS DEADLINE!")
---
| **If we don’t meet our goal of $5,575 by the end of the month, they’ll seize the opportunity to claim our campaign isn’t strong enough to win. But it is. We ARE strong enough!**

My friend, this is our first big test, and I need you with me.

[**Can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can right now to help us close the gap and send a message that conservatives are united and ready to fight back?**](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=80da297900&e=36b5d8efc6)

---
| [**With your support, we can show the strength of this movement and set the stage for victory in 2026.**](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=5b3c32537f&e=36b5d8efc6)

Let’s finish this quarter strong. Together.

| For freedom,

Alex Stovall

name: Scott Peters
subject: The next challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:

| | Peter, this week is crunch time as we approach our next major Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline at midnight on Tuesday. I’m sure you’ve already received similar emails about this, but I wanted to take a quick moment to tell you why this fundraising deadline is so vital.

Friend,

I bet you’re being bombarded with texts and emails right now from politicians desperate for donations before September 30th.

_Want to know why?_

I’m new to this, so I didn’t completely get it myself until now. **But here’s the deal:**

First off, as you know, I’m not a politician – I’m a composer and a gaming enthusiast. _In fact, I probably dislike “politics” and “politicians” as much as you!_

**But that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress.** We need fewer politicians in Congress and more regular guys like me who can truly represent us, the people, instead of deep-pocketed special interests.

**I’m a strong conservative, a devout Christian, and I believe in the promise of America.** But as a regular guy who won’t take donations from corporate PACs, I don’t have the campaign war chest that my left-wing Democrat incumbent opponent, Susie Lee, has.

**NV-03 is one of only 13 Democrat-held Congressional Districts that voted for Pres. Trump in 2024, making it one of our top targets to flip red in 2026.**

The reason you’re getting bombarded by deadline fundraising appeals right now is that **the Federal Election Commission’s 3rd Quarter reporting deadline is on Sept. 30th.** It’s one of only a handful of times we have to show how much we’re raising for our campaigns.

It’s a chance for me and my team to show the grassroots strength of our campaign compared to my opponent's big-donor-funded campaign.

[**So, I need as many supporters to chip in, even just $7, before the deadline to help give us the strongest report possible.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=6d3070256be148b3981720959e5a87f3&_e=yZAAQHAJdGzuEMwE9Jh5qj3FrYsej6rXYF_4-5vnHmeP4naMUxOPYxxmhSgp0AkZyhMlIgRRc3kieBa_I4ZGEt_pEFYtclJQnd1vU-KA3nTVTx-0kGnzhr3a6v4VHX4Vp6IgtRCC9RjfJOOSXHLh8oL4DbYHvg6w0cBxc2TUBo2BHi9EH672VEq5aBtTLQStp2Efc7OXXDDwpRMI_9w3ms7U7i6FIT6t-I4de57U1zRITLugX7-d4kD2W48Zw3Yd3Pc8IZAcn0OjRPXJeSyOPdeoXa5wwA-x9x4LTtRMmXMfhUX0SC5-u5M63lJU2jJxRJ7n6EjM2AmeUBSPa-UEops_OumnP-eCbq8jIkqDWvlxLIuXnnaXTaWkTZdTBc8DZ8MYkfB3pfkUS4QLFvhoyccQCxDM7tMH6kv3KeJt2IT71e-TjM4C2jxtUCnA1a4NV6141ylsU1gEeUhrYTY_RbeuYY5qK7ddpDEzb7A64H9RizK7vVPu3OtV4v3bYe0MjFSOTX3X_dJtCuhDbWCKI7RMI1OQd_NP69hNQlBftZDPQXPgHbWOAqHFQ8VCU-Q-TxMd-sEpmadQTpc6xPn3bvESbFMCk-ws1S8NtPulbfhqjBPIifLge-0fEXZQzNttUw07D0eoahRwBu5-OEU0xmzIc8EC0derqsPgHCztM1rAvSjUbV35dP7sCJMQS4i7FSfXmamfMPZr5tH9qDvx88OSneBMfUPvcsCkq51yQRJIiZCJoaC9-8k0Q8lmnUInV1dzqchnYn7goOS51VSmBA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I probably dislike “politics” and “politicians” as much as you! | Friend, I bet you’re being bombarded with texts and emails right now from politicians desperate for donations before September 30th. Want to know why? I’m new to this, so I didn’t completely get it myself until now. But here’s the deal: First off, as you know, I’m not a politician – I’m a composer and a gaming enthusiast. In fact, I probably dislike “politics” and “politicians” as much as you! But that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress. We need fewer politicians in Congress and more regular guys like me who can truly represent us, the people, instead of deep-pocketed special interests. I’m a strong conservative, a devout Christian, and I believe in the promise of America. But as a regular guy who won’t take donations from corporate PACs, I don’t have the campaign war chest that my left-wing Democrat incumbent opponent, Susie Lee, has. NV-03 is one of only 13 Democrat-held Congressional Districts that voted for Pres. Trump in 2024, making it one of our top targets to flip red in 2026. The reason you’re getting bombarded by deadline fundraising appeals right now is that the Federal Election Commission’s 3rd Quarter reporting deadline is on Sept. 30th. It’s one of only a handful of times we have to show how much we’re raising for our campaigns. It’s a chance for me and my team to show the grassroots strength of our campaign compared to my opponent's big-donor-funded campaign. If you’re tired of politicians ruining our country, Thank you! Marty O’Donnell Conservative for NV-03 | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. name: John Rich
subject: J6 defendants PUNISHED for being veterans
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e621454/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvS2VSVHhqSFI0OA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsYW9CU2dqUA/qP2hpZHM9bmNyR0JDZW9kYzlSMGVscw/gaNcuFA/s4hb8977d5a)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Patriot,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate Any Amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice.

These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

_**If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will?**_

When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. _You are defending the soul of our country_.

**As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.**
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
For faith, freedom, and country,

John Rich

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e621454/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsYW9CU2dqUA/qP2hpZHM9bmNyR0JDZW9kYzlSMGVscw/gaNcuFA/sbjad257fda)

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Dems are trying to find a solution. Trump is rambling on Truth Social.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
We have only four days to prevent a government shutdown, Peter. Democrats are working hard to find a solution to keep the government open, protect our federal workers, and prevent Republican cuts from hurting even more American families. Democratic leaders in Congress requested a meeting with Donald Trump to negotiate a bipartisan funding bill. Trump even agreed to meet. Then he called it off. While Democrats have been working around the clock to keep the government open, Trump is too busy rambling on Truth Social. So let me be clear about this, Peter — **a government shutdown would 100% be Donald Trump’s fault.** **[I remain committed to finding a bipartisan solution to keep our government open, even if Trump doesn’t give a rip about negotiating. If you’re with me, please add your name to send Republicans the message that we won’t give in to Trump’s attempt to take our government hostage.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116014580/572211606/463983261?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250926_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWU4YTNjNC0zOTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2hTZowxeI-UNQi1qaI_aybgZJQG4UtcCeX3vab6g044=&emci=5413d08e-199b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c5e8a3c4-399b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23190490)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116014581/572211607/463983261?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250926_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWU4YTNjNC0zOTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2hTZowxeI-UNQi1qaI_aybgZJQG4UtcCeX3vab6g044=&emci=5413d08e-199b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c5e8a3c4-399b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23190490)

So let me be clear about this, Peter — a government shutdown would 100% be Donald Trump’s fault. | Thank you, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

clean_body: Peter, I'm not alone in believing you truly deserve this. My colleagues and I at House GOP Headquarters were all in agreement. In fact, we've made a unanimous decision. If there's anyone who has a record worthy of this, it's you. First of all, Congratulations! This is reserved only for top supporters of our movement. But I have to say, you've been so outstanding in your record of support that you've built up a profile that falls within the TOP Tier of GOP Patriots. one of House GOP's most trusted patriots, and you deserve to have the status to reflect that! And before you click, I want to let you know that we'll be leaning on you for your opinion on matters as we move forward. I'm putting this deal on the table because we can't afford to lose our most trusted allies when our majority is as thin as it is right now! You, God Bless You and God Bless America! body:
We’re in the middle of something historic, folks.

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/rqOYifkDHnt66j2wi2mU6g~~/AAUS1hA~/aGE-f35eKrgUkBY04mH80kQdgy_doynPuxaUnM9xgzlrchfbwObOoX4f06KbmDDK2_JQTayq5MgqX3n3I0p7zFD6FCKFO175LfVJPd2SEwNOqDWKY5ZfQW-oSG5m2O0ycAXJwCdGUFD_zUGY3nmb9Ta1JUJ4zTMxT_jp3OXluNQ~)
| | | | We’re in the middle of something historic, folks. After 40 years of Republican control, Tennessee’s 7th District is _**finally**_ competitive and **early voting ends in just 6 days.** **That means it’s time to mobilize, time to unite, and time to go all out in the fight for democracy.** I’ve seen firsthand how hard it is for working families to make ends meet. That’s why I’ve spent my career fighting to cut the grocery tax, expand opportunity for black students, and hold corrupt leaders accountable. **Now, it's time to take that fight to Congress.** **Here’s the truth: this race will come down to the wire.** Every dollar we raise today helps us reach more voters _**before**_ they cast their ballots. If you’ve ever wanted to flip a seat in Tennessee, this is the moment. We can’t afford to go dark. **We need to reach every voter.** **[That’s why I’m counting on you to rush in $7, $17 or even $27 now so we can flip TN-07 on October 7th.>>>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/IAjecVj8RpVzIE5HCsS_ig~~/AAUS1hA~/NUmQXS1C2S-geSiQIXORoBESArMJQEl_4PWkEZupPIknpB5J-SzOqWDtHHaap7zWwAWWn9-1K_UF5pDc1i16heTSI_3j1E7pz_28eTTsDVy6Ut8m7E0zgxw-Z6xxCy7fpl09H0tsgYOfzf-_d9G1R0arJgmmhMmmvluS6W0lfgob1bCO8YTvGcBgYDyapiTr9AvkLgf4N47lOuJx_mPYhbNZOgHI8-o8NWL3sXum-Pu3YMFgKKBfCtBeUmk2_RysPc9-_AsVlp-pvE6HrnP6IQ~~)** **[**FLIP TN-07**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/IAjecVj8RpVzIE5HCsS_ig~~/AAUS1hA~/NUmQXS1C2S-geSiQIXORoBESArMJQEl_4PWkEZupPIknpB5J-SzOqWDtHHaap7zWwAWWn9-1K_UF5pDc1i16heTSI_3j1E7pz_28eTTsDVy6Ut8m7E0zgxw-Z6xxCy7fpl09H0tsgYOfzf-_d9G1R0arJgmmhMmmvluS6W0lfgob1bCO8YTvGcBgYDyapiTr9AvkLgf4N47lOuJx_mPYhbNZOgHI8-o8NWL3sXum-Pu3YMFgKKBfCtBeUmk2_RysPc9-_AsVlp-pvE6HrnP6IQ~~)** Let’s finish strong. Vincent Dixie **[**VOLUNTEER**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/lTF95ps_ThpCbFnX5alITw~~/AAUS1hA~/r1k-ZHZAfa1HkILEGQfqoYTz9WCHwQ_6NiCTcDUSMBbx9lY9tEUnNv6Mpcyp6_GWVolzHUVWxW94egkCHD8uFN1b069h5gjY8hJ2lCxREVUoHzWUXmKdcyp-3OpXwaN2NYbsEZznkd1STCyuAO9ZsecmYatmIt6ztF4Dhg0bBTs~)** **[**EARLY VOTE LOCATIONS**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/kWJkjXa34VOvpsYFaGl6lg~~/AAUS1hA~/Md5aFY2xROqCSHmaAChxAx5qAvWnsMfGcOvWNmFZA9i7xEq2Oq838NpB_uB7BpmDIlnsP35H9kjGX4XHYTFTxMH1UkdMEzwkuIejCSdzduxwfryFw5aHTwcCUp1sdLJPYFunx60CqSyOMD_wx4cDNQ~~)**

_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. body:
In case you needed a little bit of good news tonight
#
Need a little bit of good news tonight, Peter?
This week, The Economist reported that Donald Trump’s approval rating continues to plummet among everyday Americans.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96040?refcode=em20250926-9493&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9493%2E614464%2EjZkhfl)

They have felt the cost of living get higher and higher, all while GOP politicians make life easier for the billionaires bankrolling their campaigns.
They have seen how the GOP has shamelessly stripped away fundamental rights and actively worked to rig our elections in their favor.
_And they know these attacks on everyday Americans won’t stop here._
That’s why we’ve seen Democratic candidates steadily gain momentum since the beginning of this year — in red and blue states alike! **People are more motivated than ever to take our country back from Donald Trump + the GOP.**

clean_body: In case you needed a little bit of good news tonight Need a little bit of good news tonight, Peter? This week, The Economist reported that Donald Trump’s approval rating continues to plummet among everyday Americans. Here’s what this means: The majority of Americans do not approve of Donald Trump’s agenda over the first several months of his new term. They have felt the cost of living get higher and higher, all while GOP politicians make life easier for the billionaires bankrolling their campaigns. They have seen how the GOP has shamelessly stripped away fundamental rights and actively worked to rig our elections in their favor. And they know these attacks on everyday Americans won’t stop here. That’s why we’ve seen Democratic candidates steadily gain momentum since the beginning of this year — in red and blue states alike! People are more motivated than ever to take our country back from Donald Trump + the GOP. So today, we’re asking for your help to take advantage of that energy, Peter. name: Michael Bennet
subject: the honest truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
With Trump and Republicans running Washington, my best chance to protect Coloradans' health care from their agenda is by fighting from our home state.
| | |
---
Friend,
I'm fighting tooth and nail to hash out a deal that'll keep the government open, save ACA tax credits and repeal the cruel Medicaid cuts in Trump's Big, Bad Bill – now law.

But Senate Republicans would rather let regular Americans' health premiums skyrocket than negotiate with Democrats – **and that's a major reason why I'm running to carry on the fight for Coloradans from our home state.**
So with just a few days until my biggest quarterly fundraising deadline so far in the governor's race and a $100,000 goal to hit by Sept. 30, _[is there _anything_ I can say that would convince you to chip in today to help me close the 38% gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116015075/572234414/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk932-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDJhMmQ1ZS00NjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxwgJtPbvD57d3L8CTRRwHEELf3OE7YaPC4uyqVMHUg=)_

_Because what if I told you_ that with Trump's allies in power across all three branches in Washington, D.C., the most effective resistance to his disastrous agenda will come from the states?
What if I told you that as governor, I'll fight like hell to protect Coloradans' ACA and Medicaid coverage from Trump?
_What if I told you_ that to do all of the above, I first need the resources to win this race – so reaching my $100,000 end-of-quarter goal by 11:59 p.m. this Tuesday is make-or-break?
_**And, friend, what if I told you that I don't stand a chance of closing the 38% shortfall left to my goal on time without you?**_
I only ask because it's the honest truth – **_[so if you're able, will you please rush $5, $25 or anything you can right now to help me bring home the fight](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116015077/572234416/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk932-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDJhMmQ1ZS00NjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxwgJtPbvD57d3L8CTRRwHEELf3OE7YaPC4uyqVMHUg=) _****_[as our next governor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116015078/572234417/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk932-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDJhMmQ1ZS00NjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxwgJtPbvD57d3L8CTRRwHEELf3OE7YaPC4uyqVMHUg=) _****_[and build a brighter future for every Coloradan – not just the wealthy few?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116015079/572234418/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk932-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDJhMmQ1ZS00NjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxwgJtPbvD57d3L8CTRRwHEELf3OE7YaPC4uyqVMHUg=)_**

name: Marie
subject: Let me explain
body:
| | Peter,

From putting our tax dollars to work here at home to giving small businesses a fair shake, working to lower costs and more – I’m staying true to my commitment to put working families and rural communities above partisan politics in Congress.

But with control of the House hanging in the balance and far-right extremists looking to expand their control of the basic functions of our government, I’m also the #1 target for attack ads and heavy spending from folks who want to kick me out.

[The Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline coming up on Tuesday is our chance to prove that the same grassroots support that won this district twice is fired up to win again. My team set a goal of raising another $50,000 before September ends. Washington has already pushed through a budget that slashed healthcare and gutted food programs for working families, and goes after hardworking immigrants who contribute so much to our economy. Now, the Administration is sharpening its knives for the next round of cuts.

**This isn’t fiscal discipline. It’s hurting our economy. Unless we show that communities like ours are willing to fight back, they’ll keep doubling down.**

That’s why our grassroots fundraising goal this quarter matters so much. Our team set a **_$12,000 goal_** , and we need your support to get there.

The numbers we report show whether people's power can stand up to this Administration.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfth1u1oc1lssn0s3dee98gk4ksfmg9pbrqadnl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj1c1h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8fhkivesvq80ilbq27mllovr9ch3q1v1gbu2cjo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj1c1h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zft8hiu8cqdksa3fm5vp73r4phmetqft3984r5h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj1c1h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zei4csetjik8svftf16bhfr67rp0r27g9ojir9b8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj1c1h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zogpmmdiu42foevoket4cni3oqrmvje385npd00o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj1c1h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo6s8srroet3bqnbal95k9miuu1lu99usa7fvje8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj1c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zep0f77hbnepechv36tdprcerm5ekk9o7shfit48_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj1c1h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsb7er8h4q9gojs3buemkpnmh4p5edvbfjlaqtco_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj1c1h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Jim Desmond
subject: From fixing jets to fixing a broken country
body:
They never saw me coming

Can I take you back for a second?[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z69uma11apksdv3n6bei8ntf75r7qpi298qbv9i0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)That was ME! Friend, you wouldn't have picked me out of a lineup. Not back then. Small-town kid. Average student. Figuring it out as I went.
I grew up in Woodstock, Illinois. Ten thousand people, one factory, one high school. My dad worked the die-cast line. My mom kept five of us in line at home.
We weren't poor, but we weren't far from it. We made do. Fixed what broke. I wasn't some standout student, I was just trying to figure out who I was.
College? I wasn't ready. The factory jobs were drying up, so I joined the Navy at 19. That changed everything. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ktgfvvj2u5p454uj4uvpsdsm0h86c8lio5s790_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)I became an aircraft electrician, working on fighter jets. Learned discipline, follow-through, pride in every detail. It was the first time I really believed in myself.
When I got out, I was behind. Worked as a flight instructor by day, went to college at night. At 24, I was in classrooms with 18-year-olds, trying to catch up. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhdm8ujr0mu9l4v5tmaj1v038r8k8tmjb862cbhg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)Eventually graduated from San Diego State with a degree in electrical engineering. Somewhere in the grind, school, jobs, bills, I got married. Started dreaming bigger.[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6d4ut0532lf5585ssn8qlgub3ugodc1kq3ell18_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)I flew 767s for Delta. Built a small business from scratch. Hired 35 people. Signed the front of the paycheck, not just the back. I know what that responsibility feels like. I've lived it.[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zagou6sfo22ivbl5f8vag3i1k4ka3vo66lngpf6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)But then I started seeing the cracks, crime rising, drugs flooding in, families getting punished for playing by the rules. No one in charge was willing to step up.
So I did something I never planned: I ran for mayor. Then Supervisor. Not because I had a political machine, because I couldn't just sit back and watch my community unravel.[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpcsbk9gqpne55dio7bj06eo8es51lmrt15fgrgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)Friend, and now? It's not just California. Newsom and the Democrats' chaos is being exported, and D.C. is rolling out the red carpet. Open borders. Lawless streets. Sky-high taxes. No accountability. And the Left cheers it all on.[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziqmvroik20qdgfq8m1cmagps9a36okg17gout7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)That's why I'm running for Congress. Not for a title. Not for the spotlight.
I've already lived the American Dream. I've worn the uniform. I've built a business. I've signed paychecks. I've raised a family and buried loved ones. I don't need Washington. [But I won't sit quietly while they try to dismantle the country that gave me everything.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze9962sk9mum4roqi71jhhujl64uound8neb2t0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8m64q0gu9o6r01sutbfidjbv35jbm8918n3jkjo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)I didn't plan on politics. But I'll be damned if I let my kids grow up in a country where hard work gets punished and criminals get a pass.
[And I can't fight this alone. I need a team behind me that's fed up, fired up, and ready to win. That starts with you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ng592166tn8pqcn9lb1fg7jj74ev25rengm098_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)
[Can I count on you to step up right now with $25, $50, or even $100 to help me take the fight to Washington?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1hknn7rju9110s72i70m2kgkpsg7ji2j2mc1u48_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)[STAND WITH JIM
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2nqfnq48t9r65rb01gtgm6phmgajcp21aapmkb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh001bl2nn2dq1odng1d0tsdnh1hohtc1bogpmug_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)They've got lobbyists, PACs, and Hollywood donors. We've got each other and the truth.
[I hope you will stand with me tonight, Friend.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8516l1t9o3b34im78rek10oq5022vj6t353mbtg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj4cjh2bs)
God Bless,Jim Desmond

| | Paid for Jim Desmond for Congress

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo1kvjbbdt4so9iff0shiutohdb3onfcfjtf2dug_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj2c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zshtksj3u16m6glee4g7jotthets18vc2ncejabg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj2c1h2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlst4co44ombhjk4rg6v6ei0d5jd47lob85d9h9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj2c1h2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvgn60nrgfna58883jj4b1t5nvtcrnn3ap1pvv9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj2c1h2bs)
__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbtpl8d6ln3dpibdbg5nu7c6g5gujvnrkavrlln8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhmeoj2c1h2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

subject: They want me to stop Read my response
body:
After we released our investigation of a former DOJ Investigator, Glenn Prager, clearing his conscience by revealing what he knew about the Epstein case, I expected a swift but honest response from the Department of Justice. They attacked our source’s background and integrity, which is ironic given that, for over a decade, the FBI and Department of Justice have refused to disclose any information about an investigation that has been closed for decades.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z07c4cpmvn2jc41sbuntjiv4g6mp1bl8mhu7be7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34cph2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjefropo2gld5qv29dq8uoers386kvmhhneum0o0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

After we released our investigation of a former DOJ Investigator, Glenn Prager, clearing his conscience by revealing what he knew about the Epstein case, I expected a swift but honest response from the Department of Justice.

Their response was swift, but dishonest and manipulated to discredit my team's reporting at OMG.

[**I 'm asking for your help to fight these attacks, so I can go even harder to expose the truth.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmrq1sfmhbqb10aqih27aaov1uqqln7rosnnq51g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34cph2bs)

**They attacked our source 's background and integrity**, which is ironic given that, for over a decade, the FBI and Department of Justice have refused to disclose any information about an investigation that has been closed for decades.

In the video, **Prager discussed the flight logs from Epstein 's plane to his island**. If the DOJ wanted to prove Prager to be a liar, all they have to do is release the flight logs and PROVE Bill Clinton was not on the flight with children.

Will they do that?

**Of course not.**

They aren't just protecting powerful people:

**They are protecting the darkness that slithers in the
****deepest recesses of government and the Deep State.
****THEY ARE PROTECTING THE CIA.**

And I fear that's who is going to be coming for me next. But I will not slow down. [**Help me push even harder for the truth with a donation today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm473losbsjed64ipqk7didnh4u3f7nqc9p1tgo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34cph2bs)

In our video, Prager discloses that**Epstein worked for both the CIA and Mossad.**

Think about that.

If the federal government admitted that they were part of a child trafficking ring to collect dirt on the world's most powerful . . . what would you do?

What would good Americans across the country do?

**They would demand the total end to the CIA and the entire Intelligence Community that is responsible for a string of atrocities going back decades.**

By continuing to cover this story, **I 've become the biggest threat to the CIA**.

And I'm already feeling the heat.

While I can't get into it, **my phone rang late last night with heavy pressure for me to back off**.

This is my response:
**MY PRICE IS MY LIFE**

What is yours?

If you want me to back away, please, pretend you didn't read this.

**If you stand by me and want me to keep reporting the truth** , then please, [**donate today to fund our investigations and send a clear message that you stand with the truth**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdjcllpkdo8mqd03mtnhvipplif2ndns8p2i6jg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34cph2bs).

We stand together, or I fall alone.

Thank you for all that you do.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: I was reflecting on this verse from Isaiah Can I share my thoughts with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6o6ti0lp3glgt83gt8b464n456op2lngpc4ni40_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34c5h2bs)| When the enemy shall come in like a flood, the Spirit of the LORD will lift up a standard against him.
~ Isaiah 59:19
---
Friend - I don't think I need to tell you this, but we're in a spiritual battle right now. The conscience and soul of our Commonwealth and our nation are on the line.

I was reflecting on Isaiah 59:19. It reads: When the enemy shall come in like a flood, the Spirit of the LORD will lift up a standard against him.

My team and I are fighting to defend Virginia from sick, godless ideology. If we fail in the Commonwealth, our nation could quickly fall to this insidious evil too.

Protecting our Christian way of life, our children, and our shared values is a tall order. But this passage from Isaiah reminded me that with the Lord on our side, we shall overcome all that stands against us!

I have always led with the light of Christ and will continue to when I win in November. But I can't win this race without your prayers and support.

So I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart, please keep me and my team in your daily prayers and [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm4v695pc0dg0ovbu7fuijdf13dk82seo06n4gv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34c5h2bs)[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh5cfaqssauj7j29an7i6ev7lji9ak37sirbbh00_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34c5h2bs)[donate a few dollars to help me and my team win this critical election.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1h9q33bjkotsm0k34rj2iu2lblkhcetgicvcfs8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34c5h2bs)
[DONATE A FEW DOLLARS TODAY >>
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z68bcr4a6j93gl9gu1jtgpn0hu7cqlr10hd82j9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34c5h2bs)
I can't do this without you. Your prayers and support will give me the strength and resources we need to win this race.

Thank you so much and may God bless you and your family!
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6odq9rqg7dokbthr0mfun9pcjlud7qbujvlirso_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjhm1p34c5h2bs)

name: Dinesh =?UTF-8?Q?D=E2=80=99Souza?=
subject: I need you to know something very important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh7e24038lp656alh3s2tt53t77cpe3j6fd8guko_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjm0o76chh2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg6su5t4i8p2jpbc157500cfvp1tccf5emnaroeo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjm0o76chh2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdb62lptjcb72qo62baqeaaca4r14mok9lt68qmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjm0o76chh2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgdf9q6jakgpkkb9huiusvjm111t6sofpis9oclo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjm0o76chh2bs)
---
Dinesh D’Souza

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: I was reflecting on this verse from Isaiah Can I share my thoughts with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zev5hojoef161olh3vq4s7jvchi6vfemveqaoo7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjm0o76chh2bs)| When the enemy shall come in like a flood, the Spirit of the LORD will lift up a standard against him.
~ Isaiah 59:19
---
Friend - I don't think I need to tell you this, but we're in a spiritual battle right now. The conscience and soul of our Commonwealth and our nation are on the line.

I was reflecting on Isaiah 59:19. It reads: When the enemy shall come in like a flood, the Spirit of the LORD will lift up a standard against him.

My team and I are fighting to defend Virginia from sick, godless ideology. If we fail in the Commonwealth, our nation could quickly fall to this insidious evil too.

Protecting our Christian way of life, our children, and our shared values is a tall order. But this passage from Isaiah reminded me that with the Lord on our side, we shall overcome all that stands against us!

I have always led with the light of Christ and will continue to when I win in November. But I can't win this race without your prayers and support.

So I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart, please keep me and my team in your daily prayers and [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7u36hsod72umcdfk5k8d4jik664m8v3htiuv1no_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjm0o76chh2bs)[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z88q1df7ceaaogmftmuvb3jaf09h43fqonfgplf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjm0o76chh2bs)[donate a few dollars to help me and my team win this critical election.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf5uru6uu37nspgs1e48f8qj5nlr0l2cg7hac4po_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjm0o76chh2bs)
[DONATE A FEW DOLLARS TODAY >>
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z77f33aqkjs5m6r408esi4rfngu86v9h0rvfkspg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjm0o76chh2bs)
I can't do this without you. Your prayers and support will give me the strength and resources we need to win this race.

Thank you so much and may God bless you and your family!
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmkgn7uk5d7uscgmhk9uge71lhkfuoh4agl4dnr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjm0o76chh2bs)

So I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart, please keep me and my team in your daily prayers and I can't do this without you. Your prayers and support will give me the strength and resources we need to win this race. Thank you so much and may God bless you and your family! Winsome Earle-Sears Christian Mother Marine * I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. name: Jennifer Nassour
subject: The Massachusetts Meltdown 🫠 is underway
body:
The rot goes so deep...
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4i1t9RZtV_apmVzun8ZzVBscteUKlVc4Ms16Rewazg_zWfmTAjEV_udc0SYoWvNYh6d0EBM905LBrym3ppP4EwI31Gtu2v-lW084nfq6y6od63IXJrlGQfKzun47fNaWrALHmtbJTARceSQTaqO3A==&c=LWcqpiX0nzoh5kwTIzhOKnvTLonPLMY6THR2jPM1bcS9_0LMPp_V-Q==&ch=oKPiptpRYb3smVNxoB_Ukc3OH03Pk6spQLMGCdKXJZkSV_FM4tgtyw==)
---
| Dear Peter,
The Massachusetts Meltdown is underway. Have you been paying attention?
Treasurer Deb Goldberg wasted $2 million of taxpayer funds on her lawsuit against the Cannabis Commission Chair, but the rot goes so much deeper.
We just uncovered over $20 million in wasteful spending at the Treasury and Lottery:
* $4,000+ on catering from fancy restaurants
* $50,000+ on bottled water
* $300,000 on out-of-state travel
* There's even a stipend for clothing at the Lottery!

The Massachusetts Republican Party is determined to launch a top-tier candidate for Treasurer, but we need the funds to help defeat Goldberg in 2026.
---
| | [DONATE TO THE MASSGOP](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4i1t9RZtV_apmVzun8ZzVBscteUKlVc4Ms16Rewazg_zWfmTAjEV_B2CPaBKrZoTD1Qk9MDoIni3xtUGgqDumPm5pyAosIBsiipiypGVqIf-syXbKFHi2uspsbH2s3PtjI4-9Vo8nhMWiaFHkOmE68mf080uNmLA5eXjisnTN_P9bxEg1ZfLZwdM9AAsDmsbcZlP2JBkWE=&c=LWcqpiX0nzoh5kwTIzhOKnvTLonPLMY6THR2jPM1bcS9_0LMPp_V-Q==&ch=oKPiptpRYb3smVNxoB_Ukc3OH03Pk6spQLMGCdKXJZkSV_FM4tgtyw==)
---
| Momentum is building. Every single week, more Republicans step forward ready to run in 2026 because they see what we see: the tide is turning in Massachusetts.
That's something we've seen especially in recent days, as thousands of conservatives from every corner of the state came together for vigils remembering Charlie Kirk.
Our leaders are being shot at for telling the truth, but they aren't quitting. Neither are we.
The mission for the MassGOP is clear: recruit strong Conservative candidates and equip them with the resources to take on the deep pockets of unions and far-left Democrat groups.
And here's where you come in: $100 -> puts a paid door knocker in the field for a day $250 -> funds all digital ads for a State Rep candidate for a full 7 days $500 -> covers a districtwide text blast for a State Senate candidate $1,000 -> funds four episodes of MassGOP TV, a platform for candidates to speak directly to the voters $2,500 -> covers the cost of a townwide mail piece from an RTC
---
| | [DONATE TO THE MASSGOP](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4i1t9RZtV_apmVzun8ZzVBscteUKlVc4Ms16Rewazg_zWfmTAjEV_B2CPaBKrZoTD1Qk9MDoIni3xtUGgqDumPm5pyAosIBsiipiypGVqIf-syXbKFHi2uspsbH2s3PtjI4-9Vo8nhMWiaFHkOmE68mf080uNmLA5eXjisnTN_P9bxEg1ZfLZwdM9AAsDmsFqig1a_gc-M=&c=LWcqpiX0nzoh5kwTIzhOKnvTLonPLMY6THR2jPM1bcS9_0LMPp_V-Q==&ch=oKPiptpRYb3smVNxoB_Ukc3OH03Pk6spQLMGCdKXJZkSV_FM4tgtyw==)
---
| We all know elections aren't cheap, but your support truly makes the difference between Republicans competing and Republicans winning.
You have my word. I'll do everything I can to help Republicans turn this moment of momentum into long lasting victory.
Join me. Don't let this cycle pass by and wish you had done more.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4i1t9RZtV_apmVzun8ZzVBscteUKlVc4Ms16Rewazg_zWfmTAjEV_B2CPaBKrZoTD1Qk9MDoIni3xtUGgqDumPm5pyAosIBsiipiypGVqIf-syXbKFHi2uspsbH2s3PtjI4-9Vo8nhMWiaFHkOmE68mf080uNmLA5eXjisnTN_P9bxEg1ZfLZwdM9AAsDmssXX_7tFROL4=&c=LWcqpiX0nzoh5kwTIzhOKnvTLonPLMY6THR2jPM1bcS9_0LMPp_V-Q==&ch=oKPiptpRYb3smVNxoB_Ukc3OH03Pk6spQLMGCdKXJZkSV_FM4tgtyw==)

| Best,

[Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-qdkyhly-didthutlhu-h/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qdkyhly-didthutlhu-r/) **September 26, 2025** Patriot,As we gear up for another pivotal election cycle, with so much at stake, we urgently need you to get involved. Your energy and commitment are essential to standing strong for conservative values.As we head into 2026, it's important to remember why we are in this movement. We must defeat radical progressives like Chris Taylor. Make sure to check out [christaylorforwi.com](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qdkyhly-didthutlhu-y/), which exposes her extreme policies on everything from defunding the police to open borders, arming you with the facts to fight back and win!-Team WisGOP **Upcoming Events****9/26: Eau Claire County Movie Night

10/27: Calumet County Conservative Citizens Meeting** **Juneau County**
Juneau County Republicans hosted a Pints and Politics event in Mauston! **Vilas County**
Vilas County Republicans held a vigil to honor Charlie Kirk, respecting his memory, his legacy, and Turning Point USA. Over 200 Americans turned out to honor Charlie Kirk, to celebrate all he accomplished in his life, cut way too short. **Rusk County**
Republicans in Rusk County gathered to honor the legacy of Charlie Kirk. With over 300 attendees, it is clear that his legacy will continue. ** Monroe County**
Monroe County had another busy couple of weeks that included TWO Conservative breakfasts, and marching for Freedom with Elle, their world-famous elephant, in the Cashton parade. They also prayed for Charlie and Erika Kirk and for America with the UW-La Crosse College Republicans at a Prayer Vigil. Looking forward to another busy election season in 2026! **Buffalo County**
Buffalo County hosted a county party along with Pepin County and joined Pepin County at the Laura Days parade in Pepin! **Kenosha County**
Republicans in Kenosha County hosted a vigil and prayer night in memory of Charlie Kirk and his legacy! **Milwaukee County **
Milwaukee County Republicans hosted THREE informational sessions on a variety of topics, including redistricting, WILL v. Trusts, and the WEC! **Eau Claire County**
Republicans in Eau Claire County participated in two parades, spreading our Conservative message to their communities. **Trempealeau County**
Trempealeau County had a few events the last couple of weeks, including the Blair Cheese Fest Parade, our annual Reagan Picnic, and a social media training. **St. Croix County**
Republicans in St. Croix County have been busy bees the last few weeks participating in various events, including a Meet and Greet at their office, Glenwood City Rustic Lore Days Parade, Patriot Day Flag Wave, Charlie Kirk Prayer Vigil, and Charlie Kirk Memorial Live Stream. **Green County**
The Republican Party of Green County held its September breakfast meeting honoring law enforcement and first responders. They took the time to remember and honor the legacy of Charlie Kirk and heard from guest speaker Alfonso Morales, former Milwaukee Police Chief and current Chief of Police for the City of Fitchburg. He shared thoughts on the passing of Charlie Kirk and spoke about remembering the lives lost in the attacks on September 11, 2001. **Racine County**
Racine County has had some great events! They took part in a Gun Show where they had a table at the entrance and honored Charlie Kirk with photos as we encouraged folks to Register to Vote, participated in the Party on the Pavement in Downtown Racine, and attended a Community Vigil to Honor Charlie Kirk with over 500+ community members. **Shawano County**
Shawano County participated in Bonduel Founders Day with a booth where they met voters in their community! body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhjifbm2bh4efjbr64sga01alai5kseststps4r8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjmapj2cth2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znpbdoe4e7oquunpflp0nfq8oug6gm3g0ljkd33g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjmapj2cth2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb0f8ak2684aeju662moqj2tr3uv1esu4v8jcbo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjmapj2cth2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze3rsq1ekbd6sqsllff2vf56lr54ft59u4t8k780_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sjjmapj2cth2bs)

body:
Democrats and their media allies are in meltdown mode, screaming that their precious “free speech” is being trampled — it’s nonstop hysteria.

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9aTS1NZWRpYS1TdXJ2ZXlfMjAyNTA5MjQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1aTS1NZWRpYS1TdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUifQ/vXIlRC-DhQKxWcv-XPcHkA)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Democrats and their media allies are in meltdown mode, screaming that free speech is being trampled. It's nonstop hysteria. But I have a straightforward question: where was their outrage before? Where was it when NBC dropped Megyn Kelly for daring to speak her mind? Where was it when Big Tech silenced President Trump, banning him from Twitter and censoring conservatives on Facebook throughout the pandemic? Where was it when a radical leftist tried to murder Justice Kavanaugh? The truth is simple: Democrats only care about free speech when it serves their political agenda. **_When it 's conservatives under attack, they look the other way. _** Instead of honoring voices who valued real debate, like Charlie Kirk, **_they defend Hollywood elites whose entire careers are built on mocking Republicans._** I want to hear your thoughts on this hypocrisy. **[Will you take a moment to answer a few quick questions for me about the outrage Democrats have adopted over the past few days?](https://trk.email.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9aTS1NZWRpYS1TdXJ2ZXlfMjAyNTA5MjQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1aTS1NZWRpYS1TdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUifQ/vPbqIDCBYf7qwIbUCZCBkQ) ** Your input is invaluable as we fight back against this double standard. For liberty,
Ted Cruz

body:
President Trump said he was close to forging a deal [to end the war in Gaza](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OtCAUBfCnwQ7DP0UKiq-xm6_d0lzlomxQJsiMcZ9-w7zCdje5yTn5na_H9IAQw7H-hx1t8Wk68DojloJ5Kvm1P1f4AYcQXX6tBXLw_oRJMNFRZqjQk4MQ70k1znpEgbJBy3U3mF53ums22y98McY7KQHnAQzOvOuEwUFJxh1nTbA1jRmhOWM9V63z86ClnN2gFyWWniiGLpSU2-8UjrKhj3d6Y26XtDfRbqU8TyL_ETESMV7X1d6wpVS_RIyVQ8QIuYQlYj0_KnrCfdJqoxVHD4RMuZKG9YwP7Vb22GTrnleIMZy9JoqtO4T46Sx_GuptxW8AAAD__785fMY) and bring hostages home as he prepared to meet Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Monday.
