# Saturday, September 27, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1912, W.C. Handy published Memphis Blues, believed to be the first commercially successful blues song, sparking the birth of a music genre. [You can hear it here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuqzAUxvGnMVuQsQ0HBg_3qkqndOhSKYtl7GNwZeLUHILSp6_oK3T9Puk3_D8u5mJjirfpzS6oKWRzw31NSITFUNmW-2S_rUebfNkmsiWGsFojuGhPfDgJMN7G9DSq8jogCpQV6gbafuighbaaNecO5TC6HkB0PboWuOCqcQpgcF0zVFEfGh8ENJx3jap9GHuQcvQ9OCVcxxRHHymX-jPHG80Y0jM_sNQuL1XSM9F9ZfIfE2cmzvu-18-80Tbi8R-LJTczeX4w-XJ9_fq_pOu79K4q2t_3mFJcO2CKT4uN6ZekP3V4aPETAAD__93HcN8).

Today on the _Flyover Podcast,_ we report that the two major TV station groups that were preempting the _Jimmy Kimmel Live!_ late-night show will start airing it again. You can hear the details [by clicking here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOrCAUxvGnwW4MgoAWFJN7M8Ums-2U5ggHZYMyweOY2affuK-w7f9LfsX3uA93iCmu0ycsaCnkYcVjS0iEZaCyL88JvsEjJF_2iaDEEDYYBBfqwvuLMIOHmN5DW3kbEAXKCm1jVNdro4yqZhvaRnspHXKlFfRGjaPSpnHQeaeQYxXtqfFemIZz3bS1D2NnpBx9Z1wrnGYtRx8pl_orx5VmDOmdX1hql5cq2ZnouTF5ZeLGxO04jvqdd9pHPPezALmZyduLyf_i3yr19fLxKBMTms5i9FYV659HTClu2rCWTwvE9KvTny55WfETAAD__9y9c9Y), which will take you directly to that section of the podcast.

If stubborn belly flab feels impossible to fight after 40, Brooke Burke's simple protein discovery could be the game-changer you've been missing from today's sponsor [Power Life.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFugzAUgOHTmC3IPGM_GDxUiujSZOjSbMjgZ-LKBGSboPT0Fb1C91_f8H9d-ovxwT-mq5lJZ7f0D9pToJwp9jlu8zqZH2PJBBu3KZvonUumBw7yxNsTYG-ND6--Lqx2RECiIF2hbFqFEmVx14SmFULykYNSY21Gawc5QNsYdHKQtvD60HgLWHGuqrq0bmhQiME2ONYwKlZzsj4vsfxe_CPfyYXX8qRYjstcBH3PeU1MvDHoGHT7vpfRTilt63oEDLrPd7xezww6-YE3dcMjFF3ahoqJs2pUW0Rt192H4JNCVvNpNj786flfS54afgMAAP__na1zFQ)

|
---
## Trump: Gaza Peace Deal is Close
President Trump said he was close to forging a deal [to end the war in Gaza](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OtCAUBfCnwQ7DP0UKiq-xm6_d0lzlomxQJsiMcZ9-w7zCdje5yTn5na_H9IAQw7H-hx1t8Wk68DojloJ5Kvm1P1f4AYcQXX6tBXLw_oRJMNFRZqjQk4MQ70k1znpEgbJBy3U3mF53ums22y98McY7KQHnAQzOvOuEwUFJxh1nTbA1jRmhOWM9V63z86ClnN2gFyWWniiGLpSU2-8UjrKhj3d6Y26XtDfRbqU8TyL_ETESMV7X1d6wpVS_RIyVQ8QIuYQlYj0_KnrCfdJqoxVHD4RMuZKG9YwP7Vb22GTrnleIMZy9JoqtO4T46Sx_GuptxW8AAAD__785fMY) and bring hostages home as he prepared to meet Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Monday. _"It's looking like we have a deal on Gaza. I think it's a deal that gets the hostages back, it's going to be a deal that ends the war,"_ Trump told reporters on Friday. Trump unveiled a 21-point initiative to end the war during [meetings with Arab leaders](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGypCAUBNCv0QwLUUQDgk3MZtMNrStc9O6iWMAMO-_rXzm_8OKu6q7Tfx7LA8jTuf2GA3V2YTmxJI85Y1xyfB7XBl9gEbyNzy1DJOcSLIILyfjEhFoskH8vfW21QxTY1ahbJcdpUFLJetdTO629M1watXbO9sKMsnPdOMIqV3C8Jn238UmolvOh7Rvr1lF13WpHZXphhqrnaCmH2PwNdOYdnX-HF8bGhKP2es_5SlX3qxJzJeZSSuPC_1tx55WYr-Apk0mVmD8gluCdGLG80_mPFWQ7vJDdRHZbWYFYR22vQt5TGlTV8-0A8p-5_KOPXlp8BwAA__95lX1I) on the sidelines of the United Nations General Assembly meeting earlier this week. A White House official said the U.S. plan calls for the return of all hostages, living and dead, no further Israeli attacks, and a new dialogue between Israel and Palestinians for "peaceful coexistence.”
## Breakthrough Seen for Huntington's Disease
A one-time gene therapy treatment has shown remarkable success in [slowing the progression of Huntington's disease](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOnCAURp8Gd0wAFXThokljuvm77dIwcMHbIBi4zsQ-fTN9ha6_5Ms559fX9mUxYY4_7QELhbJleLcERFA3qtdxRvvHerDJ1yuSrRhCs5sSauRi5sps3mK6t6HzSwBQ0HewSDNOszajGbt9Cd5oYaQFDUo_pyBdDxqkHFw_u9HqDpfPm5iVkUJoOTx8eE6m759-Mm5QTrNBgEcq9fG7YKYdQrrLC-rDlaNLy050NtZ_Y2plarVP9zF4xPKZmVp_gE20M7WeFRIemG29-VnLgQ1z5BEycNqh2vPmbS_vxs3IK_jLEZbM9ysT5kglN6bWRqXerF_Rs_67VOMsBqmmri7-fGNK2LRhg4iHxfSPjv4r6WtRfwMAAP__XT2MpQ) in a preliminary trial, the first treatment to show success against the disease. The experimental treatment, called AMT-130, [reduced disease progression](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb2OpDAMx58mdKB8kAkUFCuNpttrr0QmcSC3gYwSZ1ZzT38C7RtcY9k_f8n-__6cPyHEcKy_YMeJfJoP_C4RiTDPlOv-XOEvOITocl0JcvC-wCy51C0fW2lmByG-575xk0eUqBqchNHDeDPa6Gab_CgGPSx2NFpwjdqhwBEXA8YMHgbehOmcxkdpBOc30XfOL4NRanGDsb20N9ZzdIFS7v6kcNCGPr7TC3Nn097EaSN6FqY-mHww-YDanRd0b9hSOiuYfGz1oHCslI7SulAQCralWoul-Brju6WMQOhaH3KhVgjR94PSottoj0w97Ndc6lJsDgvmOTim7lLzvldaK8PkrdI-l1SzRabuNh0vzPQV6Cezowt1Z-qOO4T4Ay3sTwjrwdT9g0kt-TMnn-rhruBssRAvf8kIX7TlVNftAu1lxSikNnxo8uSe3yHGUG6G9Xw9l1yfof-S8zXJfwEAAP__jQGz6g) in a small test group by 75% over three years in patients who received a high dose, compared to those on standard care, according to researchers. _"This result changes everything,"_ said UCL Professor Ed Wild at University College London, where the work was done. _"One of my patients who had to retire due to the disease has even been able to return to work."_ Huntington's disease occurs when a faulty gene causes toxic proteins to damage brain cells. The disease typically appears in mid-adulthood, causing problems with movement, memory, and mood, and is normally fatal within 20 years.
## Big Lineup Set for College Football Today
Today’s college football lineup features four big matchups between teams ranked in the Top 25, with 10 ranked teams playing on the road. See [the day’s full schedule here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-upCAUxp8GuzF4FNGCYhu62XZLcoSDwy6KAWaM-_Q33le47fcvv3x_nuaJIYZ9_Y0bqeqT2ekskWqlbGp-b8eK_9ERRpffa8UcvC9ogIN48PkB0jgM8TJD45QnAuobUp0U0zxKIUXzUsRHj5aIC2udFMgHXCT2vBsliAnmJqh7jc8gO87HbmidXybZ94ubpB3Ajmzg5EJNuf2bwl5f5OOVPpRbm7YmqletR2H9LwaagT7Ps6Vy7LfJQNsUI6308CnVBWNkoItNmZaE2THQ5q4Q_WOgBQN9EWYG-ga6k4Ql7fU66NYY6DWn98FAT7zJyh1niDGUUbKBrxuG-A1Uf_TiR8FXAAAA__-8roU1). No. 6 Oregon travels to No. 3 Penn State for the Nittany Lions’ annual “White Out” and a [rematch of last year’s Big Ten Championship](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL8GsnHJA7IgILiEbC-9kJpFAx6fkFTSrCnf1195f2Hjru7q9_58LB8kQeL-mw6edEtL5LMGVuWyaPk68k7_yDMFX752pSLbVmlBgxbMCOgWTxJeS9_6aWNG7lqers4O481ZZ9v7ZLp-tAb9sFrP1lk74tgPKzrqht6s2Mr0XjMjuqsxt2t_8dvn4Lru0w9u7XG9Nb1hL5rK5ZEk6p238EpPLpc1HW2Y7qq5Nt2vBucG5_M8Lyl276zB-Q3T4JwK7ykCKWSOEaqSMuTCXlaVFOFBB1fYCsW_QSJEUaX4giApVthZ4SmrpvICieC5Zi703as5KTxSvUMm5Qbntkw-nxKC1JtrerMfJOH7p_5I7nPC_wEAAP__koqRjg). Penn State is a 3.5-point favorite. No. 5 Georgia, which has won 33 straight at its home Sanford Stadium, [hosts No. 17 Alabama](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAURb8GO24QUbSgmMbuTTulOcoBzwTBAGrefP3k3l949d7Z2Wv9-Vq-gAJF_xsONNWlJeJTAtaKean5Ok4P_8AiBJsvXyGTcwUWKWTPxcSlXixQ-F5UY41DlNg1aFrdj9Oge903u1mtm4RzumuFQiWnqd1glLpX7TAMY9c2ZN5rYpK6FWJo1cu6ddRdt9pRb0puA1MCLdWUX38TxbqjC9_pxvza0tEEs9d6Ftb9YnJmcn6e55Vi986YnN8wTM4QYIUD-F24x5Q9AT8zWtoqpcgvD3xPB3KbDooQN-Sfdk5gean58j5g4Z5u5OsVgk2-cLA3xAoemZybbOz5UAhUBs2U8AdQ-LyrP1J6G_k_AAD__9YNjW8) tonight. The Crimson Tide has taken nine of the last 10 in the series, but Georgia is favored by 2.5.

"It's looking like we have a deal on Gaza. I think it's a deal that gets the hostages back, it's going to be a deal that ends the war," Trump told reporters on Friday. Trump unveiled a 21-point initiative to end the war during on the sidelines of the United Nations General Assembly meeting earlier this week. A White House official said the U.S. plan calls for the return of all hostages, living and dead, no further Israeli attacks, and a new dialogue between Israel and Palestinians for "peaceful coexistence.” Breakthrough Seen for Huntington's Disease A one-time gene therapy treatment has shown remarkable success in in a preliminary trial, the first treatment to show success against the disease. The experimental treatment, called AMT-130, in a small test group by 75% over three years in patients who received a high dose, compared to those on standard care, according to researchers. "This result changes everything," said UCL Professor Ed Wild at University College London, where the work was done. "One of my patients who had to retire due to the disease has even been able to return to work." Huntington's disease occurs when a faulty gene causes toxic proteins to damage brain cells. The disease typically appears in mid-adulthood, causing problems with movement, memory, and mood, and is normally fatal within 20 years. **FOX & Friends Reveals
New Breakthrough Solar
Generator - Demand
Skyrockets!** _**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e6974990/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsNXFQU1p4ag/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1CJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQg/gaNe7Mw/s2v75de0fe1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e6974990/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsNXFQU1p4ag/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1CJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQg/gaNe7Mw/s2v75de0fe1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **NATIONAL SECURITY EXPERTS FEAR IMMINENT THREAT TO OUR POWER GRID** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e6974990/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsNXFQU1p4ag/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1CJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQg/gaNe7Mw/s2v75de0fe1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** **YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW AND IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2500X** [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e6974990/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsNXFQU1p4ag/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1CJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQg/gaNe7Mw/s2v75de0fe1) The [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e6974990/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsNXFQU1p4ag/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1CJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQg/gaNe7Mw/s2v75de0fe1) now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. With this NEW Patriot Power Generator 2500X...
* You get MORE power...

It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e6974990/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsNXFQU1p4ag/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1CJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQg/gaNe7Mw/s2v75de0fe1) is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,500 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it.
1. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight.

Amazingly, it takes just 90 minutes to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **ORDER TODAY AND GET 15 FREE GIFTS WORTH $1,391.70!**

Frank Bates

## Texas Brothers Hold Family Hostage, Steal $8M
Two Texas brothers, Raymond and Isiah Garcia, face state and federal charges for holding a Minnesota family [hostage](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOnDAQRk8DnZEZAzaFizR0mzYlGuwBLBm8sifL7u0jVrnB333Sk57mzZ_H_MAQw7n9xoMsv9c0n3SVSMyUZ3PwTitfKUdfGGOkwi5h4Rkk9EKOAvTsMcTP3NXeLtKPbU221b0ZtRzB1LslZfTgjFPrgMYbNQyjlDA6D05Ta6gO9pbJEXTbSpB9sy7o_CC71fSkFmWqTpIPnHLDOzG9sazxk16UG5eOOtqd-Vkq9auCqYLpuq7mXNxdcfMKpntWMP0t4v_6OsSSE--Ui3A75o28uPs28vEj9hR9ODdxhPOkkhjFikf4gsK4kShMKLI7EZQyg66z9c8rxBjKoKtObgeG-L2Of_bTl4V_AQAA___GGI7E) and stealing $8 million in cryptocurrency from them. According to the criminal complaints, the two [ambushed the Grant, Minn., husband](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ8Guolshx9TuLgNXW67JRrjAVsxGNmjkLz9KtFqX2C7TzrSp3PO1226YYhhX__jRoafS5p2OkskZsqT3tjTwmfK0RXGGKnwnLDwpIRqQQyg-slhiK-pqZ2xwg2yJiP7Vg-9GJSuvRFadI3s7OIsohbU6b5tlEQpSc6ym-tg3jIxqF5KoUR7WSzOrhPNolu62quuGkEucMoX9sT0xLLEV3pQvsxpq6PxzEeprv8qNVZqvBc-3sEPwntOpUZOv6jA5sSecgHMmQqTg7DDxwyzx7ySgzOwh3twOx5H2FfIyVrKL9gJM2zoOW3kAviweiizTylWaqyzcccZYgyl66tGrBuG-GnJf_v2YdR3AAAA__8D8JG0) at gunpoint while he was taking out the trash, and then held him, his wife, and his adult son hostage for about nine hours while forcing the cryptocurrency transfers. Isiah Garcia also forced the husband on a drive to a [family cabin](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL0OnDAQhJ_GdEZmgcMULtLQXdqUaLGXw5J_TvbmON4-IkVeIO3Mp9HM_HquT_TBp9dPjGT4u-c10VkDMVNZdeSDdj5zCa4yhkCVbcbKKygYpZolTKtDH651aJzZlJu7hkw3jXqe1Ay6OQyggtmBdjOOivpOj4QTObXDptENQ-PNHaZmmLpOgRrbfUPrHmrY9Uj91msxKHKec2n5IKYv1j1c-UOltTk2wRzM7yr6HwIWAct5nq3d6r3i9gUs0adENTMKWG5ZwOKT85YjJZZbyXxQqfIfJneMPlwy-hB8TlW6HAKWKm253pzt71Io2UvA0hTj3ueN1cckBvWK6MPfVvx_X34M_AkAAP__V3eNrA) where more cryptocurrency was held in a hard-drive wallet. The suspects were alerted to the additional wallet from a third party who helped facilitate the transfers. No reported arrests have been made yet of the third-party suspect.
## Six Flags Coaster To Be World’s Tallest
Six Flags Over Texas has unveiled plans for its newest roller coaster, designed to break [six world records](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OrDAMRp8GuqD8wASKFLeZbm67JQqJA5HMZJRYA_P2q7D7Blsltvwd-fjrMT9sxPhc_9sdDJ0hzU84CgIR5HncaYNAR8roC1lEKOSSLTRLLgfGJyb17G3Ez9y33izcT6IFI_QwTppPcmw345ReQGvhwYVBTHJUyinhBAw6jEqqNpoK45PUQnDJhy4s1vkb78M4gFrU2PQcfKSUO9qA4LQl4Ce9IXcu7S2ajehVGvWvkfdG3o_j6EI6-6pRBxp5r9-fh5V4soB2LawC2EVjOSFCvsQgsyMisgXYry8LtV2IYXquVx1zIQY1vsbVMh_f0GbjXzUYy003PV93G_Faj_521LeR3wEAAP__zB6QSg), including the tallest, fastest, and longest dive coaster. The ride, dubbed "Tormenta Rampaging Run," is themed after the Running of the Bulls in Spain, and its debut in 2026 coincides with the park’s 65th anniversary. After lifting riders 309 feet into the air, Tormenta will execute a “beyond vertical drop” and reach speeds of 87 mph—all world-record-breaking experiences on the first “[giga dive coaster](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAMgJ8mdBkFhyykSHEN3V57JcqPA5E8ZEV8w-zbn0D3Blt9hWXL3_fnc_n0hcq-_vZPdPzOddnxbITMeCzTkzfMfNaDUmNPhI1j9Y0XUGCkshLGJflC38vQJRdUsn2Hrh_NZEdlYeo2pyEB2n6KEHzUdlKmN6rvIUQdtdGhK-46piyMfa9AmUcOPqYPNeTJoA56EoPCVLgeD96Q8e1bpu_6wuMR67MjtzF_NaF_CZgFzOd5PvYQUz6vsYD58hEwU42eBMytvGUmvzYZ_hZKZV8lbyj_28nsG1-kuq8X17J6mcoL5S2Ohyz7vXBHETBrC4MySsDcHS59nYWotI9RDGp9-kL3j_yzsi8H_wIAAP__6omO3A)” ever built. The new roller coaster will anchor an immersive area that includes a Spanish village and a new restaurant.
## El Paso Music Venue to Break Ground
El Paso’s $80 million [Sunset Amphitheater](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OrDAQhE8DmUfG_BgHDl5CNi_dEDW4DdYYGtm9MHP7FXuFDUufVKr6vp7jE0IM-_IfNrT89jTueOWIzJjGfuMVPV-UossMMWLmmSDzqKRqhTRC6dFBiJ-xKZ2dpDNVibbSbW-0NKovVzvpqVZz11c419gZXze60qAbdMYbMH0Z7F0mjdJVJZVsH36C2XWy8X2L9VT3RSPRBab04BUZ35B9_NCJ6THTVka7Mh-5qP8VaijU8PL05vNGhRruL4UaIs0Q70iJV4TMAqM4IFMWO14CtmMNN2BMIiMLT0nsdOI2YRJLou_dTQnhFfZFzJhwo_1TJuuOK8QYcqeLRi4bhPi7iP_m8bTqJwAA___JMIvN) has a start date of Nov. 19 set for construction, according to Venu, the company developing the long-anticipated live music venue. Commenting on the groundbreaking, Venu CEO J.W. Roth called the amphitheater “a beacon for live music in West Texas.” The open-air venue will seat 12,500 and host about 40 concerts a year. Venu is eyeing the end of 2026 for completion of the $80 million project, to which the city of El Paso is contributing $31 million. Developers are projecting [$2 billion in revenue](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ8Gd44A_0FBsY27bLulNZjBRsEQwcRJ3n7l-wq3-zSfNOfo_LsvdwgxpO0vHGjo4_OS8F0jEmFZ1EE7enrnEl0liBErrRkqLZLLoeW6ldPiIMTv0jfOWO60aNCIaVB64lqqZjdqAq96VCC0AgHc29GvKOyoBdedFU0w1zOu5SQEl3y4eQurG3nv1YCd7RTrObpAudxoR8IPVB-_-cRyW_PRRLMTPSvr_jA5Mzk_zgCXYHLGRFgIQjowEZPzlcPkzPXFF20lv5KzBeER0tb6XNr6ShWpheO5B9oRCEt7HS6X8omHxcLk3BTjnu8QY6jjxHq-HRDiTx_63Yqnkf8DAAD__wXvh_o) within a decade, “fueling jobs, tourism, small business growth, and expanded entertainment opportunities for the community,” according to a spokesperson.

On this day in 1947, rock'n'roll legend Marvin Lee Aday (better known as ) was born in Dallas. His Bat Out of Hell album trilogy has sold more than 100 million records worldwide. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Texas Brothers Hold Family Hostage, Steal $8M Two Texas brothers, Raymond and Isiah Garcia, face state and federal charges for holding a Minnesota family and stealing $8 million in cryptocurrency from them. According to the criminal complaints, the two at gunpoint while he was taking out the trash, and then held him, his wife, and his adult son hostage for about nine hours while forcing the cryptocurrency transfers. Isiah Garcia also forced the husband on a drive to a where more cryptocurrency was held in a hard-drive wallet. The suspects were alerted to the additional wallet from a third party who helped facilitate the transfers. No reported arrests have been made yet of the third-party suspect. Six Flags Coaster To Be World’s Tallest Six Flags Over Texas has unveiled plans for its newest roller coaster, designed to break , including the tallest, fastest, and longest dive coaster. The ride, dubbed "Tormenta Rampaging Run," is themed after the Running of the Bulls in Spain, and its debut in 2026 coincides with the park’s 65th anniversary. After lifting riders 309 feet into the air, Tormenta will execute a “beyond vertical drop” and reach speeds of 87 mph—all world-record-breaking experiences on the first “” ever built. The new roller coaster will anchor an immersive area that includes a Spanish village and a new restaurant. El Paso Music Venue to Break Ground El Paso’s $80 million has a start date of Nov. 19 set for construction, according to Venu, the company developing the long-anticipated live music venue. Commenting on the groundbreaking, Venu CEO J.W. Roth called the amphitheater “a beacon for live music in West Texas.” The open-air venue will seat 12,500 and host about 40 concerts a year. Venu is eyeing the end of 2026 for completion of the $80 million project, to which the city of El Paso is contributing $31 million. Developers are projecting within a decade, “fueling jobs, tourism, small business growth, and expanded entertainment opportunities for the community,” according to a spokesperson. | 🍂 🍂 Crisp autumn nights call for bold, flavorful smokes—and your humidor deserves nothing less than the best. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
If I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING!
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=24b7cc46c7e54677b6363c8b28968bc8&_e=u11Z_mQz3Go33dSSdGu3osSGWPCvgCki_BhQWGtx1txtycBhOb3NjxSfrADanhU3JNS5gXpaY0yNfc_vBJY8ONYH6VryHbU1udEJrqlV5EOoTmDxUYuzIDLEu_Huxt5vcudntcwEKY4vSRVyf-s4BiI1z0jel4TmH1_pscuA9wIGe4FW7MQ0n8i92iaedi38Q3wGlBZWI8_BWKBD1ju8DnG9P1NmM7Dj7yyoJ9HQVTYh3-42suvERhkJzGQXSgham2sWWKh2m_0_Abc1ShHBXhn-lAhMTpC8aKEFwuseYx4i36yl3ZTUSbBwtDYc5fbmioqdCuN2501ikFm2sdeZY9SWq6jTk9gvP2Ed0qBEHGPs3JIsLdjFDPlhT98QAhoSNQ2KtntFuX8owIzq-O9085swrL3hBMj-cRUIeG6liys2BZ0LZFxeoUw322CGFPls5E2RugJ-xPQ7MbLbnf00J2uuTGFVk5y9iBf6fC4hfPBi3-P3GDMmo17w4ofWq03fZ1iLmkKYB9SSFiKJBd9T0IeVUa1OYOMonuuutk82GKisqvx1Z9gkUVCRafPOhUtosEp-O9Ru6v8ga2GKlZZJxmYOXHONXr_jL7sZq-v-Oyf-tAXlsK1hMN_lxzn8W-SUKce_IRQSOKQuBlwKKdLLDw%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=24b7cc46c7e54677b6363c8b28968bc8&_e=u11Z_mQz3Go33dSSdGu3osSGWPCvgCki_BhQWGtx1txtycBhOb3NjxSfrADanhU3JNS5gXpaY0yNfc_vBJY8ONYH6VryHbU1udEJrqlV5EOoTmDxUYuzIDLEu_Huxt5vcudntcwEKY4vSRVyf-s4BiI1z0jel4TmH1_pscuA9wIGe4FW7MQ0n8i92iaedi38Q3wGlBZWI8_BWKBD1ju8Dg00Y3wBt-bcor5ETyovYW7t6v2E5L4Bn1KKU7AERkpKwlDa65JfQxpHjpaUVr8zv5LyMrdhTwMe9FfHJGHhZEdXNlNqcd-CgLb_SszVmx0WB02Sbd-q5POJ_1nJhVtjCtD0fMoiZHwu6Lc8ltBonqnODp0AJDSmzzan09k-yeu4GSRwzeLFKtRJshbk4xA45rTGgWuaVy5ZUYgbCbPyYFuhWbcLYMcUVOD3VOORchMnfIUMOvEXo3-TeJ0ZDkTwGGNwAzsdImiYiPZonaaPSCxHLlSNapyFddQVJK4HETvUTZ4VRiTYWUALVE-gGEtS1-CvESbe32jIxXnba3w5U9GUoiFPi25MNtQZ6rGEZZCgQXOQ7kXQQ5KzLaJ28_E0Apgxtmpb72Z0MJ36rzNtaXnM788fwAr7NRxSWueOaIk1C6jdaQ5SdrUMsn0lmbHJKA%3D%3D)
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=24b7cc46c7e54677b6363c8b28968bc8&_e=u11Z_mQz3Go33dSSdGu3osSGWPCvgCki_BhQWGtx1txtycBhOb3NjxSfrADanhU3JNS5gXpaY0yNfc_vBJY8ONYH6VryHbU1udEJrqlV5EOoTmDxUYuzIDLEu_Huxt5vcudntcwEKY4vSRVyf-s4BiI1z0jel4TmH1_pscuA9wIGe4FW7MQ0n8i92iaedi38Q3wGlBZWI8_BWKBD1ju8DlcSDFU9pzYoA0z_8iJVNDTGHojaVb98XVvu3E_EbmEPpC155ej84WrhwTXBsNljhtk2eABcGuG18Dfd4fy_QLnP096l_QgrOYBGNYIxNatKaq-N56edUceVWCj_SCPfgnLOiQ3_PgYrm3TIGDRz2MZpckB2uH7PX_EmCK97C3Ce8TKNCLhLyTfyNtYJP7iFM8WJncPU8FDcjUtu9YW5VBt1ZupERvobxlnI_Meq6WVMPdc-F5Xl4GB6Yh8e46nilSoOCjNLc8IUMteyMICtMLWiVlv9CS42a7eyZKDKSBI3gEH2_a-CtbeyapXtdhRbwNX2XhhC_KH0KAMZIxYa154qgHW5vDBy4M60QubyEl1oY8CLI6PK9z1w01xJj6bNvMDO9-NTX99L0mGi_o2VZBX1GP__8EHSOK5rsT9vqNva00J__gRAFvU3QeJj9VO_xA%3D%3D)

clean_body: If I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Peter, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more... And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

body:
Hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights
I promise I won’t take up much of your time.

---
Friend,
---
I promise I won't take up much of your time.
In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.
Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.
**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**
I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.
Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.
[ If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below: ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ca09e3c8ac3648fc964c3bd07f58f3a8&_e=Xy7nMwHGpVqVAVTGlrjzphb6WjItsOVypeEHRFT7DJjspeZuw_43KQVBfr6fonEl4uLo1qltgD7Dtv8OXoTGBgFyTuilicZ6vYluE_RknNLbwwyGsaz5m6e7WLg6sX2j2e1vAeqjyU5rHFMc9c_7uKgFVtatkOxcivoZDO5npCrj0N1bksl3YYUqBphYN4mGOcEhHECuVGYFJBMNnAz7qBPO7-c7_8Liw_KDnthqCFYXawVVfF_aDzjh3EJ25cc6P59i4SJK9jesvCWMdAziziQuOmuQp5hB2LnFugZXWRD-3Q6zQ8BCbsGgqL2sQ3woIrosh9AfatoM3qj-x_grL5QXSZ2Z_F0pYYAH035jVQL6rhRYKKMHItm1vWeRx6f3Tr1Ae9SY1lWVxbygxH6p_mYosyaVkpRqYkqLtxev_1yjGWE_zx6-9n7XzuxXzsv7TFELvKo7Eu3O4jgS3Fgl6WX_nWhEWBU4cBBUj3i6YTvbU5jlbP6KPq1Mq818nuBblp5QLLmmLF34cdo4BmRW1b4wwwJ72q4nMm3s69NidD3xw5G1tqVvaMjU7uqChvTjxMpTcZtYrqgvlMrT72n-UjrCZqm7v98K5lYBjJAdQP44-9WYWeuD_X_Puu8u7hcn)
| [Donate Now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ca09e3c8ac3648fc964c3bd07f58f3a8&_e=Xy7nMwHGpVqVAVTGlrjzphb6WjItsOVypeEHRFT7DJjspeZuw_43KQVBfr6fonEl4uLo1qltgD7Dtv8OXoTGBgFyTuilicZ6vYluE_RknNLbwwyGsaz5m6e7WLg6sX2j2e1vAeqjyU5rHFMc9c_7uKgFVtatkOxcivoZDO5npCphzCZtpLtzH6fUMWTGf-GxAxBBY7gOziq2pzQVlCwB2NXsYHN4X_cLzpL9uvRodVyhyF9hfHja805z1dc-gjQchhqP80AxU6q6QqgIzmyPL1WFaFiLn92FUXyBExbNLKubqMST-Grmq0Gutb9iLkgkaAcuFqnYdRBMsqZntheLuL3VKPqsnuIAW3SNn-1i1VMAjLxpDn_cmCMDC8gRiMMgS0WhW6CTTrN7Pace1OnmwLLk9vqcJW1Z27iGM9cCoQh232l9To4gPzYK-Y_UaB8DAOPMynem_B8-djd0-zRhpR0Ma6PA1-0gHbD5fz2sHfR9UddfU0BQtWhWkBicckjkg2wKSnKsMkPbN9ouT18D380TQIeM7DP4a-1W5ykUVNw7XGRinCUL7US4bZnIchdaX_2IBUv5v3vQsO-nRdJbxrHyUjdBz1HHVca9c5QjTA2O2Ri9ZdGZZ3opWxg_hFEwNbXGRe7b4irINraYOH1ejQ%3D%3D)
---
**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**
---
$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

name: Angels on our side
subject: Besieged Pennsylvania Democrats just witnessed a miracle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Regardless of whether you believe in a high power it is clear that America finds itself in a battle between good and evil. Ground zero for this fight is the Nov. 2025 PA Supreme Court election
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GYYfO99izN6CSmsRlekWSbF5Zz-GSwHbNKsMc2W7wJu08U76A0ay6bx6r4MnnwZ_1tpRkiVZVAIFmBepETgDOmZF0SPylNs0lgsb8wvKxyvcWfFGT-AbXb5_CnWStVOV4zpRT0EbTuOdue7RxHlB5GayEQBbyfh-RoxLlERMp19giX0s-GGx5x8drsZQauMl15JY0EgqcrTYcRicPiTwZEeLTldcJgCO&c=ydfWmN_6yKHtuBabCRQwEIUVDnWq0T32EfcrkM6WJQDF4TcLKryfJg==&ch=3jTFbSZrvLxL45BWRZwx0TITUVma1m2SF4xjB9lB4Z0rRApIYOUNnw==)
---
| Peter,
Regardless of whether you believe in a high power it is clear that America finds itself in a battle between good and evil.
Ground zero for this fight is the upcoming November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election. Though it may sound like an obscure local race the stakes are life and death for believers of equality, freedom, and Democracy.
Losing the PA Supreme Court's blue majority all but guarantees MAGA control of Pennsylvania and ensures Democrats never win PA's 19 electoral votes again.
Assuming that this race would receive little attention like it typically does, Democrats paid little attention until MAGA launched an unprecedented surprise attack dumping tens of millions into the race overnight, rapidly seizing the lead.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GYYfO99izN6CSmsRlekWSbF5Zz-GSwHbNKsMc2W7wJu08U76A0ay6bx6r4MnnwZ_1tpRkiVZVAIFmBepETgDOmZF0SPylNs0lgsb8wvKxyvcWfFGT-AbXb5_CnWStVOV4zpRT0EbTuOdue7RxHlB5GayEQBbyfh-RoxLlERMp19giX0s-GGx5x8drsZQauMl15JY0EgqcrTYcRicPiTwZD8RjJrStvn8&c=ydfWmN_6yKHtuBabCRQwEIUVDnWq0T32EfcrkM6WJQDF4TcLKryfJg==&ch=3jTFbSZrvLxL45BWRZwx0TITUVma1m2SF4xjB9lB4Z0rRApIYOUNnw==)
---
| | | | Since then Democrats have been on their backfoot mounting a desperate defense. Defend our Courts is at the forefront of coordinating this defense and this week we were handed yet another demoralizing blow:
On Wednesday MAGA launched a new disinformation campaign disseminated via mailers and digital ads, targeting hundreds of thousands of Democratic voters, telling them that voting no and removing the justices (the GOP position) is a vote to defend our Democracy and support women's rights.
---

To begin printing the mailer on Saturday morning (today) in time for it to arrive before most mail in ballots, our print shop needed a payment of $100,000 by no later than 9 PM on Friday night. At 5 PM we stood tens of thousands of dollars short and it looked like the mailing would be a failure.
We sent out a plea at 6 PM that went largely unanswered, then inexplicably around 7 PM donations began flooding in. Thousands of Democrats from every state in the union. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: My Washington Examiner Article
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/washingtonexaminer?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**I’m excited to share that I published an article in the _Washington Examiner _this week.**

In it, I argue that controlling institutions, particularly the administrative state, is as critical as winning elections. **Despite Republicans winning the White House 11 times since the New Deal, public policy has steadily shifted leftward** , with expanding welfare programs, increased economic and environmental regulations, greater government intervention in the economy, and the rise of federally sanctioned DEI initiatives. It often feels as though the left maintains control regardless of who holds office.

**The administrative state—a left-leaning, unelected bureaucracy—has consistently driven policy leftward.** We must address how to control it.

I also highlight how Republican appointees to the federal bureaucracy are often “captured” by the system, diluting conservative outcomes.

President Trump’s second term is actively dismantling the administrative state through executive orders, job cuts, and regulatory rollbacks. Recent Supreme Court rulings, such as _West Virginia v. EPA_ (2022), are also curbing bureaucratic overreach and shifting power back to the states.

**Additionally, I emphasize that states, not federal agencies, drive innovative policies like school choice and tax reform.** This is why I’m proud to work at the state level with the Mississippi Center for Public Policy.

[**You can read the full article here.**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7d623a2bef&e=5703353baa)

As we continue our work at the state level to advance freedom and opportunity, your support is vital. Thank you for standing with us.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=63b320b5ce&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=eb7c4effd4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=eb7c4effd4).

#

body:
Will you give $25 or even more so we can keep putting in the work to flip Virginia blue this November?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116027931/572251359/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmFkYzUxZGUtYTE5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SnhjL0OLAsBymAjCrrWqIHqbgPHF8wz4TMrYP7qB6sE=)
Peter, it looks like you haven't donated online to my campaign, so I'll cut right to the chase:

Peter — We’re approaching a milestone in the fight for fair maps. Tuesday will be the first end of quarter since Texas and Missouri approved their new, outrageously gerrymandered congressional maps. Right now, the other side is paying attention to how much pushback they receive from their flagrant attempts to manipulate maps and grow an artificial electoral advantage. Let’s send a clear message that Americans are fed up with their relentless gerrymandering — and that the fair maps movement is willing and able to fight back with everything we’ve got. body:
Add your name and prove conservatives will never be silenced |

Fellow American,

> _Do you ever hesitate before posting your beliefs online - wondering if it could cost you your job, your friends, even your safety?
>
> Do you feel the weight of keeping quiet at work, at school, or even in your own community - just because you're a conservative?
>
> Do you worry that speaking the truth could one day make you a target?_
>
_**If you answered yes, you're not alone.**_ Millions of conservatives across America feel the same fear.

_That's the point._

The radical Left wants us scared, silenced, and sidelined.

But here's the truth: **we can never back down. We can never be silenced. Not now. Not ever.**

clean_body: Add your name and prove conservatives will never be silenced | Fellow American, Do you ever hesitate before posting your beliefs online - wondering if it could cost you your job, your friends, even your safety? Do you feel the weight of keeping quiet at work, at school, or even in your own community - just because you're a conservative? Do you worry that speaking the truth could one day make you a target? If you answered yes, you're not alone. Millions of conservatives across America feel the same fear. That's the point. The radical Left wants us scared, silenced, and sidelined. But here's the truth: we can never back down. We can never be silenced. Not now. Not ever. This is the moment to stand strong together. We will never be silenced by fear, violence, or intimidation. Every response is a declaration that conservatives will not hide. We will speak boldly. We will defend our faith, our families, and our freedoms. And we will never surrender to fear. - Voices of the Silent Majority If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Fellow Conservative,

When our voters stay at home, we lose critically essential races.

All year, my colleagues in the Senate and I have been raising the alarm bells about what would happen if our supporters stayed home during pivotal races.

_**A couple of weeks ago, we found out.**_****

I put together a campaign memo on how to avoid future disasters like the one that recently unfolded.

Please take a moment to read it today.

[**READ MY MEMO →** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3fc06f9548fb4ff5a7f247a97668b5d6&_e=dAfviSokZmUXDLw6jM5AiAqUAc0tuZN3CX0tGHldkf_pCAFh7_Og1v24omf9q5XcBu9gstVXtjbsUZwE2ihg8n5b9kjHDDJPAyXzjQejvVxReeBhVuWbnWLWhxIzwRKMBHhPKiM6MXWC_ZHFYeAF-wrG0omMsZphe5rYjfkwVi7fSDdNUgE-loL7DnCz15uM39Fd2TStH_l3MNqgu17JqOzQ4mwLR9Q0K63A_f_2vn3QKAdNcHRnR5-HY2kD09HL-RpId4PGUp1yK2LgpZO_NEWbovqo7BG9mgn4XzhU1u2TQ-ahk1qaTAVxB2iJMzfYPMA3x3sgF2Q8JFzJ2o1zsBn8HP-Q0PrVZ14etgjTzkArlzZcbZJXB8rTmeMClWTDgT9y-l7_XuupdXw5tEFaSofdyqnclzfpGtu4W3-zTrGvLW-V-QLtON3C92qcU-HZBLEsijbbJfDg9IVELJIonnWl1cDobXcARKNDLLTfXqFBrelt3WNHnIDqXriOvmGn5bZcb0Ipq16u4AqcP9y2_tQ6han43kEdnN4rB0rmS0Kvpjstk_Sb2fLDnLanvEC3G8CennuxM2p6BTFNCWQMEBtNGNnAef2JHdfilEdpU0Iw6dPMGqhOsk6NvefxVYplkMTGjZFMVDUveqwFrwa3wfCVMiw9nDzN4nenASkaMv3pxaYPFS4FDhdsPMxVLWG94WTdfPc2-akBzQJPve8G_7rVv5VkmFff0Qa4wzsN_EQQKWPT3_Ch4qfMb_Xj3E4qEIdBnRevVh9VaZqBej63Ygnibrx8JiBcAHufwThJY-8%3D)

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
United States Senator - Montana

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

For America's Future, Tim Sheehy United States Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Tell Hegseth: "Cancel this reckless military “pep rally” now"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Hegseth cancel stupid, expensive and dangerous "pep rally" of top military leaders](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d38457f-e52d-44cd-bc2e-7d9c255cdf14/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34c88522-8f64-44b4-9b2a-96c816b2068a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb388bc7-9e18-4307-b168-0f3c9573885a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[,](https://default.salsalabs.org/T339be0c1-5423-4b6e-be31-de8df00a9881/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) then share with friends to help build support!)_ Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, the least qualified person in America for that role, is demanding that all top military officers come to a pep rally he is hosting to talk about being warriors or something like that. Hegseth, who apparently is not quite smart enough to realize how dangerous it is to **announce to our enemies exactly when and where all our top military leaders will be at once** , apparently planned this without actually consulting with anyone with actual military experience, and is blissfully unaware just how **disruptive and expensive it is to order them in from war zones.** It will cost a fortune, it will put these leaders in danger, and there's no damn reason for some Fox News talking head (his previous role) who presumably reeks of Axe Body spray to explain to seasoned veterans how combat works. [**Add your name, and join us in demanding that Hegseth cancel this stupid and dangerous event.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T951799a5-788f-4c82-9eec-75052c72dc8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44d5050a-0b14-49bb-8488-760edc7db7a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb14be208-e844-4568-b23a-8590e2144f5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87f77727-38ed-4279-8f8e-b34cc5cef7b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40dd393d-2e67-4b59-9317-fdb403b1da12/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Follow Us | [](https://Facebook.com/LeftAction)
---
| LeftAction
Washington, District of Columbia
info@leftaction.com
---

body:

Patriot, Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Patriot, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind — _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[**Watch Our Tribute to Charlie Here**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._ For Charlie, \- The Turning Point Action Family

body:

I usually try not to email you on the weekend, but I have an important update: We’re coming up on our end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline, but I just ran the numbers to see if we’re on track to hit our projections— _and we’re still about $4,832 short of our goal._ Republicans poured millions into PA-17 last year trying to flip this seat red. And with Chris as the ONLY Democrat defending a battleground seat in Pennsylvania, we’re gearing up for another ultra-competitive (and expensive) race next year. That’s why this goal means so much to us. Chris doesn’t take money from big corporate PACs, so we’re coming to our grassroots supporters to pull us through. [**That’s why I have to ask: will you chip in $23 (our average donation!) to help us close the gap, defend PA-17, and keep Chris fighting for Western PA in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116037851/572279065/-898016266?refcode=email_092725_eoq1&amounts=5,23,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjlhYTYwZi1hNjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MwuacfnARvaaEYNQLukS0thHBtUjlOsO6-VZytq0Po=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116037855/572279068/-898016266?refcode=email_092725_eoq1&amounts=5,23,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjlhYTYwZi1hNjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MwuacfnARvaaEYNQLukS0thHBtUjlOsO6-VZytq0Po=)

subject: From me to you

subject: Weird request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need all the help we can get...
| Hi friend, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project. I have a weird favor to ask of you:

[Will you chip in 4 quarters — _just $1_ — to our grassroots powered movement to take back the House, flip the Senate, and stop Trump in 2026? $1 will allow you to claim your Democratic Supporter Membership card & fight back against MAGA. Chip in $1 today »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94250?t=6&akid=21339%2E878179%2EmpIl8Y) | [CLAIM YOUR MEMBERSHIP: CHIP IN $1 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94250?t=7&akid=21339%2E878179%2EmpIl8Y)
---
We wouldn’t normally ask for just $1, but donations are __plunging,__ and we want to make sure that loyal Democrats like you haven’t thrown in the towel in the race to flip the House and end Trump’s MAGA trifecta.

**Democratic Supporter Memberships give us the fuel we need to ensure we can limit the damage Donald Trump gets away with** — _it’s that simple!_

[With Trump ramping up his billionaire-funded war chest, we need all the help we can get. Will you chip in just $1 to claim your 2025 Democratic Supporter Membership card so we can flip critical swing seats, take back the House, and end Trump’s trifecta? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94250?t=8&akid=21339%2E878179%2EmpIl8Y)
[CLAIM YOUR MEMBERSHIP: CHIP IN $1 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94250?t=9&akid=21339%2E878179%2EmpIl8Y)
---
Thank you SO much,

Heather G.
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21339%2E878179%2EmpIl8Y). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21339%2E878179%2EmpIl8Y).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21339%2E878179%2EmpIl8Y) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=21339%2E878179%2EmpIl8Y). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21339%2E878179%2EmpIl8Y)
---

Peter,

**Let’s cut the crap: We need to investigate Ilhan Omar’s immigration records.**

Period.

_She came here under a cloud of confusion.
Multiple names.
Shady documents.
Possible fraud.
Married her brother?
Now she’s writing laws in Congress?_

**I don’t think so.**

The establishment won’t touch this — they’re too scared of the woke mob. _I’m not._

**Minnesota has become a case study in refugee exploitation. And Omar?

She’s the political poster child for all of it.**

**I’m calling for a full investigation. And I need your help to make it happen.**

[**Let’s send the signal loud and clear: NO MORE FRAUDS. NO MORE COWARDS. NO MORE LIES.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=45a685148f4b4a0cbf67303f2ab78684&_e=4pmwEkQciSnHudw53Lpc2JSYGfI2Z7bgiLdItBU9vqQzUOVdhQ5Y7U6V85zCmzDiUtp-r6kAKzuhruen6ehzDEYtf_n25XqchHLvGVjMYnIuJm4pTPHE_YBL_ZL2EesZX3W5uBK39s72WbFqiPJAVVzpRl7aGYOAqBLg8R3j-6xe_nB7uxfu9uNfeIluWutFD-stMzpd0T2JEVJ4gTBFDqR7xs4EcyyRnFa9lfqk-jX-hTDpONLfORc2uLUHqkZaHQH-XFEk0OZcWfoseY4LMSYZuvBfUHCyU4oSHtxUXQdKuxU6ND8CP_gSRhAD-GuniQ_BWIMuMv-k6kPdGj43_gGm9swFioSbx3YbyPkNH5spDxH_xG_kWsPiJNJm9zl1bsXfA-1a-UMuxBeCLMaf-m-7oYfNWkVN7AoOw-T_Uq1TQDUrWfVT3HseN_gQ5XGlA3f2J2ZKUhs4XCjQVig4oK0p82PqBpo5bL06MCscVt7uqiSO9BEqTQQ6joDsnJTjOWZPX2-kRBc7Xk0SYaXHWe3LjcqYXoEhz3lk8Mba3ls%3D)

| [ **INVESTIGATE ILHAN OMAR** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=45a685148f4b4a0cbf67303f2ab78684&_e=4pmwEkQciSnHudw53Lpc2JSYGfI2Z7bgiLdItBU9vqQzUOVdhQ5Y7U6V85zCmzDiUtp-r6kAKzuhruen6ehzDEYtf_n25XqchHLvGVjMYnIuJm4pTPHE_YBL_ZL2EesZEBq6A3aDIX5c2DAskeH67SQtCQzrZgtFb0QBvrECuofqyhHYJGNZPbBLj54XqdAy0L9b9X_1dITSOU4SdtI_nSkqCI_jZaIBjUtqJVYRJyL3UF0VjoFGbOgtf2gj6k6JESLyF5VtMS2bsd-ITHXjt4Xd6Z7sb10VeZ6ZQUmlmVXUYIM5CnBgGB6sOuDuyYCUR44lb0RrVJ4taxZiGZF71mBpWOvtenIg7fg_IpOzOLpuTtHN9WI8djxRG5eHp7GRrHZPr8dy9AuvFdKhGaEywixh14kT7kskb-XjlKW031fRqgZDbeqyZ0pWo14aInpDrblih0YY-1fJ2QP1sMm2L5FJl8sceHvgY9tjZ9pfp5DAi8h_27jkOhCFPPP7JI7CLnBYEy7yi1gBVG8GD0W560t181T22weK1h19lXiMgYQYFbXMDh0vbZFuomqJ9AQG)

**If we ignore this,[**we lose America.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=45a685148f4b4a0cbf67303f2ab78684&_e=4pmwEkQciSnHudw53Lpc2JSYGfI2Z7bgiLdItBU9vqQzUOVdhQ5Y7U6V85zCmzDiUtp-r6kAKzuhruen6ehzDEYtf_n25XqchHLvGVjMYnIuJm4pTPHE_YBL_ZL2EesZEBq6A3aDIX5c2DAskeH67SQtCQzrZgtFb0QBvrECuofqyhHYJGNZPbBLj54XqdAywZcrMTJRR-vwCHtVru6bC8knG42Pldg5OrWEUZteFMkaUMMZLEoQ-xLgCjD6Mos9Uu2KYhrwq2yCr66v3hJUuJ3sNDZrtBn3JAnJD1bmtanGW40JYbsxfrcLlH0yHefA0y0kfcSMR6ESyq5Op5Y7gJ3SrcpEv9g_XV1CvDFq_JkV7fuo0TfZvQwM3Db2l4JsMV59qc25rs8t_Q3PJDQNTV1a9uLZbr7IFBI-IxLbu7tvoyfeg7IRsMrLZ2KPhHP4J3_gsEk2gXWE4NSI7dNQZTydGFQFPbQvm-8g87jVdwRqz1TeaPW5wAfSsepc9Wpz0icW7xvIcF6p_AdVJF4qAKSdexYHLklFydlqYE9udBrI85EqhrPy-r28x_LNxC_-) Not just to fraud, to silence. **

Let’s make some noise.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

subject: Why I’m running — and what’s at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
This fight is deeply personal for me.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2584%2E582294%2EyDpgP1)
We’re up against our biggest test yet. The end-of-quarter deadline is right around the corner, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.
This is our chance to prove that the most powerful voices in this election aren’t the right-wing billionaires, corporate special interests, or party bosses — but people like you.
If you’re with me, [**please chip in $5 now to help us reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal before our major deadline on September 30th.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250927_1_eoq?refcode=em20250927-2584&amount=5&refcode2=2584_582294_yDpgP1&akid=2584%2E582294%2EyDpgP1)
I’m running for New Hampshire’s Senate seat because I still believe in the American Dream — even if it’s never felt further away.
My family left Greece to live in Manchester over 108 years ago and built a small business that’s still at the heart of our community today. I grew up learning how hard work, small business, and believing in a better future can change lives.
But today? Working people can’t catch a break. Prices are crushing families, opportunities are shrinking, and Americans are putting their dreams on hold — or giving up on them entirely — just so they can get by.
Trump and his MAGA allies are giving tax breaks to billionaires while gutting lifelines for working people: health care, food assistance, and public education. They’re betting they can wear us down until we stop hoping, fighting, and believing in a better future.
**We can’t let that happen.** I’m in this race to prove a better future is still possible.
I’m a proud product of public education, immigrants, and a family of small business owners (_yes, my grandfather really did invent the chicken tender_).
I’m also happily married to my husband Vann, something that wasn’t even legal for most of my life. It never seemed possible, until it was. And if elected I’ll be the first out gay male Senator.
But the GOP is trying to drag us backwards. They’re targeting the LGBTQ+ community, fueling hate, and trying to turn back the clock.
It’s the same old playbook.
**They're even recycling failed candidates from the past like Scott Brown and John Sununu because they know they have nothing new to offer.**
They want to erase our progress and silence people like me. But they won’t get away with it. _Not if we fight back._
This is our chance to prove our power. Our fundraising numbers for this quarter will go public soon, and MAGA will be watching. If we fall short, they’ll flood this race with cash to flip it red.
**We’re building a grassroots movement to take back our country’s future — and we need 25,000 donors to prove we can win. Right now we’re less than 2,000 away.**
**[Will you become one of the 25,000 grassroots donors powering this movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250927_1_eoq?refcode=em20250927-2584&amount=5&refcode2=2584_582294_yDpgP1&akid=2584%2E582294%2EyDpgP1)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250927_1_eoq?amount=5&refcode=em20250927-2584&refcode2=2584_582294_yDpgP1&akid=2584%2E582294%2EyDpgP1)**
This campaign is about whether or not every American can believe in a better future for themselves and their family. That’s what’s at stake here, and that’s why I’m so thankful for your support as always.
With gratitude,
Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20250927-1&t=2&refcode2=2584_582294_yDpgP1&akid=2584%2E582294%2EyDpgP1)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=2584%2E582294%2EyDpgP1)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=2584%2E582294%2EyDpgP1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2584%2E582294%2EyDpgP1)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207mla05hr6kh9pm2vo7i351jmuhb6vt0k56e0utq9et5c5v5uscdtax3a435nqf6kkph7gq5o2pkogy3j7&__stmp=t392x0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=5am8d02cgef14ir3ez5y6hd3hfeh8evkz95b6noxt6k6kvef462618a36krjvf2o8c2nhfu3rbysl4uunxvmij75rqi7g02b29cvjepmeyftl6d716e42kbn5vimbugaxxdp6porafm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Turning Point USA.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207mla05hr6kh9pm2vo7i351jmuhb6vt0k56e0utq9et5c5v5uscdtax3a435nqf6kkph7gq5o2pkogy3j7&__stmp=t392x0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. [Unsubscribe from all communications](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207mla05hr6kh9pm2vo7i351jmuhb6vt0k56e0utq9et5c5v5uscdtax3a435nqf6kkph7gq5o2pkogy3j7&__stmp=t392x0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh).

[Privacy Policy](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=14oag80vul0gs2gvqlazjejedynjm6v1kpp4v0vkgcm54myim77s66ulgkttus46mkutn07znsa0sv2h4wu03ljpnks8vl4q61ges2mq9tmi8w5i38hby488btpvbitycp484br2inopz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t392x0&__onlt=h)

name: Costello for U.S. Senate
subject: To win in 2026 Democrats would do well to unite and support real change
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://costelloforsenate.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d37adbc910a9a40e00b14f5&id=35c9a2d671&e=5d7176e969)
| | | | | |
Friends,We continue to believe that David - given his central Maine working-class roots, bold reform ideas, and extensive senior-level government experience - is the best candidate to unseat Senator Collins in 2026 and help in mitigating the worst actions and impulses of the Trump Administration. David has laid out the most detailed and substantive reform agenda and is the only candidate for the US Senate in Maine who has managed complex, multi-million-dollar government programs and operations both in the U.S and abroad. In sum, he’s walked the walk, not just talked the talk.Check out David’s latest Op Ed below on what he believes Democrats need to do, and how critical it is for Democrats to win control of Congress in 2026. Please share this email with others and consider contributing $20, or any amount that works for you, to help in fixing our broken checks-and-balances system and ending the senseless turmoil in Washington.Thank you and best always,Team Costello
**To Win in 2026 Democrats Would Do Well to Unite and Support Real Change** While it's true that there are differences within the Democratic Party, it's wrong, as some claim, to describe the Party as part of the same “corporate apparatus” as the Republican Party. The differences between the parties -- and the core beliefs of their members -- are undeniable.Without question Democrats bear some responsibility for Washington’s failings, but it’s nothing in comparison to that of the Republican Party. For more than 30 years, The GOP has been unwilling to compromise, and has increasingly employed extreme gerrymanders, government shutdowns, debt default threats, voter suppression laws, and other means to win elections and prevent the enactment of sound, broadly popular policies and reforms. To say that Washington is broken is an understatement, and today, with President Trump and his Republican allies in power, it's only getting worse. Our values, government, and democracy are under never ending assault by the Trump Administration and GOP Congress, with little regard to the long-term impacts on our environment, economy, public health and the citizens of this country. Core American rights and governing norms are being ignored. Critical government programs, services, and protections are being dismantled. People of all ages are seeing healthcare costs skyrocket, the wage gap is ever widening, and our nation’s standing as the pillar of stability in the world is collapsing. Rule of law is being ignored, and our civil rights are being erased. Simply put, our democracy -- our way of life in America -- is being dismantled.To begin to rectify this situation, we Democrats need to win control of either the U.S. House or Senate in 2026 and then work more effectively to block the worst actions and impulses of the Trump administration and its powerful supporters. Not an easy task. To win in 2026, we Democrats would do well to nominate candidates who will listen to, support, and work on behalf of the rank-and-file members, unite the Democratic Party and appeal to like-minded independents and other voters. And while I agree with some of the other candidates on how to tackle many of our nation’s most pressing challenges, I do not believe it’s wise for Democrats to attack the Democratic Party wholesale. The vast majority of Democrats in Maine and elsewhere have labored for decades to advance sound, progressive policies and reforms that would markedly improve the lives of most Americans. But these efforts have been stymied by increasingly immovable Republicans taking advantage of our imperfect democracy and flawed political system.To really make a difference I encourage others to join me in working to substantially strengthen our democracy and governing institutions by backing a host of long-overdue reforms. We must protect election integrity; increase voter participation; ban gerrymandering; expand clean elections financing; impose reasonable term limits on federal judges (including Supreme Court justices) and legislators; require the rich to pay their fair share of taxes; expand civics education; and support journalistically ethical public media. The Republican Party of late has forgotten its civil rights roots and is moving lockstep towards a society that advocates disruption and the plundering of any semblance of economic justice. To counter that we need a Democratic Party that honors diversity of opinion, one that is based in equality and dedicated to inclusion. We need a Party built on an understanding of history, a dedication to truth, and, and a party free of the influence of monetary greed. Only then can we eliminate the excessive and corrupting influence that money, wealth, and mis-and-disinformation have over our politics and government. Only then can we ensure that all Americans, not just the wealthy, are provided with the education, job skills, healthcare, housing, retirement security, and other life-enriching opportunities to thrive. Only then can we achieve a more perfect union.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Washington is corrupt. Here’s my solution.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
FIRST: Trump’s border czar, Tom Homan, was recorded in September 2024 accepting a $50,000 bribe from undercover FBI agents after indicating he could provide them with government contracts in a second Trump administration, according to an MSNBC report [https://www.msnbc.com/msnbc/news/tom-homan-cash-contracts-trump-doj-investigation-rcna232568] .
THEN: Trump’s DOJ closed the FBI’s case against Homan, calling it a politically motivated “deep state” probe.
NOW: House and Senate Democrats are opening investigations [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/09/23/us/politics/tom-homan-democrats-investigation.html] into the Trump administration's decision to close the case, demanding that Attorney General Pam Bondi and FBI Director Kash Patel turn over all materials related to the case.
https://x.com/bresreports/status/1969518736005874106?s=46 [https://x.com/bresreports/status/1969518736005874106?s=46]
This is the kind of corruption that has eroded public trust in government. Americans want real change in Washington, and to make that happen, we need to strike at the root of dysfunction–Big Money and corporate lobbying.
I’ve introduced a resolution with a bold, comprehensive anti-corruption plan to ensure elected officials put people and country first by:
✅ Banning all PAC and lobbyist money from Congress
✅ Banning members of Congress and their families from trading stocks
✅ Enacting 12-year term limits for members of Congress and 18-year term limits for Supreme Court Justices
✅ Instituting a binding code of ethics for Supreme Court justices
Sign if you agree: It’s time to reform Washington. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/political-reform-platform-petition?contactdata=+pfChIBK1rucqgXjRPEQmae/CHQ5aEnttcmQsHka98HbrT08eZNCaDL8z74QV9rTrVZdVwIsAY1iSdmGIGqcAkKPCmq8bPp/9/WDDHs5JzHLE4sBwdSttZcWGjcUY17v0BvyGoMLZBlSQmeYB6NcspNlAlTRCBAr38OObyjjgDEdZ89cyZTffGisnE2D7x7r]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/political-reform-platform-petition?contactdata=+pfChIBK1rucqgXjRPEQmae/CHQ5aEnttcmQsHka98HbrT08eZNCaDL8z74QV9rTrVZdVwIsAY1iSdmGIGqcAkKPCmq8bPp/9/WDDHs5JzHLE4sBwdSttZcWGjcUY17v0BvyGoMLZBlSQmeYB6NcspNlAlTRCBAr38OObyjjgDEdZ89cyZTffGisnE2D7x7r]
I’m confident that Democrats can take back Congress in 2026 by running on this plan. More than that, I firmly believe that by addressing corruption on Capitol Hill, we can create a stronger democracy that works for the American people, not just the rich and powerful.
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20250927-homan-anti-corruption-lift&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20250927-homan-anti-corruption-lift]
