[] This is the kind of corruption that has eroded public trust in government. Americans want real change in Washington, and to make that happen, we need to strike at the root of dysfunction–Big Money and corporate lobbying. I’ve introduced a resolution with a bold, comprehensive anti-corruption plan to ensure elected officials put people and country first by: ✅ Banning all PAC and lobbyist money from Congress ✅ Banning members of Congress and their families from trading stocks ✅ Enacting 12-year term limits for members of Congress and 18-year term limits for Supreme Court Justices ✅ Instituting a binding code of ethics for Supreme Court justices Sign if you agree: It’s time to reform Washington. [] ADD YOUR NAME [] I’m confident that Democrats can take back Congress in 2026 by running on this plan. More than that, I firmly believe that by addressing corruption on Capitol Hill, we can create a stronger democracy that works for the American people, not just the rich and powerful. Thank you for your activism and all that you do. In solidarity, Ro Wait! One more thing– Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future. If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you! DONATE $3 [] DONATE MORE [] [] [] [] [] [] [] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com] Ro for Congress P.O Box 3513 Santa Clara, CA 95051 United States Paid for by Ro for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: You deserve to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Please don't click away from this important message.

**Please don't click away from this important message.**
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act. But I am asking, humbly, for you to explain why this request is so important.
Give me just 1 minute of your morning to try.
As you know, we are just over a week before ballots drop in California. And as you read this, some polls show us under 50%, and others show us just above 50%. In other words, this will be a close election.
Republicans are spending extraordinary amounts of big money to beat us -- because they know if they win, it means total control of the House for the foreseeable future. Especially since they are adding other states to Texas that are redistricting to find Republican seats.
On our side, the overwhelming majority of donations we receive come from people giving small amounts of money. And there is no greater source of those donations than emails like this one.
Now we have some final budget decisions we're making as the month comes to a close and before voting begins. And if we don't hit our goals, we have to pull stuff out of our plan. We don't want to do that.
So that means we have to keep sending these emails in the hopes that people who really want to make sure we win can chip in what they can. And today, I am asking you to give (or give again) if you can so we can fund a program we're sure will win.
[**Can I count on you to contribute $3 or whatever it is that you can afford today to help us ensure Donald Trump can't rig the next election before the first votes are even cast. I would not ask if it wasn't necessary to fund a winning campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em25027-1&refcode2=2611_4767699_nwc8Rp&akid=2611%2E4767699%2Enwc8Rp)

We just received BIG news--your free speech is SAFE against two draconian censorship laws out of California!

The laws censor political speech and even punish people for posting a simple, funny meme and then require online platforms to censor that speech--if the government deems the content "materially deceptive." So, The Babylon Bee, along with a California lawyer and video-sharing platform Rumble, challenged the laws for violating their free speech rights--**and today, a court agreed with them.**

This is an incredible win for free speech. And it's because friends like YOU stood by The Babylon Bee and helped them fight this egregious government overreach.

But it's not the end of the story. The Babylon Bee's battle to protect humor and free speech isn't over.

Their rights--and yours--are still under threat in Hawaii, thanks to a law that goes even further than California's.

Hawaii's law threatens fines, damages, and even _jail time_ if a person posts a political meme that government officials don't like. It's all part of a growing trend of censorship. Across the country and the globe, government officials and private actors alike are cracking down on speech in cases like this.

With your help, The Babylon Bee is fighting Hawaii's law--no one should face jail time because a politician doesn't get your joke.

This victory in California is promising, but your help is needed to keep up the fight for free speech. [Your gift now will be DOUBLED—while funds last—to fuel critical cases to protect YOUR free speech against a growing censorship crisis.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/esqdfPOpTpIhtvK5Se2VM6lC8sLkqNr0q3oahRYjRIh98ONiiXl4Oi6Pe3zkLe7ezpuVVHK98r1StOmUNKS9eyp4xD0FYpFkjZ0UHHwnKLHC1jlz71Ey7nTkHL_NOYJwZ1-mT5CnTrayW6aSAoiol5kgVrXzJ7-jpHbe7spNReeZTNP9w6eFk0bpmW4_f_KtSbvZnfi_8MoUEF3TMwJhlhBvx5Gu3pFzEw86c52LeVEin2S_VVH1voH58K7v1xmwje7Ihr_1ypYcE7vQsZEhHvKK6CA8bpxtVA5IV1l_z1dFjZC4h28DOXO-4zPWahxGKOV_Vgqby6xYLdGILDGc1lpdUu438kyPF0jZ1nuUp-R3Tsqzt0c-jXpY5MIcpnKAQElOJ4dzsklCAYhXU3GpoTx38BNs09jEsjAJ4xjZpnSI-9bVzDcpzGXUidV-6K5pTJLkoUA8iz61ZJEsoS-BtkY6vMb5GdBvDwv6lJaGpwhd3viY0z4zi0W1SkaAjlKtkHZrNvmK6S-JEgfnDyp72SQ_nBkss9WlV5zMT8bLNzSM-wsNGC4TtbcLBszc-79Dog2d4r-8YmEwRk3JAQvh2faCQPxyec2-_CdvZs_CCS8FX2n4Z9tkbxcpoyJGdJOi-SznYDSYe0UBdLsCJ_ELMSO1sE-_aw1D1U0YhB7ls6D7mLAadG8upQxAulXb1yvpGhnx8FQdPBmkhhFEcJJc/3p38SuqH_-Em9cxAenSCFcTQdkZhcidK/13)

body:

name: Team KG for NY
subject: The Senate map is shifting fast.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Flipping the Senate won’t be easy, but it’s possible if we start EARLY.
Here’s the truth: The upcoming FEC deadline is when Republicans will size up Democrats’ fundraising hauls. They’ll use our numbers to determine which campaigns to flood with dark money and negative ads to try and crush Democrats in 2026. If we let them, Trump and the GOP will tilt the playing field until our democracy is unrecognizable. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Can I tell you a little more about my race in Michigan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
why I need your help

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6242?t=2&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH)
---
Null, this is a longer email than I usually send. **But before I ask you to[chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6243?t=3&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH), I'd like to tell you about my race in Michigan, why I'm running, and why I'm asking for your support.**
I'm running because I'm a lifelong Michigander who has spent my career fighting for our families, our small businesses, and our manufacturing economy. Now, I'm ready to bring this fight to the Senate at this critical moment for Michigan and the country.
**Flipping the Senate blue is Democrats' best chance of keeping the Trump administration in check – and we simply can't do that if we lose here in Michigan.
**
MAGA Republicans know this too, and that's why they're laser-focused on this race. After spending nearly $80 million here last cycle, they're gearing up to spend even more in 2026, **putting this on track to be one of the most competitive – and expensive – races in the country.**
**[That's why I urgently need your help, null.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6244?t=4&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH) My public FEC end-of-quarter deadline is coming up in just a few days, and right now, we're pacing behind where we need to be.**
This is a really important moment for our grassroots campaign – frankly, the biggest we've had so far. These quarterly fundraising numbers are a matter of public record, and this is our chance to show the strength of our movement to my opponent and his megadonors. **[I hope I can count on your support.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6244?t=5&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH)**
**The bottom line is I can't run the most competitive campaign, win this seat, and take our fight for working families to the Senate if I don't have the resources to keep up with GOP spending and fight back against their attacks.
**
**[So please, null, I have to ask: Will you rush $5 or more to help us reach our $300,000 end-of-quarter goal before the FEC deadline on Sept. 30?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6243?t=6&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6243?t=7&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6281?t=8&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6282?t=9&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6244?t=10&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH)
---
Thanks for reading to the end of this longer email, and thank you in advance for giving what you can. It means everything to have you with me in this fight.

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6291?t=11&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6292?t=12&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=13&akid=951%2E49239%2E24-wPH)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

subject: Good Fight With Swalwell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Hi Friend,

Our fights with Kash Patel are making headlines again—this time because of his viral “pep talk” note from last week’s hearing. While Patel scribbles affirmations to himself like “Good fight with Swalwell” and “Hold the line,” he’s trying to play dumb and dodge accountability. But we’re not letting him off the hook—not now, not ever.

We’re calling on Kash Patel to release the full Epstein files TODAY.

After seeing the shocking letter Donald Trump allegedly wrote to convicted sex trafficker Jeffrey Epstein, it’s absolutely imperative that the American people get the full story about the president’s ties to Epstein. This isn’t about politics—it’s about justice and transparency.

Patel keeps hiding behind empty legal excuses and court orders, but make no mistake: the truth is being buried to protect powerful friends.

This is a critical moment. We need to keep up the pressure and keep making noise. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2025-FR-September?&refcode=E15426-20250927-SwalwellvPatel-SL-GOP&amount=25]

Will you stand with us right now by pitching in?

Your support fuels this fight for truth and holds those in power accountable. Together, we can break through the cover-up and demand answers.

Thanks for standing with us,

- Team Swalwell

name: Ted Cruz
subject: We can’t let Ilhan Omar win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I believe in the fundamental rights to free speech, but that doesn’t mean private citizens can’t punish someone for comments that go beyond the pale

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz._oFa37iQmWCrPAdmUBtAWw)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, I attended Charlie Kirk's memorial service in Arizona, and I can tell you I saw a revival in faith. The entire conservative movement showed up for Charlie, and the celebration of his life was beautiful beyond words. Whether or not you were familiar with Charlie's work while he was alive, if you attended or watched his celebration of life, you'd know that Charlie didn't hate--Charlie lifted up everyone he met--and he respected his opponents. That's what made it all the more awful to listen to Ilhan Omar spew hatred and continue to sow the seeds of extremism on CNN over the weekend. **[<<WATCH HER COMMENTS HERE>>](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-rI9X83w3RJoAbKdHQPCw)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._g)** I hope you'll join me in condemning this hateful rhetoric.** ** For liberty, Sen. Ted Cruz
---
| | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
---
| | PO Box 25400
Houston, TX 77265
---
| |
---

subject: It's time to hit the reset button

body:
There’s no way around it.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250927-1&t=1&akid=2690%2E587540%2EXW1Qbz)
Peter,
I know a lot of groups are asking you for money right now, even at a time when it seems like the Democratic Party is failing to win or deliver. I know it can be frustrating if you’re chipping in, but you aren’t seeing the results you want to see.
**Here’s what’s different about Leaders We Deserve:** We are recruiting a brand new wave of young leaders to come in and fight the worst of Trump’s agenda AND show the positive, youthful, and modern direction we want for the party’s future.
Think of it this way, Peter — **_this is our chance to reset the Democratic Party._**
But there’s no way around it. We cannot do this work without grassroots support.
Unlike the other side, we don’t have a legion of corporatist billionaires ready to finance our efforts. There is no one waiting in the wings with a $5 million check.
Instead, we’re building this movement with _$5, $10, and $25_ at a time. (Some folks may give more when they’re able — and at the end of the day, it all really adds up.)
That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. We need people like you — people who understand that the Democratic Party needs a reset — to join us in the fight.
**[Will you contribute $5 before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on September 30 to help us reset the Democratic Party?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250927_1_reset?refcode=em20250927-2690&amount=5&refcode2=2690_587540_XW1Qbz&akid=2690%2E587540%2EXW1Qbz)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250927_1_reset?amount=5&refcode=em20250927-2690&refcode2=2690_587540_XW1Qbz&akid=2690%2E587540%2EXW1Qbz)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250927-1&t=3&refcode2=2690_587540_XW1Qbz&akid=2690%2E587540%2EXW1Qbz)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=2690%2E587540%2EXW1Qbz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2690%2E587540%2EXW1Qbz)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Immigration
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1853%2E791427%2EHTLlqH)
Friend — I’m an immigrant. I was raised in a refugee camp half-way across the world, but I managed to come to America to find stability and opportunity.
I was welcomed with open arms into Minneapolis, a city that proves every day that immigrants make our communities stronger and our culture richer.
Now, the election of Donald Trump has made a lot of people think that maybe America is an anti-immigrant country. That people have turned their backs on our longstanding values, inscribed on the Statue of Liberty: _"Give me your tired, your poor, Your huddled masses yearning to breathe free."_
But I want you to check out this report from Gallup Polling:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250927-1-90&t=2&akid=1853%2E791427%2EHTLlqH)
Last month, 79% of Americans said immigration is a good thing for this country. And it’s a number that has remained high over the last decade.
So why did Americans elect Donald Trump, who is using ICE as a secret police force, harassing immigrant communities, disappearing people to foreign prisons, and punishing the people who did all the right things to come here legally?
Well, for too long Democrats have convinced ourselves that we have to be ashamed of our embrace of immigrants. **I think that’s completely wrong.**
While Donald Trump was scapegoating immigrants yet again in the 2024 election, some thought we should try to one-up him. Instead of offering our own positive vision of fixing our broken immigration system and uniting working Americans of all immigration statuses to fight for higher wages and a lower cost of living, Democrats were talking about funding Trump’s border wall and turning away asylum seekers.
This goes beyond immigration, and goes for every issue we care about: **When we back down, when we give up on fairness and justice to appease the far-right, we lose.**
We should stand proud and say yes, immigrants make this country great. Yes, we should be making it easier, not harder, for people to immigrate here through a sensible system and contribute to our country. No, we will not terrorize our neighbors and round up law-abiding Americans because they don’t have the right paperwork.
That’s the vision I believe in and the vision I bring to Congress every day. Because, like I said, I’ve seen firsthand how immigrants make our communities stronger and our culture richer.
As the Trump administration continues to carry out their extremist agenda of mass deportation, I will never back down from defending immigrant communities and reminding Americans that it’s not immigrants who are holding this country back — it’s the wealthy few at the very top who are trying to pit us against each other.
In solidarity,
— Ilhan Omar
_P.S. If you want to support my reelection campaign and our progressive movement to win back America’s working class, you can make a quick contribution**[at this link**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250927-1-90&t=3&akid=1853%2E791427%2EHTLlqH) or the button below. Every contribution helps, no matter the amount. Thanks!_
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250927-1-90&t=4&akid=1853%2E791427%2EHTLlqH)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=1853%2E791427%2EHTLlqH)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=1853%2E791427%2EHTLlqH)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=7&akid=1853%2E791427%2EHTLlqH)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1853_791427_HTLlqH&akid=1853%2E791427%2EHTLlqH)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

**I’m emailing you urgently because our new opponent might be ... the MyPillow guy?**
Mike Lindell – MAGA Republican, disgraced conspiracy theorist, and CEO of MyPillow – just announced that he’s “taking steps” toward running for governor of Minnesota.
**No, that isn’t a joke.** Here’s the story published in the Star Tribune. 👇
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116045702/572298909/-1992230605?refcode=photo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTgyMDU4MC1hZDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kMBLTH72H_uyupUPv0iYN321ruZ4wSzq8g7nYG1O6Fc=)

name: Tax the Rich via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Tell Congress – Tax the Rich, NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

As oligarchs gain a growing grip on our democracy and Elon Musk is about
to become humanity’s first TRILLIONAIRE, CEOs continue to rake in hundreds
of millions while working families struggle to get by.

This runaway corporate greed is completely out of control. And now Sen.
Bernie Sanders and Rep. Rashida Tlaib have a plan to address it: the Tax
Excessive CEO Pay Act.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34224?source=email-20250927&t=1011&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Headline: 'Corporate greed is out of control': Tlaib-Sanders Bill would
tax companies for excessive CEO pay

Their bill would force mega-corporations to pay higher taxes if their CEOs
make more than 50 times what they pay their average worker.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34224?source=email-20250927&t=1012&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]It’s long past time we fight obscene inequality in America – and this
is a first step to doing it. Add your name – demand Congress pass Bernie
and Rashida’s bill to tax the rich now!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34224?source=email-20250927&t=1013&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]ADD YOUR NAME

The grotesque gap between the ultra-rich and everyone else is growing by
the day. The CEOs of the largest low-wage corporations make more than 630
TIMES what their average workers make!

And right now, our tax dollars are helping to subsidize this excess. Our
government doles out billions in corporate tax breaks and loopholes,
letting giants like Amazon and Tesla dodge their share while public
schools crumble and Medicaid is on the chopping block.

Our Revolution has been fighting back in the halls of Congress and in the
streets. Last week, our Citizen Action Team confronted one of Trump’s
oligarchs, Peter Thiel, whose surveillance empire Trump is using to spy on
Americans every day. We’ve rallied outside Trump’s golf club and called
out his crypto grift for the world to see. We’ve held actions in the
Hamptons, right on the doorstep of billionaires trying to buy our
democracy, demanding an end to oligarch handouts.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34224?source=email-20250927&t=1014&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Headline featuring Our Revolution protesters: Protests where the ultra
rich dine and play

Bernie and Rashida’s bill is simple, bold, incredibly popular, and exactly
what America needs. It would raise an estimated $150 billion over a decade
– funding things like universal healthcare, public education, and Social
Security. But it will only pass if we show our elected officials that the
people demand REAL action to reign in corporate greed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34224?source=email-20250927&t=1015&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Add your name now to demand lawmakers support Bernie and Rashida’s plan
to Tax the Rich – then help us keep up the fight to defund the oligarchy
and create a system that puts the working class, not the billionaires,
first!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34224?source=email-20250927&t=1016&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]ADD YOUR NAME

We’re not just signing a petition – we’re building a pressure campaign.
This is our moment to tell Congress: ENOUGH. It’s time to tax the rich,
defund the oligarchs, and put working families first.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20250927.CceSBg&t=1007&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250927.q-coSx&t=1008&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20250927.sMJ0-z&t=1009&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20250927.WMt8SW&t=1010&akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9430%2E5885482%2EtgxB_R

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Free comparison guide for Virginia Governor's Race
body:
| | | | |
---
| |
---
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| |
---
| Dear Hello Please forward this comparison guide to all of your friends and family who live in Virginia, especially those who are undecided or misinformed.
Feel free to print this off and pass out at your polling location. More voters are willing to take a comparison flyer than they are any other literature.
The choice should be clear. Vote Republican Red.
* Winsome-Earle Sears for Governor
* John Reid for Lieutenant Governor
* Jason Miyares for Attorney General
* Your Republican House of Delegates Candidate

---
| |
---
| Please vote in person before Tuesday, November 4. Polls will be open on Election Day from 6am to 7pm.
Early voting in person is already in progress at your local registrar's office along with multiple satellite locations across your county.
This will determine your quality of life for the next 4 years.
Will we be a red state or a blue state? Will we be a free state or an oppressed state? NOW is your opportunity to make a difference.
The 2024 statewide elections for Governor, Lieutenant Governor and Attorney General are currently underway. State House races and some local races are also on the ballot.
You can vote now at your registrar's office during regular business hours. Sample ballots are available online and at your local registrar's office. Please click[ here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NNlFxbRmMLIww48sL0yraiNt7B4q16YMSXxOMT2B_BqPR6eX3VQSD49uSXKId24AM85FiISX0b1FlxpfeFDSW7FCHbl66r-pFrdErS-8gBzJHrFJHFR8KqIBppdqNp5pHQ-E1_jG-2-kLXc5ufaL7fKlX1C6Mm0nf9b_9Js92U8=&c=R-2R7BT_L7D3ypopHjMYz_3u7hvo4oHASDrkjZ9nB56siNvKVvGiuw==&ch=j-qhL0_9exxJTXe90gBmyn0n6OQaAp28vt6FiQSTuHAnMeJ-eX0hiQ==) for more information on voting.
If you've found this comparison guide helpful, please chip in any amount to keep this free publication going.
Thank you.
---

| For God and Country, Amanda Chase Virginia's Honey Badger Virginia Senator 2016-2023

| ELECTION DAY Tuesday, November 4 from 6am to 7pm
2026 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES

|

Polls will be open on Election Day from 6am to 7pm. Early voting in person is already in progress at your local registrar's office along with multiple satellite locations across your county. This will determine your quality of life for the next 4 years. Will we be a red state or a blue state? Will we be a free state or an oppressed state? NOW is your opportunity to make a difference. The 2024 statewide elections for Governor, Lieutenant Governor and Attorney General are currently underway. State House races and some local races are also on the ballot. body:

Good morning! We’ll get right to it:

$5 because Trump has already rolled back critical federal gun safety measures. He dissolved the federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention and even dismantled a federal school safety board he created himself after the tragic Parkland massacre.

Our gun safety movement is at a crossroads, and we need you with us to defend our hard-earned progress from MAGA extremism.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: National Public Lands Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
I wanted to leave you with a cautionary message to mark the day. It’s not too long, so please take a moment to read it through!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116045901/572299260/-8077494?refcode=email_092725_publiclandsday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmI3NWM3OS1hZDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuOjgAGmpaWIuLNSmktv3mwLqmn27WHDAd8_T7IPwGw=) Happy National Public Lands Day, folks! John Hickenlooper here, and I wanted to leave you with a cautionary message to mark the day. It’s not too long, so please take a moment to read it through! Listen, you probably already know this, but Colorado’s public lands are a big part of what makes our state so special. It’s no secret that outdoor recreation drives our economy, sustains our lifestyle, and provides countless chances to enjoy our state’s natural beauty. From Rocky Mountain National Park to the White River National Forest, we are all stewards of these incredible places, and that means all of us are responsible for protecting these national treasures for future generations. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116045903/572299262/-8077494?refcode=email_092725_publiclandsday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmI3NWM3OS1hZDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuOjgAGmpaWIuLNSmktv3mwLqmn27WHDAd8_T7IPwGw=) But unfortunately, not all politicians in Washington see our public lands the same way. Some Republican lawmakers have tried time after time to carve up our land for private development or auction it off to the highest bidder. Most even deny the scientific reality of climate change and vote _against_ critical protections for the environment. That’s not just a threat to our natural habitats — selling out our environment hurts rural communities, our recreational economy, and _everyone_ who calls the great state of Colorado home. We’ve fought off their attacks on our public lands before, so I promise you this: **I will never, EVER back down from defending ALL of our public lands — _whether here in Colorado or anywhere in the nation._** **[So if you share the same appreciation for our national parks and forests as I do, I hope you’ll take a moment and throw a couple bucks our way. We’re facing a tough FEC deadline in just a few days, so anything you can spare will help us meet our fundraising goals and keep pushing forward to protect the great outdoors from GOP attacks →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116045907/572299266/-984874665?refcode=email_092725_publiclandsday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmI3NWM3OS1hZDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuOjgAGmpaWIuLNSmktv3mwLqmn27WHDAd8_T7IPwGw=)** | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116045911/572299272/-984874665?refcode=email_092725_publiclandsday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmI3NWM3OS1hZDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuOjgAGmpaWIuLNSmktv3mwLqmn27WHDAd8_T7IPwGw=)
---
Thanks,
John
| Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://action.hickenlooper.com/p/cTrdfv93Ski9KUzCx_WudA2?unsubscribedata=qpGs5CpbAoJSAlKpgqN1PqXHPdamei8KZIcXdpv5KLU6TXmq4GKOrvaAsoD1uuITs74lgR6YRtcFFUlaZf8mORuKKB5SK00lD458Uo0svoD72xQ61VEw1zlxO1rBqYZIZmKWlw%2BgZk%2BiWr2B7XNjzm%2FaRg92C4xGn3xt8nSJ%2BC%2F3hGVA3HOhV5M7FJd1nrg%2FH1SwHB46POJmIsXiTGdshPW4bdTsP8Ta6uZGASEHKhBW6PbjqMfd60yd3ZpfUqOhBiTOhZB4PXAy3V7GaQlr9uJ9YNTU0uH3LgIKdvCvG9zCB6PsWedfMlYUyfvbI7glQ6zI%2BGm4phZVsmen10tuMahSD0yXq3W4gZpgcC5TWFjpV%2FSMH8kSXV3H9c2rj5YscAfgXGifwKYZUI7vhlb1oqAoc96fdHUTH48qN%2F%2Fd2Kc%3D).

name: Mark Kelly
subject: It isn’t easy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Back when I first decided to run for U.S. Senate, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. I knew there’d be a ton of travel, events, time spent on the phone, time away from my family.
#

Friend —
Back when I first decided to run for U.S. Senate, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. I knew there’d be a ton of travel, events, time spent on the phone, and time away from my family.
You have to face millions and millions of dollars in attack ads during the campaign, and square off against corporate special interests and the wealthy and powerful when you’re in office.
You have to watch the president and his supporters attack you and try to convince the country you’re some kind of terrible person, or even a traitor to the country you served your whole life.
And you have to hope that millions of people you might never meet will see all of that and still have your back.
That’s why your support means so much to me. And it’s why I tell you so often that I can’t do this without you. Contributions of $5 or $10 from grassroots supporters are by far the largest source of donations we have.
None of this happens without you. It really means a lot to me. And it’s why I’m coming around to this request:
[**Please, can you make a donation of $3 before my official FEC reporting deadline at the end of the month? I’ve got to report my fundraising numbers publicly, and a ton of people will be watching.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept25/.-bETEu&refcode=em250927-1-800k&t=1&akid=6198%2E6688874%2EIem7V4)

clean_body: Back when I first decided to run for U.S. Senate, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. I knew there’d be a ton of travel, events, time spent on the phone, time away from my family. Friend — Back when I first decided to run for U.S. Senate, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. I knew there’d be a ton of travel, events, time spent on the phone, and time away from my family. You have to face millions and millions of dollars in attack ads during the campaign, and square off against corporate special interests and the wealthy and powerful when you’re in office. You have to watch the president and his supporters attack you and try to convince the country you’re some kind of terrible person, or even a traitor to the country you served your whole life. And you have to hope that millions of people you might never meet will see all of that and still have your back. That’s why your support means so much to me. And it’s why I tell you so often that I can’t do this without you. Contributions of $5 or $10 from grassroots supporters are by far the largest source of donations we have. None of this happens without you. It really means a lot to me. ### Trump's speech at the United Nations was another nail in the coffin of global governance.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)

Two years ago I wrote an article entitled, ["Global Multilateralism is Dead."](https://substack.com/redirect/870740f2-d593-4e46-ba09-15ccc79f1d4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) The piece generated a lot of feedback, most of which was negative. Former colleagues from academia reached out to suggest my views were not helpful and global organizations stopped inviting me to speak at their gatherings. But the years since I penned the piece have delivered plenty of evidence that the arc of history is bending away from global multilateralism.
* * *
## [Global Multilateralism Is Dead](https://substack.com/redirect/0ca85de0-2c07-4c41-a801-9b08fc63ff81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| July 24, 2023
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0ca85de0-2c07-4c41-a801-9b08fc63ff81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Conventional wisdom and Western policies long believed that an economically prosperous China would ultimately become more democratic. For better or worse, the opposite has happened. China is today fa...](https://substack.com/redirect/0ca85de0-2c07-4c41-a801-9b08fc63ff81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/0ca85de0-2c07-4c41-a801-9b08fc63ff81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
My thesis, as written in 2023, was that the West encouraged and welcomed China into the governing structures of an interconnected global world in the hopes the Middle Kingdom might reform. Surely, it was believed, a rich China would turn towards democracy as its citizenry would demand freedoms and liberty. A more democratic China wouldn't be very belligerent and it would then work to retain the global governance structures.
Instead, China hijacked those very institutions and has corrupted them with illiberalism. The Chinese were brought into the World Trade Organization with the understanding that they would reduce tariffs and open up their economy to trade; instead, the Chinese continued to steal intellectual property and unfairly subsidize goods and services to create unfair competitive advantages. China's middle class grew and prospered as America's middle class struggled amidst stagnation. In fact, one might reasonably argue that Trump was elected by America's working class that suffered at the hands of unfair trade.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..VOYs6zz0N_mFm_j3KtvfjGCJrJxbGvWRZnG2odNfMIU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=174660108)
What about human rights? The UN Human Rights Council's membership currently includes Afghanistan, Russia, China, Cuba, Somalia, and Sudan...hardly beacons of freedom, liberty and respect for individual rights. It has proven impossible for the United Nations to call out China on its ongoing genocide of Muslims in Western China precisely because China has hijacked the institution.
And the World Health Organization's utter failure in the face of COVID - including promoting and defending China's response - completely destroyed its reputation and undermined faith in its neutrality. If the multilateral organization in charge of tracking global health concerns is not able or willing to investigate the origins of the most disruptive and far reaching health emergency in a century, then of what use is the organization?
If multilateralism was on life support, President Trump pulled the plug this week when addressing the United Nations General Assembly. Beset with technical difficulties--the escalator, teleprompter, and sound system mysteriously glitched--Trump [said](https://substack.com/redirect/57e31a15-12dc-43b8-ab33-6f37cb928f8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the UN was ineffective and full of "empty words," [accused](https://substack.com/redirect/a3c03618-e675-4e71-8b96-ead05cb0d08b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) leaders of letting their countries "go to hell" with open border policies, and [called](https://substack.com/redirect/5a88a660-0f47-4c81-8c51-f276106f4a60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) climate change the "greatest con job."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f0cf64c0-cb0b-4b9c-93ec-4772558b756c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Rhetoric aside, I found it hard to disagree with the underlying message Trump delivered: What's the point of the UN if it doesn't really do anything? Or for that matter, what's the point of pretending that global governance can do anything? I've discussed these topics (as well as Trump's speech) with Democrats, Republicans, and Independents. And while many take issue with the messenger's style, few disagree with the message. **Has the UN outlived its useful life?**
I'm not suggesting that cooperation and alliances will disappear, but rather that the US-China strategic competition has split the world into two ecosystems, and as the geopolitical and governance implications of this split become increasingly obvious, it is virtually impossible to imagine effective structures that could cross these systems. Global multilateral governance is dead.
| | POLL
---
What do you think is the outlook for global multilateral organizations like the UN?

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD >From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/61e49189-4f1f-49f8-b43d-75241a103ca1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/3f56e0b7-07ec-4159-a6ec-f5b6400d87d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/8f26b695-ac0e-4f99-8523-386c320cf4e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. name: Wesley Bell (personal)
subject: Just had an interesting phone call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

I just got off the phone with my finance team, and I have two quick updates.

First, the good news: Because of overwhelming grassroots support, we are on track to hit our $25,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal. This is huge, and it means our movement is strong despite everything national Republicans are throwing at us.

But here's the bad news: We are still short of where we need to be, and we only have until midnight Tuesday to close the gap before the FEC deadline.

Peter, when I first decided to run for office, it was because I believed regular people deserved a fair shot, not just the wealthy and well-connected, and that hasn't changed.

But right now, national Republicans — including Donald Trump — are doing everything they can to rewrite the rules, weaken our democracy and our voices in Missouri, and hold onto their power. That's why every single deadline our campaign sets is so critical.

Can you chip in whatever you can today to help us close the gap? >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bell-2025-q3-email &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116046157/572300389/554393595?refcode=em25_250927_eoq3_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250927_eoq3_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=ef810474-ae9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWY4MTA0NzQtYWU5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=banrhQy04lp-PyPHnTdR2jufgF_0wRZMutXu1x5zQoc=)

Wesley

clean_body: The Kochs will stop at nothing... | | | Friend — Koch-backed Americans for Prosperity has already dumped $68,000+ into this race to elect Ian Lovejoy. And it won’t stop there. Why? AFP knows our seat could decide control of the Virginia House of Delegates . they can hold it, and flip one other seat, Republicans take the majority and roll back everything we’ve fought for — from reproductive rights to public education to workers’ protections. Here’s the thing: We can’t match the Koch network dollar for dollar. But we can beat them the way we always do: with grassroots support from working people like you. Mom, social worker, and union leader Elizabeth Guzman needs your help to flip VA-HD22 and deliver Trump Republicans a huge defeat ... and Election Day is just WEEKS away. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. This isn’t just about one race — it’s about showing the Koch machine that Americans can’t be bought. We can’t let dark money decide this race. Together, we can prove that people power beats dark money every single time. With gratitude, Team Guzman** | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Friend,

I know you’re receiving a lot of messages from candidates like me about the upcoming FEC deadline. I’m getting them too.

**I want to be open and honest with you: I’m not going to tell you that the sky is falling. Our campaign will not fail if you decide not to donate today.**

I would much rather focus on delivering in Congress for IL-13 instead of asking supporters like you for your hard-earned dollars. As I listen to folks across the district, many are worried about the future of their health care, rising costs, and the chaos in Washington.

Making a difference for working families is exactly why I got in this fight. It’s why I helped pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, it’s why I decided to run for Congress, and it’s why I’m not backing down from the Trump Administration.

I’m always fighting for you. Despite the challenges of a GOP majority in the House, I’ve found a way to get results – from legislation to protect our veterans, to securing education funding, and saving jobs in Granite City from being outsourced.

**[It’s because of the importance of this work that I ask you to chip in $3 to keep me in Congress. We’re facing tough political headwinds, and any amount will move us closer to our end-of-quarter goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116049190/572309344/-550958566?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjJlZmFhNC1iMjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OFzkS-YLerw39O2J6upvsCTXdAmGcBbFrZ-jR5PIgW8=)**

I want to be open and honest with you: I’m not going to tell you that the sky is falling. Our campaign will not fail if you decide not to donate today. I would much rather focus on delivering in Congress for IL-13 instead of asking supporters like you for your hard-earned dollars. As I listen to folks across the district, many are worried about the future of their health care, rising costs, and the chaos in Washington. Making a difference for working families is exactly why I got in this fight. name: Brad Finstad
subject: No More Free Rides for Fraudsters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, This week, I introduced the**Fraud Accountability and Recovery Act (FAR Act)** — because hardworking Americans should never have to foot the bill for criminals who defraud federal programs and then hide behind foreign borders. Right here in Minnesota, the **Feeding Our Future scandal** stole over **$250 million** from programs meant to feed hungry children... the largest COVID-19 fraud case in the nation. To make matters worse, millions of those dollars were sent overseas, and today the U.S. government has no way to get them back. That’s outrageous. _And I refuse to let it stand._ The FAR Act is simple: **if a foreign government harbors fraudsters who rip off U.S. taxpayers or refuses to return stolen funds, they shouldn’t see a dime of U.S. aid.** This is about **accountability**. It’s about **protecting your hard-earned tax dollars**. And it’s about **sending a clear message** : if you steal from U.S. taxpayers, you cannot escape accountability by moving money or yourself overseas. I can’t do this alone. Washington insiders and entrenched interests won’t make this easy. That’s why I need you standing with me today. [**Donate $25, $50, or $100 right now**](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d) to help me keep fighting fraud, protecting taxpayers, and making sure government works for you — not the criminals.
---
| | [Stand With Me](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| Together, we can hold the line for accountability and make sure your tax dollars are never treated like a slush fund for fraud. Thank you for your support, **Brad Finstad** [**P.S. Every dollar you give today strengthens our fight to protect taxpayers and hold fraudsters accountable. Please chip in whatever you can. Even $10 makes a difference.**](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)

name: =?utf-8?Q?So_it_begins=E2=80=A6?=
subject: MAGA just opened the gates of hell in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
We are 38 days out from this election and MAGA has already been spending millions on TV buys, canvassing, and mail. And the millions they’ve spent so far
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W_-hgGIkV3KyETw6LQVxcqBFk3479oIDSur5yMk42mOlCJdodxtx64M0h--J-T5avNYGqIztYRGvij-giiraFtdGmmsBSRYjO90WOUS8Ao7DWMNKW4Sk5sHCbCfTAs7I-dpbl2uTjF5KoA65T9ALThfNLXk4T6_zpeJaevzMI0A1GW4NkgCv81RoIyWY76v3RgwfxqZgjdjxyay72o7UEG8U1ILQRFe7wFUXEO16Jvc=&c=Le8CTusl5i2Bdwia3ZCRbbMKG8zLyLBDz7ttHYcqiGrAPuKXIB7Guw==&ch=QNTbFaZnxgyUD-8u1V3CI_ittArsuXMXToYpUgyhDoqGRCdOgb8ESg==)
---
| Peter,
All summer, we warned about this, now what we feared is coming to fruition.
While Democrats have been asleep at the wheel, MAGA has been laser-focused on the November 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election. An obscure race which, if Democrats lose, will ensure that we never hold power here again - Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes, gone for good.
Now MAGA is opening up the gates of hell in the lead-up to election day.
---

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Here’s what a well-timed donation can do:
body:
---
Derek, We know your inbox is probably stuffed with fundraising requests, but we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why a well-timed donation to the Democratic National Committee is the best choice if you’re looking to make a difference right now. **Voters are beginning to cast ballots in states like Virginia, and we’re running out of time to reach those who may still be undecided.**[**We’ll explain more about what our strategy looks like in a second, but if you’re ready to donate to the DNC now, you can do that at this link.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250927_4662_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4662_22930333_hURs8T&akid=4662%2E22930333%2EhURs8T) Here’s the truth: _Everything_ we do right now makes a difference in whether or not we can reach our goals — not just to win elections this year, but to flip Congress and elect leaders who will check Trump’s power at every level. That work takes a HUGE number of resources — resources we need to gather _now_. So far this year...
* Democrats have won or overperformed the top of the 2024 ticket in 45 out of 46 key elections.
* The DNC has continued to make investments in every single state Democratic Party to ensure they have the resources to elect local and state-level leaders.
* We’ve made seven-figure investments in Virginia and New Jersey ahead of this year’s statewide elections.
* We deployed tens of thousands of volunteers over the summer nationwide to activate, mobilize, and prepare voters to engage in their next elections, and we’re continuing to build on that momentum this fall.

**This work has only been possible this year because we’ve been cultivating resources early.** Grassroots supporters are the backbone of our work, getting Democrats elected up and down the ballot and pushing back against Trump and Republicans across the country. [**So, Derek, can Democrats everywhere count on you to make a well-timed $10 donation to the DNC today? We’ll put every dollar to work building the resources we’ll need to elect Democrats this year and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250927_4662_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4662_22930333_hURs8T&akid=4662%2E22930333%2EhURs8T) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250927_4662_fr&refcode2=4662_22930333_hURs8T&akid=4662%2E22930333%2EhURs8T)**

This is important. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116052870/572319874/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_EOQ1_092725&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDk5MmVhMmEtYjQ5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xdJQ520MjNrr5vLFJSMAJ2-WRwjMEH9w2ertowoHn4U=&emci=06720496-209b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d992ea2a-b49b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=32374386)

This is important, Peter. If you don’t know me yet, my name is Jose Javier Rodriguez and I'm a workers' rights lawyer and former state senator running for Florida Attorney General to replace James Uthmeier. My opponent, James Uthmeier, is a corrupt politician who bends the knee to Trump and wastes millions of our taxpayer money on political stunts like Alligator Alcatraz. **Tuesday is our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.** Political groups and our opponent will be watching closely to see the strength of our campaign. If we show momentum now, we prove this race is winnable — and that we can restore integrity to Florida’s top law enforcement office. The truth is, Uthmeier has Trump, DeSantis, and big special interests bankrolling his campaign. I’m building mine with janitors, teachers, security guards, construction workers, and everyday working families who are sick of corruption and rising costs. That’s why I need your help, Peter. **[We set a goal of 3,000 grassroots donations before September 30th. Can I count on you to chip in $25 or whatever you can afford to help us meet our goal, power this campaign forward, and win this fight?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116052874/572319876/1963674758?amount=5&refcode=em_JJR_FR_EOQ1_092725&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDk5MmVhMmEtYjQ5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xdJQ520MjNrr5vLFJSMAJ2-WRwjMEH9w2ertowoHn4U=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116052877/572319878/1963674758?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_JJR_FR_EOQ1_092725&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDk5MmVhMmEtYjQ5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xdJQ520MjNrr5vLFJSMAJ2-WRwjMEH9w2ertowoHn4U=) **

If you don’t know me yet, my name is Jose Javier Rodriguez and I'm a workers' rights lawyer and former state senator running for Florida Attorney General to replace James Uthmeier. My opponent, James Uthmeier, is a corrupt politician who bends the knee to Trump and wastes millions of our taxpayer money on political stunts like Alligator Alcatraz. Tuesday is our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Political groups and our opponent will be watching closely to see the strength of our campaign. If we show momentum now, we prove this race is winnable — and that we can restore integrity to Florida’s top law enforcement office. The truth is, Uthmeier has Trump, DeSantis, and big special interests bankrolling his campaign. I’m building mine with janitors, teachers, security guards, construction workers, and everyday working families who are sick of corruption and rising costs. In 2021, I narrowly won Georgia’s Senate runoff by a margin of just 1.2% , making history securing the Senate majority alongside Reverend Warnock. But that victory didn’t happen by chance. It happened because of grassroots supporters like you who stood up, organized, and helped build one of the most powerful movements in Georgia’s history. Now, we’re facing another defining moment. Donald Trump is back in power — and Georgia Republicans are working overtime to protect his interests and those of their wealthy donors, not the people they were elected to serve. Defeating MAGA extremism here in Georgia has never been more important. Because keeping this Senate seat blue — and flipping key seats up and down the ballot — will be crucial to putting a check on Trump’s power in the years ahead. Now, we must win again. I know you're likely getting a ton of emails from candidates and causes right now, folks. **But I have to ask:**[**Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $20 between No Dem Left Behind**** and my**** __****Senate campaign in Ohio****ahead of o****ur first end-of-quarter FEC deadline****?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsod_HIntMODa7bxSw4HV0u1dNYKADQeIwO4hLWKg-b4PI2AnDjwLIplJ4s7AWtWghPV0cRt7OMFsCoBTZalfREFNYQ11psXdxcGvMTL_RKmW2L9GsJ2NoHxLwNvpAX_3tpvmuWS5Hr19t5ywWKFEqzt_KeffOz7LC7gJXpUDL3qhd2IKK9RK0NWdU2BQgNrvtS_Z8d-EbxIEs23-awKyOXmIcIzq7fvYgfV4m-6RkhPkJRM_YV5pbBeDaVXQzSOyADEaBxfv5nQOmGVw0Gpf7W3kmh9JSIHI4K1DiWEfwKlLvW_pAGe77FkNOwbUk7CD1B5iJTZqUEHxm_HI_6ciHQ8Tx3mtpkB3hlRp3bNKXKMMn8uE6EOCJW3QGC6nBTHPQxfYQfSPGZCdDCDV2HKTTIIEVJbtXgAecWrFvPyVtQUg/4k9/QZJfEPjbTqy_G06u_RgeHQ/h1/h001.idb95t1rhFOxmWEf0HCSH4BpLVnDhuy_dEXO-8KiHew) What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at _The Cook Political Report_ increased our odds of winning? What if I told you that _CNN_ and _The New York Times_ report that Ohio is "in play" - but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me? What if I told you that misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves - and that whether we're able to counter these smears and reach voters with the truth depends on people like you? **This grassroots, small-dollar donor movement is our best chance to flip Ohio 's Senate seat. But I have to ask: What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at The Cook Political Report increased our odds of winning? What if I told you that CNN and The New York Times report that Ohio is "in play" - but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me? What if I told you that misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves - and that whether we're able to counter these smears and reach voters with the truth depends on people like you? This grassroots, small-dollar donor movement is our best chance to flip Ohio 's Senate seat. But we're facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to win. subject: National Republicans are recruiting John E. Sununu to run against Chris.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I’ve had the privilege of serving alongside Chris Pappas for years.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116053872/572322779/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.27_Chris-Pappas-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWQ4YmQ5YS1iNTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYFgNa4XpfvEyZYuBExmYdWlqdNZn2AqbGtD2-_0YQ8=) Senator Maggie Hassan here.

I’ve had the privilege of serving alongside Chris Pappas for years. I know firsthand how deeply he cares about New Hampshire — and how hard he works to make government work for the people it serves.

Chris has fought to lower the cost of prescription drugs, expand access to health care for our veterans, and protect reproductive freedom. He has never lost sight of our Granite State values: listening, working hard, and putting people before politics. That’s why I’m so proud to support Chris for the United States Senate.

Let’s be clear: Republicans see New Hampshire as one of their best chances to flip a Democratic seat. If they succeed, our path to taking back the Senate majority becomes almost impossible. **They’re even recruiting John E. Sununu — New Hampshire’s former ultra-conservative U.S. Senator — to run against Chris.**

We cannot let that happen.

Chris has beaten the odds before — _in one of the toughest congressional districts in the country_ — but this will be his toughest race yet.

He’s up against a flood of outside money. The only way Chris wins is if we stand together and fuel this campaign with grassroots support.

[**_So I’m asking: Will you split a contribution of $10 or more today between me and Chris to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue? clean_body: I’ve had the privilege of serving alongside Chris Pappas for years. = Senator Maggie Hassan here. I’ve had the privilege of serving alongside Chris Pappas for years. I know firsthand how deeply he cares about New Hampshire — and how hard he works to make government work for the people it serves. Chris has fought to lower the cost of prescription drugs, expand access to health care for our veterans, and protect reproductive freedom. He has never lost sight of our Granite State values: listening, working hard, and putting people before politics. That’s why I’m so proud to support Chris for the United States Senate. Let’s be clear: Republicans see New Hampshire as one of their best chances to flip a Democratic seat. If they succeed, our path to taking back the Senate majority becomes almost impossible. They’re even recruiting John E. Sununu — New Hampshire’s former ultra-conservative U.S. Senator — to run against Chris. We cannot let that happen. Chris has beaten the odds before — in one of the toughest congressional districts in the country — but this will be his toughest race yet. He’s up against a flood of outside money. The only way Chris wins is if we stand together and fuel this campaign with grassroots support. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I know Chris. I trust Chris. And I couldn’t be prouder to support him in this fight for our future. Peter,
We wanted to make sure you saw Keith’s email yesterday because we’re running out of time to reach our end-of-quarter goal.
As the People’s Lawyer, Keith works around the clock to defend our rights. He didn’t run for office to sue Donald Trump — but when the Trump administration unlawfully demands personal information about Minnesotans, cuts critical funding, or dismantles programs millions of people rely on, Keith will do whatever it takes to stop them.
Keith always has our back. Now he needs you in his corner.
According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can give $75 (or $150 for couples) to support our campaign and receive a full refund from the state.

Team Keith

Peter,
My team just checked in with me and let me know where we’re at on reaching our end-of-quarter goal. We’re still $14,695 short of our $30,000 target, and we only have a few days to catch up.

As the People’s Lawyer, Keith works around the clock to defend our rights. He didn’t run for office to sue Donald Trump — but when the Trump administration unlawfully demands personal information about Minnesotans, cuts critical funding, or dismantles programs millions of people rely on, Keith will do whatever it takes to stop them. Keith always has our back. Now he needs you in his corner. According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. We’re still $14,695 short of our $30,000 target, and we only have a few days to catch up. I’m using every tool at my disposal to fight for Minnesotans, hold corporations accountable, and stop the Trump administration’s unlawful attacks on our rights and the programs we rely on. body:
Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XrGKMtCcbE2djJaqLq6C9g2?unsubscribedata=ZxvxfYbnhtM8dEO57dy9U7voMPqYv1OwMvuubGjBBDNFj%2FitCkFVGd9gUqzlI4bftDqW%2B%2FR1L5Y6fMfNawytcJv8ydPYLkGea%2FwrmVJt4UCrdlnrX6k2ugzUPdvQXtTwNaWoU4Vobq3oNPOYyCznDvMehfBkILCO%2BwFrvkULLz6xLcEMZciKKhWOPrUyluakdjV%2FMTBgC%2B8JgPE9yuJh4cJG%2FoCctXJVJrVZ1qQpOm71uvQU2BGl7KfXFyOiDV5%2Bo5DySSx%2FKXIydlvtswZjkGFAfBuQ%2BtBj7GFBMKrdD3IkMKdWIMfAFYYvH1gNrpmiTzJbwcm0%2BlQEPQ8RZ%2BdzjY9m0OZJph5excowSmJQPWu3ATXbbZncnuoEAQPk4pQfW7Fn6TqfmrIs4p37WZlK9m%2B3yIhvuj19QfK3pjGcFvTIvW2ZMUWODX2nTqRBSoTz)

| | Hi Peter, it's Austin Davis here. Every day, I do my best to remain kind and positive, remembering that the people of the Commonwealth are counting on me and my team to speak up for them. But I won't sugarcoat things: We are in incredibly uncertain times right now. However, one thing I do know for certain is that I'm proud of the work I'm doing. In my position as Lieutenant Governor, I've been fortunate enough to work across the aisle every day to deliver tangible results, from funding for after-school programs to helping make public transit safer, and more. I'm proud to fight for all of us. Now more than ever, it's important to remember that as a public servant, I work in a government for the people, of the people, by the people. Everyone deserves compassion, respect, and a shot at success. clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, it's Austin Davis here. Every day, I do my best to remain kind and positive, remembering that the people of the Commonwealth are counting on me and my team to speak up for them. But I won't sugarcoat things: We are in incredibly uncertain times right now. However, one thing I do know for certain is that I'm proud of the work I'm doing. In my position as Lieutenant Governor, I've been fortunate enough to work across the aisle every day to deliver tangible results, from funding for after-school programs to helping make public transit safer, and more. I'm proud to fight for all of us. Now more than ever, it's important to remember that as a public servant, I work in a government for the people, of the people, by the people. Everyone deserves compassion, respect, and a shot at success. My team and I are up against our final deadline of the quarter, and while we're working around the clock to protect our state from this federal chaos, we also have to fundraise for my re-election campaign. = | **If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** Thank you, Peter, Lt. clean_body: Stop stonewalling. Say no to a shutdown. | ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH DEMOCRATS AGAINST A GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN Did you see this, Peter? CNN is reporting that despite a looming federal government shutdown, Trump just canceled a meeting with Democrats to work out a funding plan — even though the deadline is just three days away. Trump’s tantrum will have real consequences for everyday Americans, including: Millions of federal sector employees — their ranks already decimated and under pressure after senseless DOGE firing-and-rehiring sprees — will go without a paycheck Social Security payments could face slowdowns National parks will close Democrats have proposed a funding package to address some of the worst harms from Trump’s Big Ugly Bill and fix issues that are top of mind for most voters, like health care costs. But instead of putting the American people first and negotiating in good faith, Trump and his fellow Republicans are dragging their feet. This behavior is selfish, it’s short-sighted, and it’s a waste of taxpayers’ time. Onward, Unite the Country | Unite the Country is dedicated to electing Democrats who support common sense policies, champion middle class values and are willing to engage Americans regardless of where they live — but we can’t do it without you! At this critical moment in American history, we’re calling on you to join Unite the Country in this fight. = = = Follow along: | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. As we continue pushing back against threats to free and fair elections, we’re counting on grassroots supporters to keep powering this work. **That’s why we’re looking for just nine donations from your area by midnight, and we’re hoping you will be one of those people who chips in. **

name: Janelle Stelson
subject: It's time for real change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson
body:
I have reported on the failures of the healthcare system for years, and in my own life, I received a diabetes diagnosis last month.

Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/57CdP-wFgkuQm58EpOgxvQ2?unsubscribedata=ZoEYsBd2o2BdcqzCwj8mL3c%2B9WVXvMoBXPU2yy%2FPGC24Jvdhcbpe3pW3oZkNH6brGJlCxbU84k71FJVTDLdWpD0WSfr2h27aikngsdgM6m6wyNROFhtVh4ISmiUdvH8t9mWkh%2BQ4iZ9mAtKrGPSHMPsI7YFQlKF0TM4Ac6MEOYH8U1LtVQcP7Vxj%2Bapmjfr0eA1sXDiAd7meDXvETKVIkGNQGqHnl1B%2F2cqtyryUKc1cQxcSCRg0gSmrSR1lBGU%2Fo3UI41zrXwKrmt2E8pHoYHtt30b5Clp80wg0YeFWoUHesK5WunnpetiBLfdGYuDKiOE1AjaWI8WC4XgnF0CDmqMqQkfR5EjULxR5GurSCIbuZEwU7MPC6Ezh1V99k0PhxruxRRbkBbYPi5KSU0gjaxGHxbvODj%2BFpJphfpWo1ajxO9dvAyJuBVQOD5OlbeMX)
---
| |
---
Healthcare is a personal issue for everyone. We all know someone who has received a debilitating bill after an emergency visit to the doctor or had to make sacrifices to afford medication ourselves. **The broken system we are living under impacts all of us.** I have reported on the failures of the healthcare system for years, and in my own life, I received a diabetes diagnosis last month. I deeply understand all the ways our system is failing us. I will make fixing it a priority when you send me to Congress. Instead of tackling the healthcare crisis head-on like I plan to, Congressman Scott Perry voted for the most damaging Medicaid cuts in history and continues to allow premiums to rise in Pennsylvania. Now, his allies want to let A.I. determine whether or not Medicare will cover procedures ordered by your doctor. **No matter the insurance you are on, under Perry's policies, we all lose.** He has made his stance clear: tax cuts for billionaire donors come before access to affordable healthcare for our friends and family. We have the opportunity to fight back NOW and flip this seat blue. It is time for real reform in the healthcare industry, and we are not getting that from extremist Scott Perry. [**Will you chip in ahead of my team's critical FEC deadline in three days?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116054933/572325327/-315274212?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_092725_Healthcare_30DO_D1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDBlZDNkZWItYjc5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=F4cSRW67f6BLMsyP2N1OeL_dIxIoowTjAre_Ys5Sw0k=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: I have reported on the failures of the healthcare system for years, and in my own life, I received a diabetes diagnosis last month. Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Healthcare is a personal issue for everyone. We all know someone who has received a debilitating bill after an emergency visit to the doctor or had to make sacrifices to afford medication ourselves. The broken system we are living under impacts all of us. I have reported on the failures of the healthcare system for years, and in my own life, I received a diabetes diagnosis last month. I deeply understand all the ways our system is failing us. I will make fixing it a priority when you send me to Congress. Instead of tackling the healthcare crisis head-on like I plan to, Congressman Scott Perry voted for the most damaging Medicaid cuts in history and continues to allow premiums to rise in Pennsylvania. Now, his allies want to let A.I. determine whether or not Medicare will cover procedures ordered by your doctor. No matter the insurance you are on, under Perry's policies, we all lose. He has made his stance clear: tax cuts for billionaire donors come before access to affordable healthcare for our friends and family. We have the opportunity to fight back NOW and flip this seat blue. It is time for real reform in the healthcare industry, and we are not getting that from extremist Scott Perry. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. name: Team Baldwin
subject: Government should work for working people.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=4997%2E35263%2E-91g0F ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| |
| |
| “Gov. Tony Evers: One Big Beautiful Bill Act will make WI pay more, |
| receive less” |
| — September 2025 |
| |
|“We should make government work—and work better—for working people, not |
|piling onto rising costs, causing more economic uncertainty, and adding |
| more to working Wisconsin taxpayers’ tab. And Republicans certainly |
| shouldn’t be using your hard-earned tax dollars to give big tax breaks |
| to billionaires while forcing taxpayers to pay for new red-tape |
| requirements that’ll make it harder for Wisconsinites to thrive. |
| |
| This isn’t about partisanship, folks. It’s about common sense.” |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Governor Evers is right — government should work better for working
people.

But thanks to the GOP, Washington is leaving Wisconsin behind. The bill
passed by Republicans will kick 270,000 Wisconsinites off of their
BadgerCare thanks to the cuts in Medicaid and increase the price of health
care for a family of four by nearly 160%.

Rural hospitals that are a lifeline for people who are already living in
care deserts are at risk. Around 43,000 people, many of whom are children,
could lose access to food safety nets. And household energy costs could
increase by 6% — making your bills even higher.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-sep25.avzHzX&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20250927_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=4997%2E35263%2E-91g0F ]But instead of making your life easier, the GOP decided to give
billionaires a tax break. Tammy's fighting back, and her upcoming FEC
report is the best way to show she has a strong coalition of grassroots
support behind her. Pitch in today to help our September report be our
strongest yet.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e8e0cae-b83a-4183-859c-7566a7e02aa9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
