| Peter, I’m running against a Republican clown show. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56432364-3d9c-4b0a-b364-9ceaa17f266f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Your contribution today to my campaign and Blue Amp Action helps flip this district and prevent these bozos from getting anywhere near the House of Representatives.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T339502ca-3f7e-47d2-9ee5-200382a61a71/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Let’s take a look at some of my competition: Jody Barrett – said the COVID-19 vaccine is “certainly not a vaccine.” Gino Bulso – wants to make it legal for people to marry their cousins. Stuart Cooper \- former campaign chair for Mark Green, who quit his job after voting for the Big, Bullsh*t Bill Mason Foley \- wants to “finish what [Trump] started.” Jason Knight \- says he’s running because “President Trump needs reinforcements.” Joe Leurs \- wants to work with more pro-gun groups even when gun deaths are increasing in our state. Stewart Parks – was arrested for participating in the insurrection at the Capitol on January 6th. Lee Reeves – doesn’t believe undocumented immigrants should be counted as people in the census. Matt Van Epps \- endorsed by Mark Green, who voted to take healthcare away from his constituents. Tres Wittum – called for the National Guard to be deployed in Nashville. I don’t want to imagine what a future with any of these clowns in office would look like. But the good news is, we don’t have to find out. [I’m running to feed kids, fix roads, and fund hospitals – can I count on your help with a split contribution to my campaign and Blue Amp Action before our end-of-quarter deadline?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb786b0a4-ee5e-4736-a35a-828223374edd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc06727ec-cd92-4450-9a5b-1db8700b613c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Real momentum

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=746%2E181023%2EAoF64T)
Team,
Our campaign is gaining real momentum.
A recent poll shows me ahead of my well-funded opponents.
That’s great news. This is just the latest poll to show that Michiganders of all backgrounds — Democrats, Republicans, and Independents — simply want a leader who will make government work better for them. That is exactly what I’ve done throughout my career, and I’m ready to be that leader for all Michiganders.
**But here’s the deal: Being a front-runner also means I’m a target.**
In a state as competitive as Michigan, my well-funded opponents will be raking in _even more_ from dark money donors and corporate interests that want to defeat me.
So the truth is, I need your help to show the continued, growing strength of our grassroots movement. Because I’m not owned by the billionaires, I’m in this for you.
Every dollar counts in this fight, and your support today is critical in sustaining our momentum and countering the big-money influence.
**[Will you help us prepare for the attacks ahead and grow our momentum by pitching in $10 to my campaign? Together, we can bring our vision for a brighter future for all Michiganders to the governor’s mansion.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20250927_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=746%2E181023%2EAoF64T)**

Hey folks,
Yesterday's live went off-script. My guest couldn't make it, but I wasn't about to sit this one out. Truth is, I'm running on a bit on empty. It's been a relentless couple of weeks, and I know a lot of you are feeling the same way. But I went live anyway.
Here's what we got into:
* **[00:01:15]** Trump's push to indict Comey--how it's pure revenge politics and a warning shot to the rest of us
* **[00:03:36]** The right's January 6th disinformation blitz--how they're rewriting history to excuse an attempted coup
* **[00:07:00]** The Charlie Kirk fallout, Laura Loomer's attacks on my family, and what it's really like to live through this in real time
* **[00:13:39]** Pete Hegseth's secretive military meeting--why even a "pep talk" should scare the hell out of you
* **[00:26:02]** The federal leak targeting Mikie Sherrill--how Trumpworld is abusing government power to take out political enemies

**[If you're exhausted by the headlines and hungry for the truth, this conversation is for you. Endless Urgency is where we cut through the noise and talk honestly about how we win. Join our community of subscribers who aren't waiting on the sidelines--they're stepping up to make sense of the madness and take action.](https://substack.com/redirect/7b6faf39-53f2-4832-9642-460d13050753?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Team AOC
subject: A dangerous consolidation of media and news platforms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Billionaires collect government contracts and tax advantages — and then use their windfall to reshape the media map in their own image.
#
A dangerous consolidation of media and news platforms is currently taking place.
In 2022, Elon Musk purchased Twitter — now it’s riddled with disinformation, deepfakes and algorithms that push us further apart.
Larry Ellison, the world’s second richest person and an avid Trump supporter, took over Paramount and CBS. He is now reportedly looking at buying Warner Brothers, which includes CNN.
Billionaires like Ellison are enacting a right-wing takeover of news and media. The direction is unmistakable: **more power, less accountability.**
In just one day this month, Larry Ellison’s net worth jumped by roughly $100 billion on the back of blockbuster Oracle projections for its cloud infrastructure.1 Billionaires collect government contracts and tax advantages, and then use their windfall to reshape the media map to their liking.
**That’s not a marketplace — that’s an oligarchy.**
****
This right-wing takeover of media is not an aberration. It is the logical and inevitable conclusion to an American political system that has been dominated by corporate money and billionaires.
We’re not just approaching an oligarchy. We’re fully here.
But our movement for a better world takes no money from right-wing billionaires or corporations.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250927.N00VV8&refcode=em20250927-9838-P_FND_EGR_FO&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9838%2E2526796%2EFD6QcM)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250927.N00VV8&refcode=em20250927-9838-P_FND_EGR_FO&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9838%2E2526796%2EFD6QcM)**
No matter what, thank you for being here.
More soon,
Team AOC

1 - [**CNBC:** Larry Ellison is $100 billion richer after blowout Oracle earnings report](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/34858?t=21&akid=9838%2E2526796%2EFD6QcM)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250927?refcode=em20250927-9838-P_FND_EGR_FO&t=22&refcode2=9838_2526796_FD6QcM&akid=9838%2E2526796%2EFD6QcM)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250927-9838-P_FND_EGR_FO&t=23&akid=9838%2E2526796%2EFD6QcM)**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: This email is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5617%2E196590%2EcgPxgB). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5569?t=2&akid=5617%2E196590%2EcgPxgB)
---
| Normally when I write you I like it to be different from most of the political emails you get.

I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, and the surreal experience of working in the Senate at this singular and disturbing moment in American history.

This email is different. It's more direct.

I am reaching out this morning with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-quarter fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why:

Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record.

**It is not normal for the GOP to be up on the airwaves and online with this kind of attack this far out from the election. It’s because they know Georgia is key. They know I’m strong. And they need to knock me down.**

_Will we let them?_

We knew these attacks were coming. But we’re facing more outside spending, earlier than we had expected — which means we’re going to have to ramp up our fundraising in order to fight back and set the record straight.

We will fight back. And we _will win_. But I can’t do it alone.

I really need your help right now.

[_**Can I count on you to split a contribution to my reelection campaign and The Long Run PAC today before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline? Thanks in advance.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5570?t=3&akid=5617%2E196590%2EcgPxgB)
---
| [SPLIT A DONATION ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5570?t=4&akid=5617%2E196590%2EcgPxgB)
---
Thanks for being part of this team.

As always,

Jon Ossoff
* * *
| | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5571?t=6&akid=5617%2E196590%2EcgPxgB)
---

clean_body: Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record. | You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can . | Normally when I write you I like it to be different from most of the political emails you get. I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, and the surreal experience of working in the Senate at this singular and disturbing moment in American history. This email is different. It's more direct. I am reaching out this morning with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-quarter fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why: Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record. It is not normal for the GOP to be up on the airwaves and online with this kind of attack this far out from the election. It’s because they know Georgia is key. They know I’m strong. And they need to knock me down. Will we let them? We knew these attacks were coming. But we’re facing more outside spending, earlier than we had expected — which means we’re going to have to ramp up our fundraising in order to fight back and set the record straight. We will fight back. And we will win. But I can’t do it alone. I really need your help right now. | Thanks for being part of this team. As always, Jon Ossoff * | | Paid for by The Long Run PAC P.O. name: Christina Gagnier
subject: This is anything but easy
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116056419/572329643/1631137775?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDIwODIwNi1iYjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oFyW9Wf-5FxrLsKq9h3zk6R0PzGtELyzSBObqbBP5sw=)

Hi Peter,

We are running about $5,000 short of our online goal ahead of the FEC deadline. The good news is that there are still a few days to catch up before we close the books on the quarter. Will you chip in $3 or any amount to flip CA-40 blue?

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cg-q3-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116056420/572329646/1631137775?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDIwODIwNi1iYjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oFyW9Wf-5FxrLsKq9h3zk6R0PzGtELyzSBObqbBP5sw=)**

I want to be open and honest with you: This race has been anything but easy.

This district is one of just a few that have the power to decide House control. The Republican incumbent, Young Kim, is particularly vulnerable due to her blind loyalty to Trump to save herself. She’s not standing up for us, and we are paying for it every time we go to the grocery store or pay a bill.

National Republicans know this and are pouring money and attacks to keep this seat – and their fragile majority. And with redistricting officially going to a vote in November, we are facing unprecedented challenges.

I am not backing down from this fight. I have dedicated my career to defending Orange County and the Inland Empire – as a small business owner, a lawyer, and a member of the local school board.

I am the only one in this race who has stood up to the MAGA agenda, even when physically threatened. I paid the price for it – losing my seat on the school board by 317 votes. I have no regrets, and it ignited a fire in me to run for this seat in Congress.

Right now, I am counting on your support to keep going toe-to-toe with Young Kim and the national GOP. $3 or any amount would boost our fundraising and show strength on our FEC report.

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cg-q3-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116056422/572329649/1631137775?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDIwODIwNi1iYjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oFyW9Wf-5FxrLsKq9h3zk6R0PzGtELyzSBObqbBP5sw=)**

Thank you,
Christina

Christina Gagnier for Congress
14071 Peyton Drive
#1323
Chino Hills, CA 91709
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/o0JMPJC_eUqj3ov83mp0kw2?unsubscribedata=H%2FmCmCUzf5hqoe7WJJ%2Fc3oWiRkGJyQZHND11E2cB6DdNcSb%2B%2BhwI123IMF4PeQN2yc9bfoP3mh%2BK%2BL36ClCBPEKZJc%2BS2ivRanAwacQYt65%2BQfslcYF%2FCQGWHrOnNgTw5mxnf34%2FACnRSYqBLPuWKbM9LOqloOTpftuCK6Nx%2F3oDlZwc2FUu%2F6NvtsNgKom%2BSeXP%2FCk6%2F5v3ozkw%2FxBQvy800Rgplki7DcrS9XQrEQC8W0eHqCbSgREZgTIIOln%2BJOBeSpj9Ko%2BVt24ysrTqRHNnZYO%2FxPQZHIZZXurBrxtQLtUIFr6Zbzxofi2o%2FQ7D0aofP2hLDLclSYiaIxUjgGPn9joM%2BGxZ7SSQx3kvjd%2BFAmwm4H6Eur3I8OrmVUkqtJ5vvc1Zjvq3sHrLF9SmAP5qejlgo1%2FcigxTjcJJ8h6DwDe95ecCP0n5yLhwpFS9).

body:
I refuse to let Republicans rewrite history — the harm caused by the big ugly bill cannot be overstated. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116057359/572332773/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20250927_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzJlN2ZkNS1iYjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KERB7e-lrhzJEQx7JHV7PKmG8irKB87dGzebIeClKic=&emci=bf2c85cf-1a9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=072e7fd5-bb9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15529135) | Team, I came to Congress to work. Yet, nine months into the year and 12 weeks after the largest cut to SNAP in our nation’s history, Republicans are on the brink of shutting down our government. They want to rewrite history on the harm their Big Ugly Bill will cause, but the hard truth is that it’s already hurting Americans. Republicans passed unprecedented cuts to Medicaid and nutrition assistance to pay for tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. **Now, hundreds of thousands of CT residents are at risk of losing healthcare & vital resources. The ripple effect could be devastating.** As Ranking Member of the Nutrition Subcommittee, I am focused on solving the nutrition and healthcare crisis caused by the Big Ugly Bill. **[Reaching our upcoming end-of-quarter goal will help bolster this work at a critical time. clean_body: I refuse to let Republicans rewrite history — the harm caused by the big ugly bill cannot be overstated. | | Team, I came to Congress to work. Yet, nine months into the year and 12 weeks after the largest cut to SNAP in our nation’s history, Republicans are on the brink of shutting down our government. They want to rewrite history on the harm their Big Ugly Bill will cause, but the hard truth is that it’s already hurting Americans. Republicans passed unprecedented cuts to Medicaid and nutrition assistance to pay for tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. Now, hundreds of thousands of CT residents are at risk of losing healthcare & vital resources. The ripple effect could be devastating. As Ranking Member of the Nutrition Subcommittee, I am focused on solving the nutrition and healthcare crisis caused by the Big Ugly Bill. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: None of this is possible without you
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250927-1542-foote&t=1001&akid=1542%2E342411%2EpNXuKM ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’re staring down our end-of-quarter deadline — and we’ve set a goal to
raise $30,000 before Tuesday at midnight.

Here’s why:

The Squad is out front every single day — organizing, speaking truth to
power, and holding the Trump administration accountable.

Whether it’s fighting for working people, defending our democracy, or
standing up to billionaires and corporate special interests, we are
showing what it looks like when our government finally works for the
people.

But none of this is possible without you. Every moment of resistance,
every organizing push, every win we’ve built together — it all comes down
to whether we can meet our grassroots fundraising goals.

That’s why we need you in this fight. If we’re going to keep building
people power strong enough to take on Trump and his allies, we cannot
afford to fall short now.

We combed through our records for the month, and here’s where you stand:

Supporter Record for
Peter
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
September Donor: No — not
yet!
2025 Total:
$0
Suggested donation: $3
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250927-movement.baB9OI&refcode=em20250927-1542&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1542%2E342411%2EpNXuKM ]Contribute $3

*This data reflects donations made online with this email address. If
you've made a previous contribution via check or with a different email
address, it may not be reflected above. Thank you for supporting our
Squad.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250927-movement.baB9OI&refcode=em20250927-1542&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1542%2E342411%2EpNXuKM ]Can you chip in $3 right now to help us hit our $30,000
goal before Tuesday’s midnight deadline? Falling short means scaling back
our efforts — and with so much on the line, we simply can’t afford to.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250927-movement.baB9OI&refcode=em20250927-1542&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1542%2E342411%2EpNXuKM ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1542%2E342411%2EpNXuKM

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Could I give you a call?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I hope to talk to you over the phone pretty soon.
#
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250927-1?refcode=em20250927-2370&amount=5&refcode2=2370_21716_zxx_SI&akid=2370%2E21716%2Ezxx_SI)
Hey — it's Sarah.
**Do you have a sec to chat with me over the phone? 📞**
The reason I’m asking is because I’m planning on calling a few supporters who chip in to our campaign ahead of our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Tuesday.
[**Would you donate $5 or any amount you can afford today? I’ll be calling a handful of folks who pitch in, and I’d love the opportunity to speak with you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250927-1?refcode=em20250927-2370&amount=5&refcode2=2370_21716_zxx_SI&akid=2370%2E21716%2Ezxx_SI)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250927-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250927-2370&refcode2=2370_21716_zxx_SI&akid=2370%2E21716%2Ezxx_SI)**
Don't get me wrong. I love that you and I can communicate via email. These emails are one of the very best ways for us to stay connected about what I’m up to in Congress and all the progress we’re fighting for together here in Delaware.
**But there’s truly nothing like a good old-fashioned phone call, and I’d love the opportunity to connect with you to hear what’s on your mind.** I know too many folks in Delaware and across the country are worried about what’s ahead. Whether you’re concerned about the future your kids will inherit, frustrated by what’s happening in Washington, or if you want to chat about what’s giving you hope right now, I want to hear from you.
[**I can’t wait to start calling a few members of this team who pitch in ahead of Tuesday’s FEC fundraising deadline. Can I put you down for a $5 donation to support our fight for working families?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250927-1?refcode=em20250927-2370&amount=5&refcode2=2370_21716_zxx_SI&akid=2370%2E21716%2Ezxx_SI)
Hope to chat very soon!
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250927-1&t=1&refcode2=2370_21716_zxx_SI&akid=2370%2E21716%2Ezxx_SI)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2370%2E21716%2Ezxx_SI)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2370%2E21716%2Ezxx_SI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2370%2E21716%2Ezxx_SI)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Josh Cortez
subject: If we miss this deadline, we’ll regret it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Cortez for Congress
body:
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=184881bd8b2449499eadbda7e1ed01fe&_e=C83kzTRLbs6nz1XyZoEdqnn-1VEtP9vKMe0-OzH4WlgYTPRVzfeSv2qli5oN1Pat6dMjxMm3Y3q-CDR0sRYc64y3BgWETW3f0zjLBKZo7mFUrkeechBoIqxaXgoKiN70pSlzLdqUr_8JxZv-P1BtrsAUm5DIYKkUGi3iYPmfJ-pQ7hrQV5k6jI1s04yaybYidGKHTZqYeTVQVWLZBEYY5LlHlUJoQmMYP-WPfWkneL1ZPlCTd__-XsorvXNgH5oZk1yU0U7rP8MNP6zAmyPxJMyW6TVr8XJ4BUIkwRScMfCyd7qRLBZryykkA2Ny9WKK2Kf6piXc5SbCVQ2fx-yP2hQAVkXGUWsu6TIgQ6BlbBWRd2bTANeQm3MxNRj3AoTZXaJVf7h_PNRyOzB8RvMk6fZdTI89dwLvrxxfqBFWPyjSBvbOX6EONhRnhPP3NRBkx5m5ns7C5mkEKcjnHFpTrRnMXo19oUX_asj7XyDRdCc3MdQY5JHN5i8qhqpxSnjFr-JaOj_p1Zx5gP7kvlTmsDNa3tx33cwEMLxcLy83RcLGQ_MDCwGU_cRsMlXOE7n-6JGJUKzCfMmKWgVGkeJl7VP_7O0uJZc9D8967eEJ-VAC8pO3btRrvEPzqVaHOea5dr6P3Tkal8WTJxVYAN_5O7XN4IirK5bHbes4gifk_AlCFOiGFGepB64K_ACBb5u1UobqHZ9XIE2_qya7H5EV0WSUWVUKzC0AXu9CnSBv7Vo%3D)

Fellow American,

Let me pull back the curtain.

On **September 30th** , my campaign faces its **very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.** That may sound like political jargon, but here’s the truth:

_Every reporter. Every pollster. Every party insider._

They all circle that date in red ink.

When the clock strikes midnight, they’ll open our report and ask one question: “ _Does Josh Cortez have the grassroots momentum to flip TX-35?_ ”

**If the answer is “yes,” the political world takes us seriously. We get the coverage, the attention, the credibility.**

If the answer is “no,” they write us off before we’ve even begun.

This is why I’m coming straight to you. [**I don’t need Wall Street donors or D.C. lobbyists—I need YOU.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=184881bd8b2449499eadbda7e1ed01fe&_e=C83kzTRLbs6nz1XyZoEdqnn-1VEtP9vKMe0-OzH4WlgYTPRVzfeSv2qli5oN1Pat6dMjxMm3Y3q-CDR0sRYc64y3BgWETW3f0zjLBKZo7mFUrkeechBoIqxaXgoKiN70pSlzLdqUr_8JxZv-P1BtrsAUm5DIYKkUGi3iYPmfJ-pQ7hrQV5k6jI1s04yaybYidGKHTZqYeTVQVWLZBEYY5LlHlUJoQmMYP-WPfWkneL1ZPlCTd__-XsorvXNgH5oZKWA88wKTgw9kEW8TsJpXlb1c66ne7fFqKyL_avnIfqEU3bcQfiBMop2w_mvba05vrJtgfGu_J3JsS-jMAhbo6VnReVZi97jYmJkGkUukkfJ5VE0gzJohYnuWuS4azimdtad7XfkJtnI4irs7CUEeIQDjw2Yg5fIdtBF2_Z1vW2y5ik4FXqlr3YdDlKiYZ2U-TXaGJ8KtjuBo3ZZJR_aRm68jdSqjkjhidX0RX-WaOduAzDQPRIYoZW3kGzB8lFzO1Ufb3vZzaIlS1OqBjtroAggbAWrFTwdVU9DQLI6UqRCjQAxPk3bPMKuMZSBKKRqdKhy4E9ySTVW3HNAQQ9XmgDAk-C_XajNx0mAQrO-4Niycm1nGpE0BTwn2Wx741LitCApcXo7ByYxMz_gObjjCTtcKD2s8Q9exGAjbvsdfGoNA63Rs8m5NhDJ9OuCdLraUK2R2T6_8puSp8JSv_tK8B-yfwjRKAvPYUW6ZUzB1L5c%3D)

Every dollar you give before **September 30th** is not just a donation. It’s a data point. A headline. A flashing sign that our movement is _real_ —and that we have the strength to take this fight all the way to November.

[**But fellow American, we are running out of hours.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=184881bd8b2449499eadbda7e1ed01fe&_e=C83kzTRLbs6nz1XyZoEdqnn-1VEtP9vKMe0-OzH4WlgYTPRVzfeSv2qli5oN1Pat6dMjxMm3Y3q-CDR0sRYc64y3BgWETW3f0zjLBKZo7mFUrkeechBoIqxaXgoKiN70pSlzLdqUr_8JxZv-P1BtrsAUm5DIYKkUGi3iYPmfJ-pQ7hrQV5k6jI1s04yaybYidGKHTZqYeTVQVWLZBEYY5LlHlUJoQmMYP-WPfWkneL1ZPlCTd__-XsorvXNgH5oZrhTEpu_Drxts7Vw0raQP8KwxBGX1XLwgaNW8Zpb-MxS_K7kX-MBYihlf07kUNXA8JQsFW09SzEfHfWYUW4TZOWo8i3JGsHh-QKM2BrMdZViZAkXc8F6BxeKWxXpvrtsWIEBdi1FRMl06QWbidsqnkdKXBFDzJgkguQlAb19wtFFB4eWKoXRXl_CROxhLnm56ilJ64PXwS2hEWz_CSJTa-0gJV0Q6gHVL5F6dcAKxfEMkYZcdP4F7JASAFPqOCBad1fnTggc-rpQbwde-lGzf1CSy80pvjQzXMyZ0p1puUobQ6rqzDSg_X9-aJGajgZI3ssV_Dn3iRU6P27eqZA8gtmdBRuP1vuUo9tFl9iDk8Zup-1Yazj3_aPzSuq1J_tl_d0KHz9Yk7oUSJEtnWVw3gNCnDsRryJWiimYnbXZlRGr7cgIKWLbkDzOAxK9Jmq2y9A5Y6r-vyy3AbeRD1NziblmBEjnPUbqTkH-VQPwJV1M%3D)

We cannot show up short. We cannot limp into this deadline.

**And I cannot do this without you.**

clean_body: | Fellow American, Let me pull back the curtain. On September 30th , my campaign faces its very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. That may sound like political jargon, but here’s the truth: Every reporter. Every pollster. Every party insider. They all circle that date in red ink. When the clock strikes midnight, they’ll open our report and ask one question: “ Does Josh Cortez have the grassroots momentum to flip TX-35? ” If the answer is “yes,” the political world takes us seriously. We get the coverage, the attention, the credibility. If the answer is “no,” they write us off before we’ve even begun. This is why I’m coming straight to you. Every dollar you give before September 30th is not just a donation. It’s a data point. A headline. A flashing sign that our movement is real —and that we have the strength to take this fight all the way to November. We cannot show up short. We cannot limp into this deadline. And I cannot do this without you. For Texas, Josh Cortez Republican for Congress, TX-35 | | Paid for by Josh Cortez for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Deadline: Last chance to enter the Makarov giveaway.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Patriot,
Today is the **final day** to enter for a chance to win my Makarov pistol. The suppressor isn't included due to unconstitutional laws, but the barrel is threaded and ready for you to attach your own if legally permitted.
I'm looking forward to personally calling the winner to let them know this reliable Bulgarian firearm is theirs.
Any donation you've made since I launched my campaign will count -- but it never hurts to grab a few more entries for a great cause: defeating the most anti-2A Republican in Congress, Tony Gonzales.
Every $5 you give earns one entry. For example, $100 = 20 entries.
Contribute here: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/Vl5sP6h6O25fLCM6892pPv892g/BNy06892892va3slRPHiryzYNQ).
Thank you for standing with me.
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/BNy06892892va3slRPHiryzYNQ)

subject: Humbly asking for your help before our critical FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Peter, the most important FEC deadline of Jon Ossoff’s campaign so far is just a few days away. **[PLEASE, make a contribution to Jon’s reelection campaign so we can hit our goals before it is too late >>>**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250927-1-f&t=1&akid=837%2E5691347%2Ef28y39)

Peter,
We’re humbly asking that you make a contribution to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign here in Georgia.
Here’s why:
Jon Ossoff is the most vulnerable incumbent Senator in the country. Republicans have already poured more than $10 MILLION into TV and digital ads here in Georgia — **we can’t afford to wait to fight back.**
And frankly, Peter, there is no group better positioned to win in Georgia than this team. We did it before in 2020 and 2021, and we’ll do it again now.
Every voter we’re able to talk to, door we knock on, or television ad we air brings us one step closer to reelecting Jon and stopping a full-blown MAGA takeover in Georgia.
**[So if reelecting Jon is worth a few dollars to you, we’re asking you to contribute ahead of our crucial FEC fundraising deadline. With 2026 inching closer and closer, we need to start preparing now if we’re going to protect this must-hold seat and do our part to help Democrats take back the House.
Last year, I won my race by less than 3%. Now, Democrats have named me as one of the most vulnerable House members up for re-election. That means Republicans see this race as an opportunity to flip a critical swing seat and expand their slim House majority.
_We have to prove them wrong._
**That starts with showing we have the strength and resources to defend this swing seat and fight back against whatever obstacles the GOP throws our way.**
With just three days left before our end-of-quarter goal, I’m counting on this grassroots team to take a stand with me to meet our goal and protect OR-05.
[_**So please, will you rush a donation now to help hit our end-of-quarter goal and defend this must-hold seat? name: Team Pramila
subject: Let’s do this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This isn’t a deadline — it’s a test of how strong we are.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250927-5476-footer&t=1&akid=5476%2E420207%2ECz8Ygs)
Peter,
**Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is only 3 days away — and this is not the time to fall short.**
Every day, Pramila takes on Trump and his MAGA allies. They’re working nonstop to shut down the government, censor dissent, attack immigrants, strip away basic rights, and slash services poor and working people rely on.
Things feel heavy and chaotic — and that’s by design. They want us to feel powerless, overwhelmed, and checked out.
But we won’t fall into their trap. Pramila and this movement are ready to organize and mobilize at full force to prove MAGA won’t get away with their agenda.
So we’re setting a goal as ambitious and bold as the moment demands: $33,000 before September is up, powered 100% by grassroots supporters like you — no lobbyists, no corporate PACs, and no MAGA billionaires.
This isn’t just about a fundraising deadline. This is about building a movement equipped with the resources to:
* Stand up to Trump and far-right extremists
* Defend democracy from authoritarian power grabs
* Deliver real, lasting progressive wins from the bottom up
* Flip the House in 2026 and finally stop Trump’s unchecked agenda

And most importantly, it’s about proving that when everyday people come together, we can go toe-to-toe with billionaires and corporations — and win.
Every dollar makes a huge difference in proving our movement is strong, energized, and ready to win.
[**Will you help us hit our goal and prove to MAGA that this movement is more powerful, more energized, and more determined to win than ever before?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250927-1?refcode=em20250927-5476&amount=3&refcode2=5476_420207_Cz8Ygs&akid=5476%2E420207%2ECz8Ygs)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250927-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250927-5476&refcode2=5476_420207_Cz8Ygs&akid=5476%2E420207%2ECz8Ygs)**
Thank you for your support.
— Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250927-5476-footer&t=2&refcode2=5476_420207_Cz8Ygs&akid=5476%2E420207%2ECz8Ygs)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: This isn’t a deadline — it’s a test of how strong we are. Peter, Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is only 3 days away — and this is not the time to fall short. Every day, Pramila takes on Trump and his MAGA allies. They’re working nonstop to shut down the government, censor dissent, attack immigrants, strip away basic rights, and slash services poor and working people rely on. Things feel heavy and chaotic — and that’s by design. They want us to feel powerless, overwhelmed, and checked out. But we won’t fall into their trap. Pramila and this movement are ready to organize and mobilize at full force to prove MAGA won’t get away with their agenda. So we’re setting a goal as ambitious and bold as the moment demands: $33,000 before September is up, powered 100% by grassroots supporters like you — no lobbyists, no corporate PACs, and no MAGA billionaires. This isn’t just about a fundraising deadline. This is about building a movement equipped with the resources to: Stand up to Trump and far-right extremists Defend democracy from authoritarian power grabs Deliver real, lasting progressive wins from the bottom up Flip the House in 2026 and finally stop Trump’s unchecked agenda And most importantly, it’s about proving that when everyday people come together, we can go toe-to-toe with billionaires and corporations — and win. Every dollar makes a huge difference in proving our movement is strong, energized, and ready to win. Thank you for your support. — Team Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s DOJ escalates lawsuit against Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116060294/572341246/-1876887045?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTVjYmM5OS1jMDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNe4sslbrFnQEMoKyQ8Ka-OnXhZ8EEpe7QVKEx5iFW8=)**
* * *
Friend, We have a disturbing update: The Trump administration isn’t just suing Maine anymore. They’ve now filed a motion to compel in court, **demanding that Secretary of State Shenna Bellows hand over voter registration data immediately.** Let’s be clear: This is an escalation. Trump’s Department of Justice wants a federal court to force Maine to break its own state laws, override voter privacy protections, and hand over sensitive voter information. Why? Because Shenna Bellows had the courage to say no. She refused to violate the trust of Maine voters. She stood up to a power-hungry administration trying to bully states into submission. _And now, they’re trying to legally compel her to comply._ **If they win this fight, no state’s data will be safe, and no election official will be immune from political retribution.** This is part of a dangerous pattern: from Arizona to Oregon, the Trump administration is using lawsuits and legal threats to consolidate control over our elections. **Trump’s DOJ will not stop at Maine and Oregon.** East or West, from corner to corner of this country, other states will be next. And unless we push back immediately and forcefully, this authoritarian playbook becomes the norm. DASS is standing shoulder to shoulder with Secretaries of State like Shenna Bellows and Tobias Read, who are refusing to back down. But we need your help to keep up this fight in court, in the press, and in every battleground state. **[Can you rush a $3 contribution right now to support the DASS Legal Fund and protect voter privacy from authoritarian overreach?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116060295/572341247/957523928?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTVjYmM5OS1jMDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNe4sslbrFnQEMoKyQ8Ka-OnXhZ8EEpe7QVKEx5iFW8=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116060296/572341248/957523928?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTVjYmM5OS1jMDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNe4sslbrFnQEMoKyQ8Ka-OnXhZ8EEpe7QVKEx5iFW8=)**

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Break free from plastics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Plastic pollution is a crisis threatening our climate, our economy, our public health, and our planet.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116060319/572341358/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQ5MmMyOC1jMTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U4wreMuA67OW3sQY0TumcAnW41xUaAVdsaroC85FwYU=&emci=ef6e6901-509a-f011-b485-6045bda9d96b&emdi=54d92c28-c19b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Plastic pollution is a crisis threatening our climate, our economy, our public health, and our planet. Microplastics are invading every part of our lives — from the water we drink to the food we eat — and chemicals in plastics are linked to infertility and premature birth. **This is a growing danger we can't ignore.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116060320/572341359/-2055809639?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQ5MmMyOC1jMTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U4wreMuA67OW3sQY0TumcAnW41xUaAVdsaroC85FwYU=&emci=ef6e6901-509a-f011-b485-6045bda9d96b&emdi=54d92c28-c19b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7731215) **That's why I introduced the Break Free from Plastic Pollution Act.** My bill is a comprehensive plan to take on the plastics crisis by phasing out harmful single-use plastics, reforming our broken recycling system, and reducing the amount of wasteful plastic produced in the first place. Importantly, it also shifts responsibility to where it belongs: the corporations that manufacture and profit from this waste. For too long, families and communities have shouldered the cost of cleanup while corporations have avoided accountability. Together, we can break free from plastic pollution, protect our health, safeguard Oregon's natural resources, and preserve our planet for future generations. Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: Plastic pollution is a crisis threatening our climate, our economy, our public health, and our planet. | | | | Plastic pollution is a crisis threatening our climate, our economy, our public health, and our planet. Microplastics are invading every part of our lives — from the water we drink to the food we eat — and chemicals in plastics are linked to infertility and premature birth. This is a growing danger we can't ignore. That's why I introduced the Break Free from Plastic Pollution Act. My bill is a comprehensive plan to take on the plastics crisis by phasing out harmful single-use plastics, reforming our broken recycling system, and reducing the amount of wasteful plastic produced in the first place. Importantly, it also shifts responsibility to where it belongs: the corporations that manufacture and profit from this waste. For too long, families and communities have shouldered the cost of cleanup while corporations have avoided accountability. Together, we can break free from plastic pollution, protect our health, safeguard Oregon's natural resources, and preserve our planet for future generations. Onward, Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Allow me to reintroduce myself, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
I've been called husband, father, Coach, and Senator. Now, I'm running to be Governor.
|
---
Peter,

It's me, Tommy Tuberville.

Throughout my life, I've been called many names. Whether it's Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I've always led by example for those who depend on me. By the end of next year, I'm hoping you'll be able to call me Governor, too.

**This email is a little longer, but it's worth your time.** [**I’m humbly asking you to read it through and consider donating to my campaign for Alabama’s next Governor when you’re finished.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7ad05c077d1e4f7eabbabc351b102917&_e=Bhh3wnr7z6RLtyxO0t3a7u-ZNz1N9Uh0NRGujCECyYr5wOKKc8DwpyFz5FtWvdtloZYiRY5NA2VZnjxZwp7tUh-ylpPlpVK4t8Bisw62ZvVPpp-JZEvnc4o7FAs-dpqiXQT7viBDxyEnS4TYSvjVQMVJbJRmoBUM8ncfLiLcOhnMra3AixHDA82VzeBs8eZ8HRoRvFLtNuF7UZ8RQLQtMdWmnIuEyIhp68d3RkZ5NwwjLr3FAOGLEZYxRdwKcsGzm7lkkUpvVz_P6vjQEP3s2DCCcVACR_OCce3TSdShI2t4rAZ1dQV0m8ngZfV9DR8ZO2mirXcjiEOtokd9HnbSB_M7G-dfFW2czjMDSk-pxwvE4hgTUQKoUadtNsY2nAnh1ud6R5KoOyBvuoxgrlUsD-XH_wOIZ8eGcsn6PVwVe5xbIYybfqmGs6o5--8v2LzkabHsLlVcDrYbL8A54BBSOXvzIcK7wz_h1AH7zFLBpDmqjBT9Dk9XbYxqxdk9pBzLQVHXPo_p4PtkR3qIrl5oY_2DmN9OQ3acJ5FoHE8BjkN3TJsUs8-cy00jGFexkbFE)

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7ad05c077d1e4f7eabbabc351b102917&_e=Bhh3wnr7z6RLtyxO0t3a7u-ZNz1N9Uh0NRGujCECyYr5wOKKc8DwpyFz5FtWvdtloZYiRY5NA2VZnjxZwp7tUh-ylpPlpVK4t8Bisw62ZvVPpp-JZEvnc4o7FAs-dpqiXQT7viBDxyEnS4TYSvjVQMVJbJRmoBUM8ncfLiLcOhnMra3AixHDA82VzeBs8eZ87iSXrRsgMRDCBOjdyC7ucBo6BnDTUFTQL_jBjNTwSeYMt-aLiW1i5rGjDqhVdYI9kCumoIjzfDacuYtxCWjg8Cy17hoEwM0DywNnzQm0CrTzwST4G5zt6FFTbJslMdBTsdL4654e-19spdBwOBJ9EvJFFgjOiFzJIoYLxQ7uD8kqRF_YV1vdifM1mTYE2k6fLXt4i2imNmrGt5ZBzIPCIRTaRQqnaoEL0wxuV5CW6Vb6Zq3oLr2u6oHRZ7eJVOuFZiyB54HGoehBvHVOnGj30uaNWRpfTKNTLSRII3mrqdxZD-fwoioxpZ1eT2A6eE4BxeduR2LyXpby6Q0N1gtVt5sNkBKtjSjkSIns-C5oMDGVvJVGJS4S9G_XFX-V1SNg)
I was born in Camden, Arkansas, as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to consistently work hard and stand on principle, which I've brought with me every step of my life.

I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married three years later and have two amazing children, Tucker and Troy. _**They continue to make me proud every single day.**_

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7ad05c077d1e4f7eabbabc351b102917&_e=Bhh3wnr7z6RLtyxO0t3a7u-ZNz1N9Uh0NRGujCECyYr5wOKKc8DwpyFz5FtWvdtloZYiRY5NA2VZnjxZwp7tUh-ylpPlpVK4t8Bisw62ZvVPpp-JZEvnc4o7FAs-dpqiXQT7viBDxyEnS4TYSvjVQMVJbJRmoBUM8ncfLiLcOhnMra3AixHDA82VzeBs8eZ8GHrv0zq3ClVzLYUKkdOt3t-Zmx10wOCTlkch4w6pLXF5rA2qhgTckPy8axtOVjQYNXdlglzs_Olx1OoAx9KAczGalPNAkPM64Pm9i1zrolyL1_U0cQ2GgXNCm7AzwMLHnS7kBUtzd-E76dr3T1ZlUR-lha-3mjW378KoShJzhsnlOXXYF-vH6L_PA9BEICnaQiT-A7iVWTflL4RckbXm2OaVSnE0eL-0GdKU7DEGLYDnIPudaTwkb2fOFb3tw6E-gYcOUwpVZ0rpmhlxLKsGgXunnabEWj8vNK5Y2Qwel8Rqt-XleHDpF4DUYyyezbsY0C53oij9pOTd3WyIqeQZhZ6ADzGTh6iT9ZJPw3En2qyHJ7UYV1EadV-RRbEdoveR)
After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University.

Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7ad05c077d1e4f7eabbabc351b102917&_e=Bhh3wnr7z6RLtyxO0t3a7u-ZNz1N9Uh0NRGujCECyYr5wOKKc8DwpyFz5FtWvdtloZYiRY5NA2VZnjxZwp7tUh-ylpPlpVK4t8Bisw62ZvVPpp-JZEvnc4o7FAs-dpqiXQT7viBDxyEnS4TYSvjVQMVJbJRmoBUM8ncfLiLcOhnMra3AixHDA82VzeBs8eZ8e710_6zPvQz6xIfg0z4oFAuiw3xJ_93oCVSDuBhNnOGiLtpNPM_TGN3sY5c9OCZqLbJDVLelxSeA99SOUnqH7yYlFgoPE1VV03lgzJovyGwYLXgwTOGPQz4WU4GbxuQUkF8fEOaY5bG8BJgvfJIHE_iX9nYfTf8iddLxBGN68WkuVU3yQfwBnoY5_SEpx0tqrFFqg0NMjZkGWZPaAW50hjjzrjNnC1VxP8xAqlut4hWy5EoSk1G-V63HYwEiOkVc7j3GpZBUuuwV7ktJr03fl7VL3jKsUBZWfzWgDD328Bek2ukRdCP5IzbPETptMm5Nqx_oDxMFh-bvJdkxfzb3fKkRYA_mFndDrm-cgXnLPBaCcHvt8SKaXLtt9o46LSsR)
I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards.

I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn't done winning just yet.

**In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won.**

**Throughout my time in Washington, D.C., I 've fought nonstop on President Trump's behalf.** Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts, challenging the Biden-Harris Administration's Radical and harmful policies, or working with President Trump to secure our border, protect women in sports, and make our military prioritize readiness over wokeness, I always worked hard. I stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7ad05c077d1e4f7eabbabc351b102917&_e=Bhh3wnr7z6RLtyxO0t3a7u-ZNz1N9Uh0NRGujCECyYr5wOKKc8DwpyFz5FtWvdtloZYiRY5NA2VZnjxZwp7tUh-ylpPlpVK4t8Bisw62ZvVPpp-JZEvnc4o7FAs-dpqiXQT7viBDxyEnS4TYSvjVQMVJbJRmoBUM8ncfLiLcOhnMra3AixHDA82VzeBs8eZ8QY8puZAHaGyDYYBRq6uOckxU0o_8WxMjt2k2PUKlEMNI57g3HmAYcB-LnpkhqJ2XY3wlcWMs2wuhzFUXY7z3cxLWJnbjd1pMrSqTMpF4NVYqcUvz1VlDtmPVqV3xaxenZ8KFa_DOks8UvhM4uiUqrPGlBxpO7Rkeg1SSEj4Z2iXyASjfRUOc05E9W6uJP5YxvuOJ4SPowVdkaE-JpG1Yos-FkZdI1s2LMl_QjBC9CRkpx5wRHlXe2WG3LAkS5-ceXf6UpA2eKQRTqzX04hlBYtHnbqH0gHoOAcITKWQS-SkjLtaFl8_IuTDrH629HUfxny0Q1NzMUzrXx-kc6ALkFxsflHIXqwBTlbnMpPcSC_hMbjKIcnnmHbgOpa1m43cL)
**Now, I 'm running for Governor in Alabama so I can continue making an impact for my community back home.**

The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top gubernatorial targets to defeat in 2026. They're going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it's this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0.

**I 'm looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a political candidate, and I need your help to do so.**

[**Peter, can you chip in just $10 before midnight to give my campaign the resources we need to defeat the Radical Left and protect America First Alabamian values?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7ad05c077d1e4f7eabbabc351b102917&_e=Bhh3wnr7z6RLtyxO0t3a7u-ZNz1N9Uh0NRGujCECyYr5wOKKc8DwpyFz5FtWvdtloZYiRY5NA2VZnjxZwp7tUh-ylpPlpVK4t8Bisw62ZvVPpp-JZEvnc4o7FAs-dpqiXQT7viBDxyEnS4TYSvjVQMVJbJRmoBUM8ncfLiLcOhnMra3AixHDA82VzeBs8eZ8qjuVamKlIgnqBK62bXuSNgq6RJrcioxcNirfnUlwPkwn-WspzsLX60vYDgt5k1bOy8gNMjjWiiQQRBX2AgABjNsFHDc5YQCmj7f6jRLAcYIauR5LqIs8DcfT4mnr4MeMToF8cmSfv92aw2mkxUBp0tAreF-0BlinGOAeYpTnfSBjaA7_x5KjnQHHF5YR6lZUQN0kopPw3klqoWuYFT83yhov3857BG_qPQUgqWytYx_7IEm0O79v9bvu0ozPQMQcjI3PzDGCPjt-wE-T_I8FLwaxpsqw_Aq5J4NeYVwZWfbZVD8X5ekjJdQZRL1wxOfn1CGBj2VQoxp0JmP26rUzmhT9Dkc331jaaPieDAc22fQAzZq6pITim1zi-wPemN1E)

I won't take up more of your time.

[**Thank you for reading this all the way through, and please consider donating any amount to help!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7ad05c077d1e4f7eabbabc351b102917&_e=Bhh3wnr7z6RLtyxO0t3a7u-ZNz1N9Uh0NRGujCECyYr5wOKKc8DwpyFz5FtWvdtloZYiRY5NA2VZnjxZwp7tUh-ylpPlpVK4t8Bisw62ZvVPpp-JZEvnc4o7FAs-dpqiXQT7viBDxyEnS4TYSvjVQMVJbJRmoBUM8ncfLiLcOhnMra3AixHDA82VzeBs8eZ8OTUxe_bB-iT8OsUyMcMxkzzRdtW3Y3cTg78Uworf5ICjYuTM73sgvRlXIqxva06p9g9U-WkUWvZnqPHNNcRuUeSJQeekGyoQYMbMXSneE_g0kpGqe80RNMKD2kZ0BeTmnHa5c9b_b9T6fE5Oe-s6EUhjWESO6Mp8JTHnr0XkiRsOXMfhJIhpL91y22sW3IC195gKgxguZI8qBbJmRaV93dmwL0I0pv0WMxdk1xggvf1b6_PaIvTqMkasVT-tBc56fRGe_K8mYeyKADykFgz-lSC3H-NodkqpQQ9dh1DS1MDiJZFIFVGOKwHpL_MaD3VdYMnxGnYx4XhxVOvJ3wy0LYxzBm2csF1NvGfjvKrG1iKobbvWKWrrcLJ6yFphJqEI)

Best,
_Coach Tommy Tuberville_

| [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7ad05c077d1e4f7eabbabc351b102917&_e=Bhh3wnr7z6RLtyxO0t3a7u-ZNz1N9Uh0NRGujCECyYr5wOKKc8DwpyFz5FtWvdtloZYiRY5NA2VZnjxZwp7tUh-ylpPlpVK4t8Bisw62ZvVPpp-JZEvnc4o7FAs-dpqiXQT7viBDxyEnS4TYSvjVQMVJbJRmoBUM8ncfLiLcOhnMra3AixHDA82VzeBs8eZ8v58iWSR_RFR90yo0QeNK26QWIi-VrDJ7zp0jl2GmM3rBif43LmviiQXqZp6fsg2_xxEbPHGfuoErfOI0DDW5mB-wBtyfrTsqkUr-09MozU70wTKVJ1mooIPCUBPkQ8p3Zys7bzcqDiFScxFA-6bRkhHs3p17mKXC0EB1FYW4s1tGnc5ogAG5nRj77fZwQIpq4-Vlg2m-kR3pGmSGogHpa68q736K9GCJUUBAZfuY7-puKqbILXxyZYWSJ6s5Lv-FRJpAUncCy2cVp0FCSYB2H3AhqyEzAJs9rDaDhgVmBaXgIc5HwMdbZzNQn8sMqRo_tE9UUV1WbsofRDIM7KjLlG5WcK04ff1svnvmmR9_akslPdYFCaWYxHZYbF34UFuU)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7ad05c077d1e4f7eabbabc351b102917&_e=Bhh3wnr7z6RLtyxO0t3a7u-ZNz1N9Uh0NRGujCECyYr5wOKKc8DwpyFz5FtWvdtloZYiRY5NA2VZnjxZwp7tUh-ylpPlpVK4t8Bisw62ZvVPpp-JZEvnc4o7FAs-dpqiXQT7viBDxyEnS4TYSvjVQMVJbJRmoBUM8ncfLiLcOhnMra3AixHDA82VzeBs8eZ8jaQ1zFBCGI4Eoby6ufhSlaEzynPPap0P5x2jot_FVzG_YNnuLKhS6rkiBEweOpPGFlmtMJYbY5KL6qeKoHX-eoNaR7HMbU18veonJo56IhlidFAw2f6Eq6gChtIYiEshT5BGCCPY9HUb9_zudqMBQP0SyBUUYzlQDges0jfuW6Yc6KbPzv0IQyBZPRq-ki4Q8Fkt0BpqQvGIKH3P0XtQDQhOtIzN3WHWWms5VQdYYmk8K9eNkHwPNYCmX_n6eaKCtaQSbrffIXCKir8TJ5OIwZ6ssalBzPoZnaDe3U1dbHKN8cpQnXH5VPVopZdjr6J62a8-d59J7Yr9bXgY6KjYfZM0VEsi1-RKRKO-5BMZWzpHmif042GNmijB-cC4BOY0)

clean_body: I've been called husband, father, Coach, and Senator. Now, I'm running to be Governor. | Peter, It's me, Tommy Tuberville. Throughout my life, I've been called many names. Whether it's Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I've always led by example for those who depend on me. By the end of next year, I'm hoping you'll be able to call me Governor, too. This email is a little longer, but it's worth your time. I was born in Camden, Arkansas, as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to consistently work hard and stand on principle, which I've brought with me every step of my life. I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married three years later and have two amazing children, Tucker and Troy. They continue to make me proud every single day. After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University. Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards. I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn't done winning just yet. In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won. Throughout my time in Washington, D.C., I 've fought nonstop on President Trump's behalf. Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts, challenging the Biden-Harris Administration's Radical and harmful policies, or working with President Trump to secure our border, protect women in sports, and make our military prioritize readiness over wokeness, I always worked hard. I stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age. Now, I 'm running for Governor in Alabama so I can continue making an impact for my community back home. The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top gubernatorial targets to defeat in 2026. They're going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it's this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0. I 'm looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a political candidate, and I need your help to do so. I won't take up more of your time. Best, Coach Tommy Tuberville | Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Quick survey: help guide our work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Friends, with so much happening in the world right now, it’s more important than ever that I stay connected to the people I represent — including you.
That’s why I’m asking folks to take a quick end-of-quarter survey. It’ll take just a minute, and knowing what’s important to you helps shape the fights we take on in the months ahead.
Will you share your input today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/XASV2Vt6z0GjMW22KB_-Lg2]
TAKE THE SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/XASV2Vt6z0GjMW22KB_-Lg2]
As we head into the final months of 2025, I also want you to know what your support has helped make possible so far:
* We filed 39 lawsuits filed in just 34 weeks — and every time Trump breaks the law or violates the Constitution, I’ll keep suing.
* We preserved more than $168 billion in federal funding for California — including money for schools, infrastructure, healthcare, and research.
* We’ve seen $33,600 returned to the state for every $1 spent on legal action (a pretty good investment if you ask me).
* We successfully blocked Trump’s attempts to strip away over $11 billion in federal grant funding , dismantle agencies like AmeriCorps and HHS, and roll back constitutional rights like birthright citizenship and the right to vote.
* And we defended communities by prosecuting corrupt corporate landlords, securing felony convictions against fentanyl traffickers, and holding powerful special interests accountable.
This work matters — because when Trump targets California’s funding, he’s putting people’s education, health, livelihoods, and even their lives at risk.
But our work goes beyond the courtroom. My job is to protect Californians from bad actors, fight back against abuse of power, and build a future where justice and opportunity are available to everyone. And to do that effectively, I need to know what’s most important to you.
Take our short survey and help guide the fights ahead. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/XASV2Vt6z0GjMW22KB_-Lg2]
Thank you for being part of this grassroots team. Together, we’ll keep protecting the rights and freedoms of every Californian.
— Rob
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
To contribute via check, please address to:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Thank you for supporting Rob Bonta. Grassroots supporters like you help us protect California’s working families, advance criminal justice reform, and keep our communities safe. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to protect and serve the people of California, we need you with us every step of the way.
If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, click unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tsXL_NR2qEmgRRek5GtgsA2?unsubscribedata=DylFpHyr69%2FcX0QmOXZiQso21hLUrTMznCJ64JTAcxW48og5WIXL994VmPq44J0KKBdg2wJQoNep6RWIHmYpUBsWAyRNaZ7hUQF9vZQUZk7LxnBZ%2Fcn4P9L8xFFEmMe0Ao5jF3YGazZTU9fA7rAAopahE1iOLCXGmHSaIn6NwLaev%2FMS6P%2BAljASwaTxfc6xypTl7qL1I3AlDQ504ILcUqn1ZzoYyX9ZdBiRJTg9vyZ723iWgSAkJfiIdmEN8DLhM3or1GPJLUNOTlVIp5kooMD0gh5AHSScLQGno9eEyJj5hxtQX5h0cqPoRW%2BBJs0o%2BhEEhBiW9y3GyG0CJPe2pQMcpapFmZ%2FLj0TeR6NfxJT7%2FzP6h0TWiGs3bJ0kqnGFmGwMTePYbrYforz8tpsKTsSrFQ0cmqwexmimEz6WWbwomNuul8Z%2BgVBmXvIFp3wY .
From all of us at Team Bonta, thank you for your support!

name: VoteVets.org
subject: 🪖 An important message for every VoteVets supporter... 🇺🇸🫡
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Peter - please, don’t click away before reading.
#
Peter - please, don’t click away before reading.
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve.
And now, it’s a huge part of how we are fighting back against Trump and Doug Collins as they work to dismantle the VA, piece by piece.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril.
[**If helping VoteVets lead this fight from the front seems worth an $5 donation to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation before our official FEC deadline on September 30th. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sep25.qP0qt0&refcode=em250927-1-f&t=1&akid=34648%2E3013755%2EHCRDeU)

Hi N/A, it’s Lindsay James.

If you have just a few minutes to spare, I wanted to give you a little more insight into who I am and why I hope you’ll join me in the fight to flip Iowa’s 2nd Congressional district. Since 2019, I’ve been representing my community in the Iowa State House. But before I was in the State Legislature, I was a college chaplain.

[**ALERT: Trump and Republicans are trying to abuse the U.S. Census to grab more power.
Donate now to fight back >> **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116061738/572346282/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusUpdate_email_20250927-NDRC-Tier1-CensusUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250927-NDRC-Tier1-CensusUpdate_&utm_campaign=CensusUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViM2RkYjY1LWMzOWItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ubEpR3GuCAM_P48CE4mmNWFc5buU7DMfKfozZcp7ORY=) Math is math, right Peter? Counting shouldn’t be complicated. And yet, here we are watching as Donald Trump and his extreme Republican enablers are pushing to upend the U.S. Census to reshape congressional maps across the country. In a move that NPR called “unprecedented,” Trump is trying to exclude key populations from being counted and calling for a mid-decade census. It’s illegal and unconstitutional, but since when has that ever stopped them? **The result of a census “redo” would be devastating for millions of people who would lose access to critical services — and for fair representation in elections nationwide.** Republican politicians are hoping that by excluding or undercounting certain communities, they could grow their artificial electoral advantage. Remember — the constitution requires counting ALL people! **The U.S. Census shouldn’t be a partisan political tool** — and we’re going to do everything possible to fight back against this outrageous Republican power grab. [**Donate now to power our work for fair maps and fair representation — the stakes are simply too high to remain on the sidelines.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116061740/572346287/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusUpdate_email_20250927-NDRC-Tier1-CensusUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250927-NDRC-Tier1-CensusUpdate_&utm_campaign=CensusUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViM2RkYjY1LWMzOWItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ubEpR3GuCAM_P48CE4mmNWFc5buU7DMfKfozZcp7ORY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[Donate $100](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116061752/572346321/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusUpdate_email_20250927-NDRC-Tier1-CensusUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250927-NDRC-Tier1-CensusUpdate_&utm_campaign=CensusUpdate&express_lane=true&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViM2RkYjY1LWMzOWItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ubEpR3GuCAM_P48CE4mmNWFc5buU7DMfKfozZcp7ORY=) | [Another amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116061756/572346332/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusUpdate_email_20250927-NDRC-Tier1-CensusUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250927-NDRC-Tier1-CensusUpdate_&utm_campaign=CensusUpdate&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViM2RkYjY1LWMzOWItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ubEpR3GuCAM_P48CE4mmNWFc5buU7DMfKfozZcp7ORY=)
Let’s clear a few things up about the census:
1. **The president does not have final authority over the U.S. Census,** according to the U.S. Constitution. That’s Congress’s job.

2. **The 14th Amendment requires the “whole number of persons in each state” to be counted** in the census and used to determine how presidents and members of Congress are elected. That has always been interpreted to mean all people, regardless of their legal status.

3. **The census has _never_ included a question about citizenship status,** so Trump’s current push to exclude residents without legal status contradicts more than 200 years of precedent.

4. **The Census Bureau’s own research concluded that including a citizenship question is likely to lead to faulty self-reported data** and discourage Latino or Asian American households from responding — which would mean forfeiting billions in funding for critical services from the federal government.

It’s clear that passing new, gerrymandered maps in places like Texas and Missouri is only one part of Republicans' plans to give themselves a further unfair electoral advantage. **If they can reshape the census to tighten their grip on power, there may be no turning back.**
[**Donate now to help stop these attacks on the census and on fair representation for Americans across the country. clean_body: Donate now to defend fair representation for ALL Americans | = Math is math, right Peter? Counting shouldn’t be complicated. And yet, here we are watching as Donald Trump and his extreme Republican enablers are pushing to upend the U.S. Census to reshape congressional maps across the country. In a move that NPR called “unprecedented,” Trump is trying to exclude key populations from being counted and calling for a mid-decade census. It’s illegal and unconstitutional, but since when has that ever stopped them? The result of a census “redo” would be devastating for millions of people who would lose access to critical services — and for fair representation in elections nationwide. Republican politicians are hoping that by excluding or undercounting certain communities, they could grow their artificial electoral advantage. Remember — the constitution requires counting ALL people! The U.S. Census shouldn’t be a partisan political tool — and we’re going to do everything possible to fight back against this outrageous Republican power grab. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Let’s clear a few things up about the census: 1. The president does not have final authority over the U.S. Census, according to the U.S. Constitution. That’s Congress’s job. 2. The 14th Amendment requires the “whole number of persons in each state” to be counted in the census and used to determine how presidents and members of Congress are elected. That has always been interpreted to mean all people, regardless of their legal status. 3. The census has never included a question about citizenship status, so Trump’s current push to exclude residents without legal status contradicts more than 200 years of precedent. 4. The Census Bureau’s own research concluded that including a citizenship question is likely to lead to faulty self-reported data and discourage Latino or Asian American households from responding — which would mean forfeiting billions in funding for critical services from the federal government. It’s clear that passing new, gerrymandered maps in places like Texas and Missouri is only one part of Republicans' plans to give themselves a further unfair electoral advantage. If they can reshape the census to tighten their grip on power, there may be no turning back. = More to come on the fight to save the census and democracy itself, NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply.
