name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: “Believe.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
I believe people like you and me can and will make a difference. |
#
---
Team, I’m going to let you in on a little secret. I’m a huge “Ted Lasso” fan. It’s true! I’ve seen every episode (more than once), and I could go on and on about what makes this show so great. For anyone who hasn’t seen the show, the word _believe_ plays a huge role in his life. Regardless of circumstances, Ted always says that we should believe in ourselves and what we’re working toward. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116062183/572347473/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20250927_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTEwMzY2ZDctYzM5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Eql0vzXyWvx2E3pdfgXhCFh6kE3GycuAa78VKVe7DmE=) **That same spirit is what drives me in politics.** Because the truth is that keeping Michigan blue and protecting our progress won’t be easy. Our opponents are going to pour everything they’ve got into dragging us backward. Today, my team and I are putting that spirit into action by training the next generation of candidates here in Michigan — the first of many trainings we’ll hold in battlegrounds across the country leading up to the 2026 election. But right now, as we head into the end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday, we’re still falling short of the goal we set to power this fight. **And folks,_I’m doing this because I believe._** I believe in the people of the great state of Michigan. I believe in our shared values of freedom, fairness, and opportunity for all. And I believe that when we come together and fight like hell, no amount of money spent trying to stop us will work. **[Now, I’m asking you to believe in me and help power our work. clean_body: I believe people like you and me can and will make a difference. | Team, I’m going to let you in on a little secret. I’m a huge “Ted Lasso” fan. It’s true! I’ve seen every episode (more than once), and I could go on and on about what makes this show so great. For anyone who hasn’t seen the show, the word believe plays a huge role in his life. Regardless of circumstances, Ted always says that we should believe in ourselves and what we’re working toward. = That same spirit is what drives me in politics. Because the truth is that keeping Michigan blue and protecting our progress won’t be easy. Our opponents are going to pour everything they’ve got into dragging us backward. Today, my team and I are putting that spirit into action by training the next generation of candidates here in Michigan — the first of many trainings we’ll hold in battlegrounds across the country leading up to the 2026 election. But right now, as we head into the end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday, we’re still falling short of the goal we set to power this fight. And folks,I’m doing this because I believe. I believe in the people of the great state of Michigan. I believe in our shared values of freedom, fairness, and opportunity for all. And I believe that when we come together and fight like hell, no amount of money spent trying to stop us will work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In the words of Coach Ted Lasso, "Taking on a challenge is a lot like riding a horse, isn't it? If you're comfortable while you're doing it, you're probably doing it wrong." With our Michigan grit, I believe people like you and me can and will make a difference. Thank you, Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. FightLikeHellPAC.org. name: Michael Bennet
subject: sorry to interrupt your Saturday afternoon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
I know Colorado can provide the vision our country urgently needs. That's why I'm in this race.
| | |
---
Hey, friend – I'm sorry to interrupt your Saturday afternoon, but it couldn't wait.
**[Before I ask you to make the best contribution you can toward my $100,000 goal ahead of the end-of-quarter deadline this Tuesday,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116062330/572348202/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk926-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTI1YjkxOC1jNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJUzuz5cYigRixw_36Tv91QKfMYbuw_-OANaiht4blA=) I want to make sure we're on the same page about why I'm in this race.**
Colorado is at a critical moment, and right now, we need and deserve a leader who isn’t willing to simply color inside the lines.
For my whole career, I’ve challenged the status quo. Before I went to Washington, I improved student achievement as the Denver Public Schools superintendent. I helped balance the City of Denver’s budget as chief of staff, and I turned around failing businesses in the private sector.
I’ve taken that same spirit to the Senate. I helped expand the Child Tax Credit, which cut childhood poverty nearly in half. I passed a bill to ban insurance companies from surprise hospital bills. I introduced the first bill to ban members of Congress from becoming lobbyists. And I’ve tried to lead by example by rejecting corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money.
I have spent years traveling to every corner of our state, building relationships and convening Coloradans to take on our greatest challenges and solve them.
Wherever I've gone, I have fought for and delivered meaningful change. And I believe that's exactly what Colorado's working families need today.
**_That's_ why I'm running for governor.** Because I know that together, we can rebuild our middle class, make our economy work for us all and make this the best state to raise a family. Together is the only way.
The best line of defense against Donald Trump’s extreme agenda is in the states. And I know Colorado can provide the vision our country urgently needs.
**And with the biggest end-of-quarter deadline yet of this race just over 72 hours away , this people-powered campaign will not have the resources to make it happen without a groundswell of grassroots support from people like you, starting now.**

clean_body: I know Colorado can provide the vision our country urgently needs. That's why I'm in this race. | | | Hey, friend – I'm sorry to interrupt your Saturday afternoon, but it couldn't wait. = I want to make sure we're on the same page about why I'm in this race. Colorado is at a critical moment, and right now, we need and deserve a leader who isn’t willing to simply color inside the lines. For my whole career, I’ve challenged the status quo. Before I went to Washington, I improved student achievement as the Denver Public Schools superintendent. I helped balance the City of Denver’s budget as chief of staff, and I turned around failing businesses in the private sector. I’ve taken that same spirit to the Senate. I helped expand the Child Tax Credit, which cut childhood poverty nearly in half. I passed a bill to ban insurance companies from surprise hospital bills. I introduced the first bill to ban members of Congress from becoming lobbyists. And I’ve tried to lead by example by rejecting corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money. I have spent years traveling to every corner of our state, building relationships and convening Coloradans to take on our greatest challenges and solve them. Wherever I've gone, I have fought for and delivered meaningful change. And I believe that's exactly what Colorado's working families need today. That's why I'm running for governor. Because I know that together, we can rebuild our middle class, make our economy work for us all and make this the best state to raise a family. Together is the only way. The best line of defense against Donald Trump’s extreme agenda is in the states. And I know Colorado can provide the vision our country urgently needs. And with the biggest end-of-quarter deadline yet of this race just over 72 hours away , this people-powered campaign will not have the resources to make it happen without a groundswell of grassroots support from people like you, starting now. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = With my deepest gratitude, Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Friend,
When Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans unveiled their brazen scheme to rig Congress in their favor, Gov. Gavin Newsom didn’t hesitate. He fought back — and now Proposition 50 is on the ballot as our firewall.
That fight comes to its biggest challenge yet in just 72 hours when the only FEC End-of-Quarter filing deadline of this special election closes. Every dollar we raise before then will be reported publicly. The press, MAGA Republicans, and Donald Trump himself will look to see if California Democrats are rising to the challenge.
We’ve already made incredible progress:
✔️ Countless doors knocked from Oakland to Riverside, Orange County to Sacramento, and every corner of the state;
✔️ Literature printed in multiple languages to cut through GOP dark money mailers and ads;
✔️ Volunteers stepping up every weekend to power this movement.
But our grassroots campaigns run on tight budgets and we didn’t plan on having a major ballot initiative campaign in 2025. Unless we raise $15,000 before this FEC deadline, we won’t be able to keep scaling up our canvassing and literature distribution. Will you donate now to stand with Gov. Newsom and defend Prop 50? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-sept25-redistricting?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-sept25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]Here’s the truth, team:
Every canvass shift we add means hundreds more voters hearing the facts about Prop 50 instead of lies from Trump or dark money mailers.
Every stack of literature we print means another neighborhood or community event armed with the truth.
Every donation sent before the FEC deadline sends a message: California Democrats will not back down.
We’re staring down MAGA super PACs pouring millions into deceptive ads. But Prop 50 gives us the power to stop Trump’s rigging plan cold — and show the country what real democracy looks like.
With just 72 hours left until our FEC End-of-Quarter Filing Deadline, will you chip in to keep our momentum growing? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-sept25-redistricting?refcode=&amount=]

Can you chip in before our numbers are released for the world to see?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116062686/572349648/-2097022923?refcode=email_092725_nonsense&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTY1ZTZjYi1jNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0O4bwI7XsDjgMGZQMckAiK5iZU5P8FEsFZzONiDKxWo=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116062689/572349665/-2097022923?refcode=email_092725_nonsense&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTY1ZTZjYi1jNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0O4bwI7XsDjgMGZQMckAiK5iZU5P8FEsFZzONiDKxWo=)
---
Here’s the situation: Club for Growth, a Donald Trump allied super PAC, just launched an ad campaign urging Kansas politicians to re-draw our state’s Congressional maps. Their claim? Democrats like _me_ are making elections unfair.
**Nonsense doesn’t even begin to describe it.** Texas Republicans just re-drew their maps to kick FIVE Democrats out of office without the input of voters. Missouri and Indiana Republicans are prepared to do the same.
But according to these billionaire-funded attacks, apparently _Democrats are_ the ones trying to rig elections... despite being the only Kansas Democrat in Washington... which is currently under total Republican control.
It’s ridiculous. But make no mistake: Blatant lies like this have won elections before — and they could very well flip KS-03 red next year if we don’t fight back.
[_**Our next fundraising deadline is just three days out, and we’re still falling well short of where we need to be given this new wave of super PAC spending. Please, can you rush any amount you can to make sure our team has everything we need to defeat the Kansas GOP’s latest gerrymandering scheme?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116062693/572349678/-2097022923?refcode=email_092725_nonsense&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTY1ZTZjYi1jNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0O4bwI7XsDjgMGZQMckAiK5iZU5P8FEsFZzONiDKxWo=)

clean_body: Blatant lies like this have won elections before — and they could very well flip KS-03 red next year if we don’t fight back = = | | = Here’s the situation: Club for Growth, a Donald Trump allied super PAC, just launched an ad campaign urging Kansas politicians to re-draw our state’s Congressional maps. Their claim? Democrats like me are making elections unfair. Nonsense doesn’t even begin to describe it. Texas Republicans just re-drew their maps to kick FIVE Democrats out of office without the input of voters. Missouri and Indiana Republicans are prepared to do the same. But according to these billionaire-funded attacks, apparently Democrats are the ones trying to rig elections... despite being the only Kansas Democrat in Washington... which is currently under total Republican control. It’s ridiculous. But make no mistake: Blatant lies like this have won elections before — and they could very well flip KS-03 red next year if we don’t fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Fellow Conservative,

The partisan divide gripping our nation has turned Washington into a warzone of its own—fierce, unrelenting, and filled with entrenched elites more interested in power than progress.

_**As a Navy SEAL, I’ve faced harsh environments and impossible odds, from battlefields abroad to the political arena at home. Those experiences taught me how to stay calm under pressure, broker compromise, and accomplish the mission—no matter the stakes.**_

I’m Sen. Tim Sheehy, and I’m in the U.S. Senate to serve you, not the special interests or partisan extremists. The liberal media and their allies attack me for my resolve to challenge the status quo and expose the waste and corruption draining our nation. They fear leaders who put America first and refuse to bow to their agenda.

My SEAL background gives me a unique perspective:**I know how to navigate chaos, build bridges, and lower temperatures in even the most hostile settings.** In Congress, I’m fighting for practical solutions—securing our borders, strengthening our economy, and restoring accountability in government.

**But I can’t do it alone.**

Democrats are outraising us, and they’re voting in elections that, to put it simply, we’re not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate.

What happens when that complacency extends to U.S. House and Senate races?

We lose.

I can’t abide by that - and I don’t believe you can either - _**so I’m sounding the alarm right now.**_

Fellow Conservative, I need your support to keep pushing for a stronger, united America. Together, we can reject the elites' divisive tactics and build a future that honors the sacrifices of our forefathers.

clean_body: Democrats are outraising us, and they’re voting in elections that, to put it simply, we’re not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate. | Fellow Conservative, The partisan divide gripping our nation has turned Washington into a warzone of its own—fierce, unrelenting, and filled with entrenched elites more interested in power than progress. As a Navy SEAL, I’ve faced harsh environments and impossible odds, from battlefields abroad to the political arena at home. Those experiences taught me how to stay calm under pressure, broker compromise, and accomplish the mission—no matter the stakes. I’m Sen. Tim Sheehy, and I’m in the U.S. Senate to serve you, not the special interests or partisan extremists. The liberal media and their allies attack me for my resolve to challenge the status quo and expose the waste and corruption draining our nation. They fear leaders who put America first and refuse to bow to their agenda. My SEAL background gives me a unique perspective:I know how to navigate chaos, build bridges, and lower temperatures in even the most hostile settings. In Congress, I’m fighting for practical solutions—securing our borders, strengthening our economy, and restoring accountability in government. But I can’t do it alone. Democrats are outraising us, and they’re voting in elections that, to put it simply, we’re not voting in. Recently, voter complacency in Iowa cost Republicans a super-majority in the Iowa Senate. What happens when that complacency extends to U.S. House and Senate races? We lose. I can’t abide by that - and I don’t believe you can either - so I’m sounding the alarm right now. Fellow Conservative, I need your support to keep pushing for a stronger, united America. Together, we can reject the elites' divisive tactics and build a future that honors the sacrifices of our forefathers. - to fuel this fight to fuel this fight to fuel this fight The attacks from partisan outlets won’t stop—they’re desperate to protect their broken system. But with your help, we can stay focused on delivering results for the American people. If they silence voices like mine, they’ll come for yours next. clean_body: Quick update on where Josh Harder stands ahead of his end-of-quarter deadline | | = Peter, I want to give you an important update on where my friend Josh Harder stands. The past few months, we have seen Republicans roll out their plan to win the 2026 midterms. The latest polls reveal House Democrats are up by just ONE POINT in the race to take back the House. This election will be neck-and-neck and extreme MAGA Republicans have already raised an unprecedented $15 MILLION to defeat us. We have a major opportunity here, but we can’t take on these billionaire donors alone. That’s where you come in, Peter. House Democrats need your support now more than ever to grow our lead, fight back against their billionaire funded war chest and put our winning strategy into action. Josh is in a must-win district that is essential to take back the House. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Keep the faith, Hakeem Jeffries *

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. Because Republicans are firmly behind Donald Trump’s agenda, pushing cuts to healthcare, food assistance, and education programs that millions rely on just to get by.
Because our end-of-quarter FEC deadline is almost here, and every dollar will make our grassroots movement stronger.
Because when thousands of supporters each give just $1, it proves that our campaign is powered by people — not special interests or corporations.
One dollar might not sound like much, but together it makes all the difference. **[Will you chip in $1 (or more!) before our end-of-quarter deadline to help us protect our communities and take back the House in 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116063577/572352490/-559829547?amount=1&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_092725_EOQ04_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjA2ZjllZDgtYzg5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-tgIdjeIKsRK0J_yFHG_gujYDGkNWtZqSH7n274rtKA=)**

name: JanePAC Advocacy Team
subject: Don't let them sell off our public lands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Your voice matters more than Big Oil's money.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116063741/572353052/1328794144?refcode=ea.4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhZmFmODI5LWM5OWItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=objcR9erK5f0N83ZBqTxHQLwxSzIQ9SZ7D4PHSEnVwY=&emci=e769e321-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
Every year, **National Public Lands Day** reminds us that there is still good in this world. People come together to connect with the outdoors while volunteers put in real work to protect the places we all treasure. But at the same time, people like Donald Trump and Big Oil executives are working to destroy these places for profit. This year alone, he’s opened millions of acres of our public lands to drilling and mining companies. He's stripped away protections that took decades to put in place. And his so-called "Big Beautiful Bill" slashed $267 million in staff funding for the National Park Service and Bureau of Land Management right when our parks need them the most. Our public lands are so much more than beautiful landscapes. These spaces nurture the next generation of environmental stewards. They serve as some of the few remaining places where people can connect with the natural world. And in a world full of pollution, they remain sanctuaries of clean air and water. **These lands belong to the people.** **[That's why we're asking you to take 2 minutes today, on National Public Lands Day, to join us and send a message to Congress urging them to protect our public lands from further deregulation, funding and personnel cuts, and being sold off to private developers.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116063747/572353060/2017241920?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4%26ms%3Dea.4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&refcode=ea.4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhZmFmODI5LWM5OWItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=objcR9erK5f0N83ZBqTxHQLwxSzIQ9SZ7D4PHSEnVwY=&emci=e769e321-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)** | [**WRITE TO CONGRESS →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116063752/572353067/2017241920?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4%26ms%3Dea.4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&refcode=ea.4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhZmFmODI5LWM5OWItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=objcR9erK5f0N83ZBqTxHQLwxSzIQ9SZ7D4PHSEnVwY=&emci=e769e321-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4afaf829-c99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
We know it can sometimes feel like we can’t make a difference when it comes to this administration. But we believe when we raise our voices together, even the most powerful politicians have to listen.
In fact, just earlier this year, overwhelming pressure from letters like these forced Senator Mike Lee to back down from including a drastic expansion of public lands sales in Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill.
Our public lands have survived a lot, but they won't survive if we stay quiet.
Thank you for speaking out with us,
– JanePAC advocacy team

clean_body: Your voice matters more than Big Oil's money. | Every year, National Public Lands Day reminds us that there is still good in this world. People come together to connect with the outdoors while volunteers put in real work to protect the places we all treasure. But at the same time, people like Donald Trump and Big Oil executives are working to destroy these places for profit. This year alone, he’s opened millions of acres of our public lands to drilling and mining companies. He's stripped away protections that took decades to put in place. And his so-called "Big Beautiful Bill" slashed $267 million in staff funding for the National Park Service and Bureau of Land Management right when our parks need them the most. Our public lands are so much more than beautiful landscapes. These spaces nurture the next generation of environmental stewards. They serve as some of the few remaining places where people can connect with the natural world. And in a world full of pollution, they remain sanctuaries of clean air and water. These lands belong to the people. | We know it can sometimes feel like we can’t make a difference when it comes to this administration. But we believe when we raise our voices together, even the most powerful politicians have to listen. In fact, just earlier this year, overwhelming pressure from letters like these forced Senator Mike Lee to back down from including a drastic expansion of public lands sales in Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill. Our public lands have survived a lot, but they won't survive if we stay quiet. Thank you for speaking out with us, – JanePAC advocacy team = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Derek, did you hear the news? John just committed ****$100,000**** to PA Dems !!️
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51704?t=2&akid=10331%2E434096%2EGlbAXz)
If you’re ready to win up and down the ballot, _right now_ is when your donation matters most. Here's why:
**1️⃣ Big goal, big impact** – hitting $100K sets the tone for 2026 from the start.
**2️⃣ Dems need it early** – campaigns can’t build strong infrastructure without early support.
3️⃣**Make a statement** – end-of-quarter numbers go public. We have to show the GOP we’re fired up and ready to fight.
John set this urgent goal because he knows PA Dems need resources _now_ – not next year, not later, but right at the beginning when it counts most.
**[So please, will you help us hit $100K by midnight Tuesday, fuel the hard work it takes to flip seats, and show Republicans this grassroots team is _all-in_ to turn PA blue ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51704?t=3&akid=10331%2E434096%2EGlbAXz)**** _🔵?_**

---
| Peter,

I wanted to reach out today about something that’s been on my mind.

**White men are overrepresented in Congress.** Too many voices and perspectives — especially from women, immigrants, and communities of color — are missing when critical decisions are made about our lives.

In both the primary and the general election, _**I’m the only non-white male candidate in this race.**_

I wanted to call this out because representation matters! It’s also why organizations like **EMILY’s List, BOLD PAC, and Latino Victory Fund have stepped up so early to endorse my campaign.** They believe in our mission and know it’s time for a change in Washington.

Look, I’m proud to be Latina. I wouldn’t change it for the world. But candidates like me who don’t fit the usual mold typically don’t get the same insider support or resources. We have to build this campaign the hard way, from the ground up.

And right now, with just 3 days left until our FEC filing deadline, we need to prove that this campaign has the strength to break barriers and win.

[_**If you agree that it’s time for new voices in Congress, will you make a donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116063892/572353532/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-09-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGY5YTQ0ZWQtYzk5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b63YdH2IpK1I4WHsxdXcbSjmuUKALFqy36iIz4NpVTY=)

clean_body: | | Peter — We are forwarding Mitch’s note because he’s right: if we don’t close the gap before the end of the month, we’re walking into October already behind. That’s why this EOQ push matters so much. We can’t afford to miss the mark. = Begin forwarded message: Peter, The Pennsylvania GOP just spent the last month bending over backwards for Donald Trump, blocking a real budget, pushing through tax giveaways for billionaires, and scheming to flip our Supreme Court with Leonard Leo and Jeff Yass’s dark money. That’s the reality we’re up against. And it’s why this deadline isn’t just about numbers on a spreadsheet. If we don’t raise $7,000 before the end of the month, we’re not going to have the resources to fight back in the way this moment demands. I won’t sugarcoat it, Republicans are outspending us and betting we’ll burn out. = | | = When people ask me what’s at stake, I point to the basics: making sure Pennsylvanians keep their right to vote, their access to health care, and a court that answers to the people, not the MAGA fringe. That’s what your donation today is protecting. = | = — Mitch Kates = | Follow us on , , , and ! Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party. body:

---
Peter, Kim has spent her career fighting to protect children and families.

As the only pediatrician in Congress, she knows that vaccine safety isn't up for debate—it saves lives. That's why she's been sounding the alarm about RFK Jr. and calling for his resignation.

His long and troubling record of spreading lies about vaccines and undermining public health is dangerous for everyone. And when Congress called him out for his reckless views, RFK said, “I don't think people should be taking medical advice from me.”

Extreme Republicans gave RFK Jr. a platform, one he knows he doesn't have the qualifications to have, and now, millions of Americans' lives are at risk.

_**Here’s just a few of the anti-science policies he's enacted since taking control of the Department of Health and Human Services:**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116064012/572353942/-2117271196?refcode=em25_250927_eoq3_fndd_gq_act___DKS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250927_eoq3_fndd_gq_act___DKS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=ef11121b-ca9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjExMTIxYi1jYTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxdudgQuvoBk4VWOqGg4ycrUfaPwK9tjoJEVB3xTxhA=) We need leaders in Congress who will stand up for science, for families, and for the truth. What we don’t need are more Republicans who will continue to enable dangerous leaders like RFK Jr. and Trump. **It's on us to flip the House and put a much needed check on this administration.**

clean_body: Peter, Kim has spent her career fighting to protect children and families. As the only pediatrician in Congress, she knows that vaccine safety isn't up for debate—it saves lives. That's why she's been sounding the alarm about RFK Jr. and calling for his resignation. His long and troubling record of spreading lies about vaccines and undermining public health is dangerous for everyone. And when Congress called him out for his reckless views, RFK said, “I don't think people should be taking medical advice from me.” Extreme Republicans gave RFK Jr. a platform, one he knows he doesn't have the qualifications to have, and now, millions of Americans' lives are at risk. Here’s just a few of the anti-science policies he's enacted since taking control of the Department of Health and Human Services: = We need leaders in Congress who will stand up for science, for families, and for the truth. What we don’t need are more Republicans who will continue to enable dangerous leaders like RFK Jr. and Trump. It's on us to flip the House and put a much needed check on this administration. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, DrKimSchrier.com Rep. name: Heidi Hall for Congress
subject: Do you think Kiley gets treats from Trump?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Friend,
I know Daisy, my dog (pic below), loves a good Milk-Bone treat after she does something that I ask or performs a little trick.
Do you think that our opponent, Kevin Kiley, gets treats from Trump for being his good little lapdog?
If you do, can you chip in $10 and help us buy Kiley a couple of packs of dog treats so that he can stop putting our district at risk by following Trump's every order? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
I wish I was joking, but Kiley's obsession with pleasing Trump has reached an extreme, and he has thrown our district under the bus every time the President has come calling.
Whether it was when Kiley voted to take healthcare away from thousands of people in our district with Trump's budget bill or when he joined the fight to help the Republican Party rig the midterm elections so that they can keep control of Congress.
When Trump says, "jump," Kiley asks, "how high?"
His selfishness and careerism have made him forget what his duty is to the people of our district, and it's time we unseated him and elected a leader who actually knows what our rural communities need.
Friend, I'm not afraid to stand up for what's right, and I will never play political games with our future. That's what makes me unpopular with the D.C. elite, the Super PACs that support Kiley, and the Republican Party leadership that wants a lapdog for Trump in this seat.
Our campaign needs your support, especially as we get deeper and deeper into this race. If you're able to, will you please make a grassroots contribution to our campaign for Congress today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250927_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

clean_body: | = This is huge. The race to flip CA‐22 from red to blue is emerging as the Democrats’ #1 pickup opportunity in the country. As you know, California’s newly-proposed congressional maps, set to be voted on in November, would add thousands of Democratic voters into CA‐22. Reports show these changes would cement CA-22 as a pure toss-up. What happens here will likely decide which party holds the majority after the 2026 midterm. = = | | = Republican mega-donors are already lining up to flood the Central Valley with desperate ads to save incumbent Republican David Valadao. Even former House Speaker Kevin McCarthy is reemerging -- promising $100 million to protect vulnerable CA districts like CA-22. CA-22 race is the new focal point in the fight for a House majority, and Randy Villegas is running a corporate-free campaign powered by grassroots supporters. Derek’s race isn’t just competitive, it’s been declared a pure toss-up by every major election analyst. And with Republicans holding the House by only three seats, this district could determine who controls Congress in 2026. That’s why his FEC end-of-quarter report matters so much. The GOP has already launched attack ads in CA-45, and they’re counting on Derek being outspent. = | = I’ve campaigned with Derek in Orange County and seen firsthand his passion for service. From his Army service to his fight as a consumer rights attorney, Derek has dedicated his life to protecting people who are too often left behind. We need voices like his in Congress – not just for CA-45, but for the entire country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Adam Schiff U.S. Senator, California | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. To support Derek's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please click . Derek Tran for Congress 10441 Stanford Avenue #395 Garden Grove, CA 92842 United States

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Vengeful partisans are behind this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
After a filibuster, the Texas state Senate passed these extreme new districts. This didn't need to happen, but vengeful partisans who want to restrict voting and protect their power are worried about next year's elections and want to tilt the playing field in advance. They know they can't win on their unpopular polices while the economy is tanking and Trump's tariffs make everything more expensive.
Extreme gerrymandering is just another form of voter suppression. RUSH $25 or more right now to stand with us in favor of fair maps and equal representation >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092725_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NYT: Texas House Approves Redistricting Maps, Just as Trump Wanted [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092725_1&amount=25]
Team: As much as we wanted to stop them, Texas's new gerrymandered maps have been signed into law . Court challenges are pending.
Remember, President Trump was so scared about the upcoming midterm elections that he pressured Texas legislators into an " aggressively partisan congressional map " — and possibly five new seats in the U.S. House next year for his party.
Needless to say, this didn't need to happen. While opponents of voting rights run Texas and have for decades, their state was already extremely gerrymandered to protect their own power. These new maps aim to dilute the voting power of the state’s Black and brown voters, harming Texans around the state and making it harder for them to have their voices heard in their elections.
Whether it's Texas, or Florida, or Indiana (or California and New York) or any other state that's considering partisan gerrymanders, this constant escalation will only silence more potential voters and leave citizens less pleased with their elections and their representation.
Extreme partisan gerrymanders depress turnout and drive down voter enthusiasm for participation in our elections. Help us fight back for fair maps with $25 or whatever you can today in Texas and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092725_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=092725_1&amount=35]
President Obama said it best this week: " Over the long term, we shouldn't have political gerrymandering in America, just a fair fight between Republicans and Democrats based on who's got better ideas ."
He continued: " Texas is taking direction from a partisan White House and gerrymandering in the middle of a decade to try and maintain the House despite their unpopular policies ". This gerrymandering effort is simply a MAGA protection program.
It's also clear this is a racial gerrymander. For every 445,000 white Texans, there will be one congressional representative. That number rises for Hispanic Texans to 1.4 million residents for the same representation. For Black Texans, it takes 2 million residents for the same level of representation. Gov. Greg Abbott originally used a letter from Trump's Department of Justice to claim their previous map was racially biased in favor of Texas' Black and brown residents. He's now walking those comments back in the face of the pending legal challenges.
Fair maps and fair representation would mean those numbers were equal. Fair maps wouldn't look like a swirling vortex meant to grab *just enough* voters of certain demographics or party registration to spread them out and dilute their strength. Fair representation wouldn't be pushed through mid-decade at the request of a desperate president trying to distract from a failing economy and his involvement with an underage sex scandal.
Opponents of voting rights will stop at nothing in their pursuit of power and control. Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to protect voting rights and fair representation >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092725_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092725_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092725_1&amount=20]

A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Portland, OR 97280
United States

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

clean_body: Before you continue on with your weekend, can I count on your help? For as much time as it has taken you to open and read this email, you could click here and make a quick $7 donation to help my campaign hit our quarterly goal. | Hi Friend, Thanks for taking the time to open this on a weekend. I have a critical deadline on Tuesday night that I really need your help with. For as much time as it has taken you to open and read this email, Before you continue on with your weekend, can I count on your help? Thanks! Marty | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government. | PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

Dear Flyover Reader, We've been truly blown away by the response since launching our crowdfunding campaign. Over a thousand readers have already joined as investors and are now officially part of The Flyover ownership team. But we also know that many of you care deeply about The Flyover's mission, even if now isn't the right time to invest. Many of you have asked: _" How can I still support the team?"_ That's why we've created the [Flyover Tip Jar](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0L9uwyAQx_GnwZstfMZ_GBi6eKiUrh0RgXOgIgbBOVHevnLVoQ_Q9au7z_D7vOiLCTHstw9zR0Vb0g5dsIbQ6R2fNSIRFl2PnFMh8njGVzqoHJU0cBhbLluYNYX8boruG6c2RMChQdXP4yLlNA3QeOWukwDOJxyEcYtYpNissIsYxHUz42SboE6OS5j7pedD35lZciFHbk5GjCMTHF2gVLqvFHbyuMVXemDpbLo3UXmiXNnwxmBlsFa0R8HO7OgSnRcMVvLY_v4wWD3G3P5JTVEuP0OMoU4zE_x2NyH-2PQvwzwUfAcAAP__Dzh8Ig). It's a simple way for any reader who values fact-first, common-sense news to step in and help--even if an investment isn't possible. Friend, This is one of the hardest messages I’ve ever had to write.
I should have thanked you long ago. I should have said how much I appreciate your faith and trust. For too long, I’ve carried that unspoken gratitude — and today, I need you to hear it directly from me.
This isn’t just about looking back. It’s about what comes next. Because your support has never mattered more than it does right now.
That’s why I wrote you a personal note. It’s straight from the heart, and I want you to read it today.
---

to silence this movement and shut us down with expensive legal costs.

of the judges appointed by Greg Abbott—ruled unanimously that our First
Amendment rights had been violated.

They restored our ability to speak, to organize, and to fundraise. Even
Abbott’s own hand-picked judges couldn’t deny the truth: Paxton was wrong.

after us because he knows people power is the biggest threat to the

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Democrats just FLIPPED another House seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
But that’s not the worst part...
| Friend,
---
Believe me, the last thing I wanted to do was disturb your evening with another message.
---
But I truly had no choice.
---
**You see, the Democrats just won another special election – this time, in Arizona – to further reduce the size of our House GOP Majority.**
---
We now have almost _NO_ margin for error in the midterms!
---
_As it currently stands, the Democrats will need to FLIP a net of just 4 SEATS to take back control of the House and impeach the President over some bogus witch hunt._
---
To make matters even worse, the latest reports show House Republicans were “crushed” by the Democrats in fundraising last month.
---
**DCCC crushes NRCC in August fundraising**
---
Source: [_PUNCHBOWL NEWS_]
---
**If we don’t make up the difference by OUTRAISING the Democrats this month, the House majority that we fought so hard to win last November will be in jeopardy!**
---
**That is why, in my capacity as House GOP Leadership Chair, I’ve authorized a 500% MATCH for the next 60 minutes to help us absolutely CRUSH this critical goal before Tuesday’s FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline.**
---
It’s easy to assume that because we’re winning right now, we’ll keep winning in the midterms.
---
_But we cannot afford to underestimate the radical Left and the extreme lengths they’ll go to in order to DESTROY the President and his America First agenda._
---
We need to keep our foot on the gas from today all the way through Election Day – because trust me, that’s _exactly_ what the Democrats are doing...
---
_**And we can’t let these radicals get back into power, or everything we’ve accomplished since our historic victory last November could be wiped away in the blink of an eye.**_
---

clean_body: But that’s not the worst part... | Friend, Believe me, the last thing I wanted to do was disturb your evening with another message. But I truly had no choice. You see, the Democrats just won another special election – this time, in Arizona – to further reduce the size of our House GOP Majority. We now have almost NO margin for error in the midterms! As it currently stands, the Democrats will need to FLIP a net of just 4 SEATS to take back control of the House and impeach the President over some bogus witch hunt. To make matters even worse, the latest reports show House Republicans were “crushed” by the Democrats in fundraising last month. DCCC crushes NRCC in August fundraising Source: [PUNCHBOWL NEWS] If we don’t make up the difference by OUTRAISING the Democrats this month, the House majority that we fought so hard to win last November will be in jeopardy! That is why, in my capacity as House GOP Leadership Chair, I’ve authorized a 500% MATCH for the next 60 minutes to help us absolutely CRUSH this critical goal before Tuesday’s FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline. It’s easy to assume that because we’re winning right now, we’ll keep winning in the midterms. But we cannot afford to underestimate the radical Left and the extreme lengths they’ll go to in order to DESTROY the President and his America First agenda. We need to keep our foot on the gas from today all the way through Election Day – because trust me, that’s exactly what the Democrats are doing... And we can’t let these radicals get back into power, or everything we’ve accomplished since our historic victory last November could be wiped away in the blink of an eye. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

subject: Don’t let the GOP outraise us, Peter

body:
We don’t want to show any weakness.

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f4abd5a-70b3-4ce4-940d-fd83d5603050/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [Our campaign’s first FEC end-of-quarter filing deadline is just days away. Split a donation of any size between our team and Blue Amp Action to help meet our goal before time runs out.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T937a0d98-3ae0-450e-bdc9-e8fab969f7be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Hello Peter, I’m reaching out about our upcoming filing deadline — the first of our campaign so far — but I wanted to make sure you had some important context: Nationwide, Republicans and GOP-aligned groups have been outraising Democrats in the lead-up to next year’s midterm elections, and our election in North Carolina is expected to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history. My GOP opponent and his allies will be forced to make spending decisions they may not want to make based on what we can raise now, Peter. With all that in mind, it’s even more important for us to show our financial strength in this report. This is the most consequential Senate election of 2026, and if we win here, Democrats have the chance to take back the majority and stop the far-right’s extreme agenda. Meeting our fundraising goals is key to our chances of success in this toss-up race. But we have a long way to go to hit our end-of-quarter target, and we’re running out of time to get there. [We can’t risk allowing my GOP opponent to outraise us, so I need your help right away. Does a contribution, split between our campaign and Blue Amp Action, fit in your budget today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c29fc76-6f5b-46ba-9ffb-84a9177e73f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T637ae892-90c4-4a39-9857-d470e691d376/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Here’s why your support matters.

| |

Hi friend, I’m Morghan, Nellie Pou’s campaign manager. Every day, I work alongside Nellie to plan for what’s going to be one of the toughest elections in the country. While Nellie is fighting in Congress to lower costs, strengthen our economy, and protect our healthcare coverage, my job is to ensure that every single voter in NJ-09 hears her message. But we cannot do it without the resources to reach people where they are. The work we put in today will decide how strong our campaign is tomorrow. ### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. body:
72 hours. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116065861/572360164/823540626?refcode=ea.a5719fb6-ce9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.a5719fb6-ce9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcxOWZiNi1jZTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5rI7EYkVZATVIIbo2qbSJD8jD4hKSt4WJ3Epli-5GK0=&emci=309925ac-f09a-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a5719fb6-ce9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)
We know it’s a Saturday, Peter, but we wanted you to know why the next 3 days matter so much. To sum it up:
1. Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate with our priorities front and center: Health care access, clean energy growth, defending our right to vote and so, so much more.
2. The national GOP knows if we win this seat, we could flip the whole Senate blue and stop their dangerous agenda. That’s why they’re dumping money into this race. **In fact, this could even become the first billion-dollar Senate race. (Yep, billion with a B!)**
3. We need the resources to make sure voters get a chance to hear our message — and our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is just 3 days away.

**[If you understand what we’re up against, rush a contribution of $3 or whatever you can right now. >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116065862/572360165/88121354?amount=3&refcode=ea.a5719fb6-ce9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.a5719fb6-ce9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcxOWZiNi1jZTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5rI7EYkVZATVIIbo2qbSJD8jD4hKSt4WJ3Epli-5GK0=)** Peter, building a winning team and connecting with voters across all of North Carolina isn’t easy, and it doesn’t come cheap. Especially when the opposition has such deep pockets. But if you’re here with us, you know Roy’s not afraid of hard work, and he’s never shied away from a tough race. _And this one will be close._ **[Our extreme Republican opponent thinks that if he throws enough money at this race, he can overpower our people-centered campaign. Show him he’s wrong: Help us meet our goal today with a donation of $3 or any amount >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116065863/572360166/88121354?amount=3&refcode=ea.a5719fb6-ce9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.a5719fb6-ce9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcxOWZiNi1jZTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5rI7EYkVZATVIIbo2qbSJD8jD4hKSt4WJ3Epli-5GK0=)** Have a great rest of your weekend,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

clean_body: 72 hours. | We know it’s a Saturday, Peter, but we wanted you to know why the next 3 days matter so much. To sum it up: 1. Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate with our priorities front and center: Health care access, clean energy growth, defending our right to vote and so, so much more. 2. The national GOP knows if we win this seat, we could flip the whole Senate blue and stop their dangerous agenda. That’s why they’re dumping money into this race. In fact, this could even become the first billion-dollar Senate race. (Yep, billion with a B!) 3. We need the resources to make sure voters get a chance to hear our message — and our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is just 3 days away. = Peter, building a winning team and connecting with voters across all of North Carolina isn’t easy, and it doesn’t come cheap. Especially when the opposition has such deep pockets. But if you’re here with us, you know Roy’s not afraid of hard work, and he’s never shied away from a tough race. And this one will be close. = Have a great rest of your weekend, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = | = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116066116/572360995/-157209907?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOQ5_250927_T1_2_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmU1ZWZiMC1jZjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=63o5wMWbkUGRdqLZ_R0sTS4D3rYQP9MMN-FvuFtliJc=) Hi Derek, Jenny here again – Senator Warner’s Finance Director – with an important update.

Last month didn’t end the way we had hoped: we narrowly missed our fundraising goal – which means this month, we’re playing catch up before our end-of-quarter filing deadline.

If that’s all you need to hear, you can chip in right now to support Senator Warner’s reelection campaign at this secure link:

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250925-eoq**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116066117/572360996/-157209907?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOQ5_250927_T1_2_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmU1ZWZiMC1jZjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=63o5wMWbkUGRdqLZ_R0sTS4D3rYQP9MMN-FvuFtliJc=)

Falling short would be concerning for any campaign under any circumstances – but right now, for ours, it's particularly bad news. You see, right-wing conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer has been attacking Senator Warner with a barrage of dangerous lies online.

These weren’t just some unhinged tweets, Derek. She called for Mark to be**“removed from office.”** She said he should be**“tried for treason.”** She pushed the Trump administration to cancel his meeting with intelligence officials – **and they caved.**

As if that weren't enough, Donald Trump then went on television in the Oval Office to smear Mark’s record for Virginia, saying he’s "among the worst” Democrats.

**That’s the kind of pressure we’re up against.**

So when our numbers go public at the end of the month, we need to be ready for our fundraising reports to be scrutinized by Laura Loomer, Donald Trump, and all their special interest allies that want to take down Senator Warner as he stands up and speaks out against Trump’s reckless, dangerous administration.

_We need to prove we have the strength – and the grassroots support – to fight back against any attack they throw our way._

[**_So please, Derek, we can’t afford to come up short again this month. Can we count on you to pitch in to Mark Warner’s reelection campaign so we can protect this seat and flip the balance of power in name: American Patriot Daily
subject: The Secret Service is investigating this awful attack on Trump

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: super quick, Peter –
body:
Peter,

From putting our tax dollars to work here at home to giving small businesses a fair shake, working to lower costs and more – I’m staying true to my commitment to put working families and rural communities above partisan politics in Congress.

But with control of the House hanging in the balance and far-right extremists looking to expand their control of the basic functions of our government, I’m also the #1 target for attack ads and heavy spending from folks who want to kick me out.

The Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline coming up on Tuesday is our chance to prove that the same grassroots support that won this district twice is fired up to win again. My team set a goal of raising another $50,000 before September ends. Will you chip in toward that goal today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-fr-2509?amount=10]If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

DONATE $10 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-fr-2509?amount=10&express_lane=true] DONATE $25 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-fr-2509?amount=25&express_lane=true]
DONATE $50 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-fr-2509?amount=50&express_lane=true] DONATE $75 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-fr-2509?amount=75&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-fr-2509?amount=100&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-fr-2509?amount=15]

Ultra-far-right groups have been constantly launching attack ads for months, and now that we have a new GOP opponent backed by special interests and national party bosses, we need to catch up quickly to stay on track in this race.

Pundits, political operatives, and right-wing megadonors are ready to pounce at any sign of weakness in such a crucial toss-up race.

Will you donate today to make sure we can counter the far-right’s megadonors in this competitive race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-fr-2509?amount=10]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-fr-2509?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-fr-2509?amount=10]

Thank you,

Marie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgpvf-em-footer?amount=25]
Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington!
Make a grassroots contribution now to help power Marie’s campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgp-victory-fund-1?refcode=footer&amount=25]
Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/J9Dc25pEuEilBkYRyyOYLQ2] to only receive the most important messages.

Unsubscribe [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4K4yXT77NUaumtgFpjZPzQ2?unsubscribedata=u2SsiArmvmi85xfhS2Uul5UhITt55nCsw63BcWW%2BTaFVS1rrrN%2Bs6k0JPvH1YdfD%2FsXwSrRGUuy1u69eF2gxmmFIEU8fdO9gWvfzBbETprVNSBN5uO0R3cpoidLuqdsSffPlkynd2nlMXTkRGoo9RccVvYE0YemT0nHwhTjMuywbsevfZEImieKasIGBKZzwZdJujPpw%2Bp3gCnYXgYoquXeT%2FwV1x9WAE8t6qPVcgT6QLOy6zUErKLUZm8w3KoZNRnmq3Db95hetUvCbA%2BPWzsB9qZKEDuvJ5gnkC3M1vZjMuNJJSPrP8O6CEYWI8mc%2BS7Uqc8OJ57JvU4XjMl7KS8WYOWBd0UOtMVgKYqnCSFNVEIwYYkOXOoYGhPuiAnjWJWB5dPYABkUlsqC%2FLHMk6nymoz8UkFacOvVqV0r6Q4hXYDNjEn2oUPhKPkMa0jfc]

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: Claim your "We Are Charlie Kirk" wristband today
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
Tell the world you're standing for faith, family, and freedom. | | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t39g3c&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, _We are Charlie Kirk._ That's the rally cry of millions of Americans — and the message they carry with their "We are Charlie Kirk" wristbands.
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t39g3c&__onlt=h)
---
We want you to have one. To join the movement carrying Charlie's legacy forward. **When you give any amount today, we'll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the mission we carry on.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t39g3c&__onlt=h)
---
This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction.
Of courage.
Of the movement Charlie built. **When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited.** Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. **Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t39g3c&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Charlie stood fearlessly for truth, freedom, and the next generation. _Now it's our turn._ Tell the world: You're unafraid to stand with Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA to save America. Make your first gift today and claim your wristband as a symbol of the mission you've joined.
---
**For Charlie,** The Turning Point USA Team
---

name: Crow for Congress
subject: Three days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
We’re just three days away from our quarterly FEC deadline, and here’s the record we have for you:

2025 Supporter Record for you
2025 Supporter: NO Suggested Contribution: $15
PITCH IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-sep25]

Jason is fighting hard in Washington to make life affordable for families — whether it’s lowering the cost of health care, expanding access to child care, or ensuring that everyone has a safe, affordable place to live.

But while Jason works to deliver for the people he serves, his Republican colleagues are doing the opposite . Extreme MAGA Republicans prioritized taking away health care coverage from millions of Americans in order to give massive tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations.

Jason knows exactly what’s at stake, and he’s not backing down. But to keep up this fight, he’s relying on grassroots supporters like you. Will you pitch in before our deadline passes next week? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-sep25]

name: Patty Murray
subject: Big news out of Ohio >> FWD: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We've never needed Sherrod Brown's voice in the Senate more.
Hi, Peter – just making sure you saw the big news out of Ohio.
---
**Because I'll be real with you:** With just 47 senators in the Democratic caucus, we're extremely limited in what we can do in the minority. Electing Sherrod Brown means Democrats have a real shot at winning a Senate majority that could hold Trump accountable in a significant way.
Everyday costs on everything from health care to groceries are skyrocketing thanks directly to Trump’s policies, and we've never needed Sherrod's voice in the Senate more.
This dear friend and former colleague has always had the courage to stand up and fight to do what's right by working Americans of all stripes. **But after dark-money groups poured _hundreds of millions of dollars_ into Ohio last fall to unseat him, it's going to take all of us in his corner to ensure they won't succeed again this time.**
So when he reached out to me for help, the best way I could was by passing along his message, in his own words, to top grassroots supporters like you.
**[Please split a donation between my campaign and Sherrod's campaign now to help him flip Ohio's seat and get back to what he does best: defending the Dignity of Work in the U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116067547/572365903/1546905256?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk550-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWU3YzkyNi1kNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JJE9xxTkhj6lEd614fcYeASAKcnjEX11fqnlPKcm8sM=)**
And now, I'll let him take it from here – thank you,
Patty Murray
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sherrod Brown**
Date: Monday, August 18, 2025 at 11:18 A.M.
Subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
| | |
---
Peter,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
[**Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Patty Murray and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116067549/572365904/1546905256?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk550-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWU3YzkyNi1kNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JJE9xxTkhj6lEd614fcYeASAKcnjEX11fqnlPKcm8sM=)
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable.
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
**[Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $25 or $5 now, split between Patty Murray and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116067552/572365908/1546905256?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk550-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWU3YzkyNi1kNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JJE9xxTkhj6lEd614fcYeASAKcnjEX11fqnlPKcm8sM=)**
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=gJJUJPF77xm6WXzDg6Adogedx9dMqNoqrRABmuLIgAGYWHSoiVh3R0gHUJtoHgnFMV9zSDmmNSNMe%2BnCgUzxAxMDd3UNvuorzOL0c4MoXH1PhHruMmq%2Fscn0sVQGdlkLktrAtWvOc%2FwmjgH80YlikMCNk9hwETPvqFlQuciCkHhxV6XaKhtI2MTrAv%2FxGmJXAH%2BQlwIHjpaTjbH0i50X1Pl0HzZQScEiGtsHA3hxm1M4LtYozFyCEomUMSTy3GeYZQavCO0CE87Y4Y0U4xmpLvZyjANLTxalpBncdDrju5ESeeRNbaes9MKX0P%2BQT9jAAvumWzt3RdEnNdQb%2BDjkCAQfkPn8zi1CbTR4xTNlUOe17%2FyE2Mc41w69rfBPduu8LS6YXiBV9Xi5itGmAHZnLC5ipO1VDBGuropNynXv0z51hDywnH6vPo8cPnCa2nat) People for Patty Murray
