clean_body: We've never needed Sherrod Brown's voice in the Senate more. Hi, Peter – just making sure you saw the big news out of Ohio. Because I'll be real with you: With just 47 senators in the Democratic caucus, we're extremely limited in what we can do in the minority. Electing Sherrod Brown means Democrats have a real shot at winning a Senate majority that could hold Trump accountable in a significant way. Everyday costs on everything from health care to groceries are skyrocketing thanks directly to Trump’s policies, and we've never needed Sherrod's voice in the Senate more. This dear friend and former colleague has always had the courage to stand up and fight to do what's right by working Americans of all stripes. But after dark-money groups poured hundreds of millions of dollars into Ohio last fall to unseat him, it's going to take all of us in his corner to ensure they won't succeed again this time. So when he reached out to me for help, the best way I could was by passing along his message, in his own words, to top grassroots supporters like you. = And now, I'll let him take it from here – thank you, Patty Murray \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Sherrod Brown Date: Monday, August 18, 2025 at 11:18 A.M. Subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight. | | | Peter, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. = I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: = I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Update from Ernest Lineberger, July 27, 2025
body:
Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

Wow! I haven’t sent one of this type email for over two months.
We have been busy with a lot of things ramping up and moving this campaign
for 2026 along. We have been working on our infrastructure, our
fundraising, our message, and keeping up with all of the news. My plan is
to keep this brief.

INVITATION: This Thursday, October 2, 2025 is our 2026 Campaign
Launch Event in Oldtown Lewisville at Sparrow on Main (105 E Main St,
Lewisville, Texas, a very pretty venue) with light food, cash bar, subtle
music, and more. There will be time to mingle followed by a program of
short speeches from some key members of our community (including me). It’s
a fundraiser, but tickets start as low as $0. For more info and tickets,
use link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ernestlaunch

Volunteers: I want to make this easy on everybody. Here’s the
plan. When you sign up to volunteer, it is with no obligation on your
part. We will put your contact info on our volunteer list. From time to
time, when we have emerging needs for volunteers, we will send out an email
to the list saying what we need. If you can help with that, you reply
directly to the email. If not, no action needed on your part. No need to
apologize or send a doctor’s note. Easy-Peasy. To get on or make sure you
are on the volunteer list, just reply to this email with your preferred
contact info.

What kind of volunteer opportunities? For events, we may need
someone to check people in at the door, or collect donations for campaign
merchandise, take photos, etc. Block walking is going to be a thing soon.
And more. But it is always no obligation (but volunteer and come anyway,
it will be fun).

Other calendar events:

Monday, Sept 29, 6:30 – 8:15, Progressive Leaders Special open house and
panel discussion at the Landmark Grill, Justin Road, Lewisville, TX

Thursday, Oct 2nd, 6:30 – 8:30, 2026 Campaign Launch Event at Sparrow on
Main (see above)

Saturday, Oct 4th, Meet Clayton Tucker for Texas AG Commissioner in
Savannah, TX at Team Tucker BBQ with Dems 380. Use link for more info and
tickets: https://www.claytontuckertx.com/peanuts_bbq?recruiter_id=4408398
More info on Clayton Tucker: https://www.claytontuckertx.com/

Saturday, Oct 18th, No Kings protests nationwide. I plan to be at the
Frisco Event 9:30 – 11 and then the Flower Mound Event from 2 – 4 PM.
There are events in Denton, Dallas, Garland, Arlington, and many more. Use
this Link to find the one(s) that suit you.
https://www.mobilize.us/nokings/?tag_ids=27849

Early Voting: Oct 20 – 31, 2025

Election Day: November 4, 2025

If you live in Lewisville ISD, Michelle Alkhatib is our preferred candidate
for School Board. She has been a great school Board member and is running
again. Her opponent is a late entry backed by a right-wing group that
doesn’t like Michelle’s last name.

If you live in Texas, we have 17 constitutional amendments. I recommend
that you pre-print your sample ballot. Use link:
https://www.lonestarleft.com/p/texas-2025-constitutional-amendments to help
make your decisions. This link leaves some recommendations “neutral”.
Some of the County Democratic Parties have lists that are similar with
minor differences.

Thank you so much for your continued support! We are building to make the
2026 election fall in the favor of the people. Putting People’s Needs
First!
Ernest Lineberger
Democratic Candidate for US House of Representatives (Texas CD26)
LinebergerforUScongress.com
Check out my book on Amazon.com, ‘There I Was...:Life Memories from Ernest
Lineberger

subject: Every state legislative race = a battle for our Constitution
body:
Why electing women to state legislatures matters more than ever |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116067890/572367553/93694709?sourceid=1057076&refcode=WUEFE959_20250927_SLInvest_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWVmZmM3ZS1kNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0k9RPXhglX3fPmL6HlfgvcKU5CtOASDDnQ8kjL7hsx4=&emci=bdeffc7e-d49b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=beeffc7e-d49b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116067894/572367566/-140265690?sourceid=1057076&refcode=WUEFE959_20250927_SLInvest_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWVmZmM3ZS1kNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0k9RPXhglX3fPmL6HlfgvcKU5CtOASDDnQ8kjL7hsx4=) Hi Peter,

As America prepares to celebrate the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence, the fight to protect those very freedoms has never been more urgent.

**Republicans are just six states away from having the power to call a constitutional convention.** That's right: the GOP is terrifyingly close to having the power to reshape the U.S. Constitution itself.

[**Before I explain how we plan to take back power, Peter, we are running an End-of-Quarter Match Fund to raise $300,000. Will you chip in and have your donation MATCHED and support Democratic pro-choice women running for office up and down the ballot?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116067896/572367573/-877057620?sourceid=1057076&refcode=WUEFE959_20250927_SLInvest_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWVmZmM3ZS1kNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0k9RPXhglX3fPmL6HlfgvcKU5CtOASDDnQ8kjL7hsx4=) | [TAKE BACK POWER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116067897/572367575/-140265690?sourceid=1057076&refcode=WUEFE959_20250927_SLInvest_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWVmZmM3ZS1kNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0k9RPXhglX3fPmL6HlfgvcKU5CtOASDDnQ8kjL7hsx4=)
---
This isn't some conspiracy theory — it's an actual strategy that Republicans have gone so far as to _hold mock conventions to prepare for._ This is the same party whose leaders told state legislatures in Texas to weaponize gerrymandering to tilt the 2026 midterm elections in the GOP's favor. Local Republicans will always fall in line. At any moment, they could target our fundamental freedoms written into the Constitution.

This is exactly why EMILYs List exists. For nearly 40 years, we've been investing in flipping chambers and electing Democratic pro-choice women to state legislatures — because state power is national power. Republicans know it, and so do we.

Every woman we elect to a state legislature is another brick in the wall protecting our Constitution.**Every statehouse flip is another state saved from Republican cruelty and chaos.**

State legislatures are the first place reproductive freedom is protected, voting rights are defended, and our Constitution is safeguarded. So we need to fight _hard_ to protect them.

[**Donate now and DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT if you’re ready to help women win at every level of office, everywhere:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116067899/572367581/-877057620?sourceid=1057076&refcode=WUEFE959_20250927_SLInvest_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWVmZmM3ZS1kNDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0k9RPXhglX3fPmL6HlfgvcKU5CtOASDDnQ8kjL7hsx4=)

clean_body: Why electing women to state legislatures matters more than ever | = Hi Peter, As America prepares to celebrate the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence, the fight to protect those very freedoms has never been more urgent. Republicans are just six states away from having the power to call a constitutional convention. That's right: the GOP is terrifyingly close to having the power to reshape the U.S. Constitution itself. = | = This isn't some conspiracy theory — it's an actual strategy that Republicans have gone so far as to hold mock conventions to prepare for. This is the same party whose leaders told state legislatures in Texas to weaponize gerrymandering to tilt the 2026 midterm elections in the GOP's favor. Local Republicans will always fall in line. At any moment, they could target our fundamental freedoms written into the Constitution. This is exactly why EMILYs List exists. For nearly 40 years, we've been investing in flipping chambers and electing Democratic pro-choice women to state legislatures — because state power is national power. Republicans know it, and so do we. Every woman we elect to a state legislature is another brick in the wall protecting our Constitution.Every statehouse flip is another state saved from Republican cruelty and chaos. State legislatures are the first place reproductive freedom is protected, voting rights are defended, and our Constitution is safeguarded. So we need to fight hard to protect them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = For nearly 250 years, the U.S. Constitution has been the backbone of our democracy. Together, we can make sure it remains a shield for freedom for generations to come. Thank you for taking a stand, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, State and Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Democratic Party of Virginia
subject: The gameplan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_fr_dpva [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_fr_dpva]
On November 4th, Virginia will have the opportunity to flip the governor’s mansion, elect a Democratic lieutenant governor and attorney general to fight back against Trump, and expand our narrow majority in the General Assembly.
Across the country, Democrats are counting on Virginians to make the first big blow to the MAGA movement. Here’s the game plan, friend - and why we need your help to fund it.
Our elections are coming in just a few weeks, and here’s the thing: Virginia’s elections don’t just impact our state - we’re a bellwether for the rest of the country. What happens here in November is going to help determine our party's chances during the midterms in 2026.
So here’s what we’re going to do: we’re going to defend our majority by supporting Democrats in toss-up districts. We’re also on the offensive by propping up Democrats (many women!) running against vulnerable Republicans.
That means:
🚪 Funding a field program across every corner of our state - that means knocking doors IRL
📱Organizing by phone - we’re text banking, we’re phone banking, we’re talking to people
📬 Direct mail - we’re leaving no stone unturned or mailbox unturned
📺 TV Ads - we’re getting on the air to help make sure our candidates' voices are loud and clear
But all of this costs money, and with only a few weeks left before November, we’re working harder than ever to meet our fundraising goals and ensure that we leave everything on the playing field.
That’s why we’re asking you to make a split donation between the Democratic Party of Virginia and Jay Jones. Our on-the-ground efforts for Operation Virginia Victory are underway, but we need grassroots support to continue doing this important work. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_fr_dpva]
DONATE $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_fr_dpva?amount=20]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_fr_dpva?amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_fr_dpva?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_fr_dpva?amount=100]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_fr_dpva]
The more money we can raise now, the better we can plan for the last few months of this campaign and the more impact we can have. So, let’s do this together and meet our $10,000 grassroots fundraising goal by the end of the day. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_fr_dpva]
– Virginia Democratic Party

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States
Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia

subject: Stand for the future.
body:

name: Ashley from Team Taylor
subject: Sorry to bother you on a Saturday, but this is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
We only have a few days left in the month, and a whole lot of cheddar to raise before then.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250927-618&t=1&akid=632%2E294397%2ElvHHF0)
Folks, it’s Ashley.
Sorry to bother you on a Saturday, but I need to check in.
**We only have a few days left in the month, and a whole lot of cheddar to raise before then to hit our $100k digital goal:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250927_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250927-618&refcode2=632_294397_lvHHF0&akid=632%2E294397%2ElvHHF0)
Right now, we don’t know who the other side will prop up to take on Judge Chris Taylor.
What we _do_ know is that right-wing special interests are preparing to spend tens of millions to buy a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
**That’s why we can’t afford to fall behind.** Every dollar we raise now helps us build the strong, grassroots campaign it will take to win — no matter who our opponent is.
This race could decide the future of reproductive freedom, workers’ rights, and our democracy here in Wisconsin. The stakes couldn’t be higher, and we have to keep pushing forward together.
[**Can you chip in $10 today to help us hit our $100,000 goal and prepare for the next phase of this campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250927_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250927-618&refcode2=632_294397_lvHHF0&akid=632%2E294397%2ElvHHF0)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250927_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250927-618&refcode2=632_294397_lvHHF0&akid=632%2E294397%2ElvHHF0)**
Thank you,
Ashley
Campaign Manager
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20250927-618&t=2&refcode2=632_294397_lvHHF0&akid=632%2E294397%2ElvHHF0)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=632%2E294397%2ElvHHF0)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=632%2E294397%2ElvHHF0)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice

| | Reader,For far too long the New York Times has dominated American journalism. It calls itself the "paper of record" and claims it publishes "all the news that's fit to print." subject: MAGA will stop at nothing to defeat me

body:
Up to and including weaponizing the federal government
#
Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw this news.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96056?refcode=em20250927-9496&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9496%2E614464%2EQcp8sC)
The National Archives illegally released my personal records to Jack Ciattarelli’s campaign ally. All part of a cowardly attempt to smear my name and a weaponization of the federal government to win an election.
Here’s the truth: they’re scared of the campaign we’ve built, Peter.
So they’re trying to take me down by undermining my record of service to this nation.
But I’m proud of what I’ve accomplished:
I saved a fellow midshipman’s life on a training exercise. I received numerous commendations and accolades for integrity, “devotion to duty,” and “exceptional initiative.” I've even received the Navy Distinguished Public Servant Award, the highest civilian honor that the Navy awards.
This is an unprecedented weaponization of the federal government to try to win an election.
Jack Ciattarelli has the might of the federal government behind him. But I have something more powerful: a grassroots movement of people like you.
**[So I’m asking: please split $5 between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96056?refcode=em20250927-9496&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9496%2E614464%2EQcp8sC)**

name: Jasmine Truong, Team Peters
subject: Urgent request from Scott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter – Jasmine from Team Peters here. Scott just asked me to check in to start off the weekend.

We’ve made great progress, but we’re still falling short of where we need to be with just a few days left before our quarterly FEC deadline. If we don’t close the gap now, the GOP will seize on any sign of weakness.

Republican Super PACs are already reserving millions of dollars in ad buys to protect their narrow House majority. If we want to win back control, Democrats need to prove our strength right now.

[That’s why Scott set a goal to raise $10,000 before Tuesday at midnight – and we’re still $7,500 away. name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: How I'm fighting for our district right now
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Hi there, it’s Marcy.

Right now, Ohio Republicans are working to disenfranchise voters and redraw our district. They can’t beat us at the ballot box, so they’re trying to rig the game.

No matter what they do, they won’t get in the way of our work to make our Northern Ohio community stronger.

Here’s the everyday work I’m focused on: delivering affordable healthcare, a cleaner Great Lakes ecosystem, transformational infrastructure investments, and an economy that actually works for working people.

We need your support to continue that work, friend. We have to submit our end-of-quarter fundraising report in just 3 days, and we know we ’ ll be up against millions of dollars in special interest cash. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250927_mk_eoq_l1]

Support our work → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250927_mk_eoq_b1]If you can chip in even $5, it would mean so much to me and everyone on our team. For a grassroots campaign like ours, every dollar makes a difference.

Thank you so much, friend. We couldn’t do it without you.

— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=e6f88979-d99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=e6f88979-d99b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4]
Follow Marcy
https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur [https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur] https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tcAb-PaXtEayL-mWUU_QGw2?unsubscribedata=30rfePKy98bVeyOc1C29aP%2FMhIJpcwglR6FSczdsp2VW12IOOOxrNApocUMGSVWIPJJZHag9TW3sDC9xWkIyqOWqtvwMcV3VRSJR%2FA5iTw%2FHd1%2BYzIkeifo8RhGrv1FPZzrcjbUij9XqFj8WeJY3ZQ7UXzLZu6RlFTKnE75m3lL%2BdIlUU7d6rh9RYDXN7OzlO1GB5qUnMLii6psXKMj0lTQtCQ%2Bse6leIsddn6QQDvPkkHcGWvAJ1zNaw78qSkLCHB%2FfDUX%2B9n5QAS7Hi3svKGsTZk5UNcclgSS4tI1S3gtvdVvo10ixZsEx0bLNMwDwz55vQPVGfKuquILKqFa5FvXkHLjpLSbC9basTZo0u0tAjpmXujNRxlDQv4lWr2pWDGCCzi48tHwUxY7ytBfO%2F4EJScJEAYn7aCuadI3xSFY%3D] . subject: What you should know about IL-17
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116068817/572370458/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmMzNjQ5ZC1kOTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TfScURxXjlqUOf5misQ2KiIuBmMrl1wb1398O2qn0RU=)
Peter, You’ve likely been getting a lot of emails this past week and it’s hard to keep track of everything flying around, so we wanted to take a moment to give you the latest directly from HQ about what’s going on in our race: **\- Eric has TWO opponents.** And both are MAGA as they come! Both have voiced total support for Donald Trump’s anti-democratic efforts, and you can be sure that our resistance will get a whole lot weaker if they win. **\- Even with a Democratic incumbent, the district has been trending to the right.** We don’t like it, either. But over the past several cycles, we’ve seen a decreasing share of registered Democrats, with larger and larger swaths of voters registering as Independents. That makes it a true swing seat that we have to fight to hold. [**Now is the perfect time to make your first donation of $3 to help us hold this seat. Let me explain why: It's no secret that campaigns are expensive. It's not uncommon to see colleagues spending as much time on the phone hunting donors as they do focusing on legislating, just to keep up. I like doing things a bit differently. I was elected to serve, and I'm not slowing down on my work in Washington. Issues like building more affordable housing, protecting consumers from being gouged, and yes, protecting our democracy are all too important. That makes your support around these deadlines SO critical. A single donation of $3 might sound like a drop in the bucket compared to millions from a super PAC. But when you chip in, someone else reading this email might decide to as well. These contributions can really add up in a big way. **[So I'm asking: Will you please send in a donation to help power our campaign in CA-30? clean_body: | = Team, I'm emailing to respectfully ask if you can = to my grassroots re-election effort in CA-30. Let me explain why: It's no secret that campaigns are expensive. It's not uncommon to see colleagues spending as much time on the phone hunting donors as they do focusing on legislating, just to keep up. I like doing things a bit differently. I was elected to serve, and I'm not slowing down on my work in Washington. Issues like building more affordable housing, protecting consumers from being gouged, and yes, protecting our democracy are all too important. That makes your support around these deadlines SO critical. A single donation of $3 might sound like a drop in the bucket compared to millions from a super PAC. But when you chip in, someone else reading this email might decide to as well. These contributions can really add up in a big way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Your early support means our progressive values will stay at the forefront of our campaign. And it means we’ll have a representative beholden to the people of this community -- not the special interests. Thanks in advance for your support! Laura =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

If we don't make some smart, strategic investments, we could lose the biggest election in the country.

_**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116069464/572372870/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-27_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE2NzI5OGItZGM5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=78oavOBEaer21RpX4F8WFXkIQyOuCETMcyR_MMtrkrw=)**_
Folks, we've got a situation here.
You all should know by now I'm all in for Abigail Spanberger. She's running one heck of a campaign for Governor of Virginia, criss-crossing the Commonwealth, building a big coalition, and speaking directly to voters on the issues that matter most.
**But here's the problem, and it's a biggie:**
_Abigail's opponent has spent over $10 million so far._

clean_body: If we don't make some smart, strategic investments, we could lose the biggest election in the country. = Folks, we've got a situation here. You all should know by now I'm all in for Abigail Spanberger. She's running one heck of a campaign for Governor of Virginia, criss-crossing the Commonwealth, building a big coalition, and speaking directly to voters on the issues that matter most. But here's the problem, and it's a biggie: Abigail's opponent has spent over $10 million so far. If we don't make some smart, strategic investments, we could lose the biggest election in the country. = = = = = = = Here's the bottom line: The experts say we can win — so long as we act now to stay ahead. Abigail is the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's office this year, but with polls tightening and Trump's inner circle cashing checks to Winsome Earle-Sears, it's high time we all stepped up and gave what we can to Abigail Spanberger. I mean it, if you want to see Democrats win and get their mojo back for goodness sake: there's no campaign more deserving of your dollar than Abigail Spanberger's. = Let's get the job done, James Carville By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding
subject: This shutdown will be 100% on Trump and Republicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Peter,
This week, Donald Trump walked away from talks in D.C., and now, a government shutdown is looming in less than one week.
If Congress fails to pass, or if Trump fails to sign, the budget legislation, federal government agencies and programs that rely on annual funding will be shuttered.
And now we’re learning just how cruel their plan really is. If the shutdown does go into effect, the White House has warned that Trump’s team is looking for ways to use the funding dispute to permanently eliminate federal jobs, not just temporarily send hundreds of thousands of workers home without pay...
Critical services will stop. Health care programs, food assistance, and other vital support will grind to a halt.
And to be clear, this shutdown is 100% on him and Republicans in Congress. They don’t care about working families; they care about politics. This will hit our most vulnerable communities hardest because they feel the consequences immediately.
But here’s what Trump doesn’t count on: we show up when the government won’t. Movement for Freedom is organizing, feeding families, supporting workers, and fighting back, because we refuse to let politicians play games with our lives.
Our end-of-quarter deadline is just days away. Chip in $10 today to help us protect our communities and hold Republicans accountable >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250927_govshutdown_actrs&amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_250927_govshutdown_actrs] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_250927_govshutdown_actrs]
Trump and his allies think they can scare us, divide us, and run out the clock. We know better. We fight. We protect each other. And we win.
In solidarity,
Stephany
Lead Spokesperson, Movement for Freedom

| Peter,
Donald Trump has already started talking about running for a third term -- something no president in American history has ever done.
Sound outrageous? It is. But here's the chilling part: if Republicans seize control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court this November, this could be the court that decides whether Trump's authoritarian power grab holds up. That's why MAGA operatives are pouring tens of millions into Pennsylvania's retention election for three Democratic justices. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Making sure I get the chance to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | | Friend, already, thousands of you have shared your input on the focus group I sent around. Thank you.
---
But as Donald Trump and Washington Republicans continue to harm the American people with their Project 2025 agenda, I really need to hear from you specifically to make sure I’m fighting for what you care about most in the Senate.
**So please, if you haven’t had the chance yet, can you share your thoughts, priorities, and concerns with me directly? Here's the link to the Focus Group again: [https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-sept-focus-group-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116070188/572375090/-2028541414?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5600-su-nd&refcode=jtk5600-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDI1ZjI1NC1kZjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gWzZtqZbvUS2tiNQoXB897h2ch3SGJzjk7nIoTM7HjM=&emci=71c720bc-3c9a-f011-b485-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7425f254-df9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1586379)**
Thank you,
Rev. Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Rev. Raphael Warnock**
Subject: What matters most to you and your family right now?
| | |
---
Friend, the GOP-led Senate is finally back in session after the month-long August recess, and Democrats have our work cut out for us.
Donald Trump and his allies in Washington have stripped millions of their health care – and raised premiums on virtually _every_ American – all to fund a tax cut for billionaires.
All the while, Trump’s reckless tariffs continue to push up prices across the board. He even put a tariff on _coffee_ – a crop that the United States largely can’t grow due to our climate. It just goes to show that these tariffs were never about creating jobs here in America. Just like everything Trump does, it’s once again about funding his tax cut for billionaires at your expense.
And it’s not just Trump wreaking havoc on our country. His extreme appointees, like Robert F. Kennedy Jr., are doing everything they can to advance Trump’s dangerous agenda. **Earlier this month, I confronted RFK Jr. at a Senate hearing and told him directly that he should resign or be fired for the conspiracy theories he is spreading and the danger he poses to the health and well-being of every American.**
It’s no surprise that folks in every corner of the country are furious at Trump and his administration. But instead of listening to the American people and changing his policies, Trump is now rigging the electoral maps to silence your voice and stop you from holding him accountable.
**With the Senate back in session, I’m doing everything I possibly can to hold the line against Donald Trump, the GOP-led Senate, and their dangerous policies. But to make sure I’m focused on the things that matter most to you and your family, I need to hear from you directly.**
[**That’s why my team put together a focus group so I can hear from you about your top priorities and concerns. Will you take a moment and join our September Focus Group to let me know what is top of mind for you right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116070189/572375093/-2028541414?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25&code=jtk5600-su-nd&refcode=jtk5600-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDI1ZjI1NC1kZjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gWzZtqZbvUS2tiNQoXB897h2ch3SGJzjk7nIoTM7HjM=&emci=71c720bc-3c9a-f011-b485-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7425f254-df9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1586379)
| | [Begin the Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116070190/572375100/-2028541414?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25&code=jtk5600-su-nd&refcode=jtk5600-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDI1ZjI1NC1kZjliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gWzZtqZbvUS2tiNQoXB897h2ch3SGJzjk7nIoTM7HjM=&emci=71c720bc-3c9a-f011-b485-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7425f254-df9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1586379)

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your thoughts with me. I really appreciate it.
Sincerely,
Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Susie Lee
subject: I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
| | | |
---
Hey friend,
Republicans have failed to lower costs or make life better for American families — their priorities are to make the rich richer and we’re all paying the price for it.
Even worse, Republicans are stopping at nothing to hold onto control, from pushing biased congressional maps to attacking voting access, and they placed all three of Nevada’s Democratic House seats on their top targets list — including mine!
**Our big opportunity to curb the Republican power grab is to take back Congress and Democrats need Nevada to win.**
As House Battleground Chair, I know that this won’t be an easy fight but for Nevadans and for working families across the country it’s a fight we have to take on and take seriously. That means getting the resources to make key investments to reach voters with the truth. I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t critical — we need your support _right now_.
[**Please, donate any amount to NV Dems ahead of the end-of-quarter deadline. This work is about more than elections — it’s about standing up for hardworking families, protecting democracy, and making sure every Nevadan has a voice.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTaFWLw6zUtEkIcUI4H1v3OdJrJXNQTLUDXBDpio_uFqQj6KfgCIiI4je0aU3k50h24uEPS5inSn8A84aH-y8JpXKwRt5-72Fn3ZeP8rb7r5_OeNSYchtWaXojXxrw4FZQr2qtrak-7tUR48Lmkuiquhc-NGTj2qOgKG-AiBmUHLN7b2Vc7lmfiAqWvhfDQkSJQxaIrSzHeAklUUVapFyW1LFrLiFkvj2mlXLEBCBekt5hqczfJNQssG81-djewdfGRC7ticfvTDPEWninslWuKr3tUdmmxEu1321aEDgeGrj6jzclnaY4ihdNbS8KYSYpmT6bxRhG-kGBqwunBCZt1HBFJPlgun31_KBUU7Hq8fo/4k9/6hH-PE3CToiYps38USOpvg/h0/h001.IhXH7gbvUzdscytjmfFmUo22yeNnkBGjZQTCPdtjTMs)

clean_body: | | | | Hey friend, Republicans have failed to lower costs or make life better for American families — their priorities are to make the rich richer and we’re all paying the price for it. Even worse, Republicans are stopping at nothing to hold onto control, from pushing biased congressional maps to attacking voting access, and they placed all three of Nevada’s Democratic House seats on their top targets list — including mine! Our big opportunity to curb the Republican power grab is to take back Congress and Democrats need Nevada to win. As House Battleground Chair, I know that this won’t be an easy fight but for Nevadans and for working families across the country it’s a fight we have to take on and take seriously. That means getting the resources to make key investments to reach voters with the truth. I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t critical — we need your support right now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thank you for being with me in this fight. With gratitude, Susie Lee The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Why this deadline matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=6BEmnpk%2FcxzAEprv2Y1Q59xw8Ufp4BqNSSp%2F9PyyGf9NCMGmIywX6B6eMVXE4lgc2K8FYdLHCFkJMYGvruTAEaiKdLjj7pQWx0j4xXeAeilBksguXJMZ%2FfZmFh1kpLbfL%2BKBfxXf2aOTKfuljjC6iaEExu%2B9jmLZVkBB62SZnu0x0tlRV1sOMc%2FHjgJGRbdH4cl6WAl7HHrdYFSKPOz0PDoyUbZscKRF%2B%2FOYcvNV%2FHmcD96DlGWnpkYcVOo8wGb5MITxNtdddKnxGHXzluL4jYjMTnWEFi9m6tCehcKqyc490fz9eA5DQvtF82ZhVvMdKwhG0wQBwqpcowKwZOMWOtb%2BGhSLtqa3itXthX0bmoTj66%2FBYNL1V49iZ1pWMml%2BieUKJOXMLq56ax4mc%2F05Pt8sL7tBjsGxMb1jfE%2Bwj5CB7Ta7zZMJRjG52B%2BTdlWd)

---
Peter,

We’re just days away from the end of the quarter, and I want to explain why this moment matters.

In Washington, Republicans are pushing policies that make life harder for ordinary people, from tariffs that are spiking food prices, to attempts to slash education funding, to efforts to undermine our democracy. I’m in Congress fighting back against all of it.

But to keep up that fight, we need to show the strength of this grassroots campaign. Every contribution we raise before the deadline sends a message that this campaign is powered by people, not special interests, not billionaires.

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Trump is turning ICE into his own anti-immigrant policing squad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Stoke chaos and fear to distract: It’s their M.O.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116070260/572375385/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDc3ODA1Mi1lMDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vroFMUH7Aa1Zpo517ySBiAEjbD58xwvCUAtg_yWDKpI=)
The Supreme Court just co-signed Trump's extreme immigration policies.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116070261/572375386/789508428?refcode=250927_RG_ICE-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDc3ODA1Mi1lMDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vroFMUH7Aa1Zpo517ySBiAEjbD58xwvCUAtg_yWDKpI=)**
[FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116070262/572375387/-309737922?refcode=250927_RG_ICE-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDc3ODA1Mi1lMDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vroFMUH7Aa1Zpo517ySBiAEjbD58xwvCUAtg_yWDKpI=)
Last week, the Court overturned a federal judge’s order that had prevented federal agents in L.A. from stopping and questioning people about their immigration status based solely on their race.
**That means SCOTUS has essentially given Trump the green light to use ICE as his own anti-immigrant policing squad.**
ICE has been terrorizing California’s communities all summer, detaining people with no criminal record at car washes, grocery stores, and small businesses.
**It's not about safety. It’s about stoking chaos and fear to distract us from Trump’s blatant disregard for the law, like the Epstein cover-up.**
**[That’s why I’m fighting back in the courts, in Congress, and on the ground to stop this administration from terrorizing working families. But I need your help to reject this cruelty and protect our communities from Trump’s anti-immigrant policing squad. If you can, pitch in $25 or more to help me fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116070263/572375388/789508428?refcode=250927_RG_ICE-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDc3ODA1Mi1lMDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vroFMUH7Aa1Zpo517ySBiAEjbD58xwvCUAtg_yWDKpI=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116070264/572375389/-309737922?refcode=250927_RG_ICE-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDc3ODA1Mi1lMDliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vroFMUH7Aa1Zpo517ySBiAEjbD58xwvCUAtg_yWDKpI=)
Right now, people with no records are being targeted because Donald Trump wants this country to believe that being Latino is a criminal offense.
Look, I won’t stand by as my friends, neighbors, and loved ones live in fear because of Trump’s extreme policies.
**I’m fighting like hell _every single day_ in Congress to stop him and his despicable agenda. **
Thanks for having my back,
Robert Garcia

name: Justice Democrats
subject: They come for one of us, they come for all of us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Recently, Nancy Mace and House Republicans tried to censure Ilhan Omar for
standing up to white supremacy, and Rashida Tlaib for demanding our
government stop enabling war crimes.

Let’s be clear: this was never about “accountability.”

It was about silencing two fearless progressive women of color who refuse
to be intimidated. It was about weaponizing racism and bigotry to smear
our movement and go after the leaders the far right fears most.

And here’s the truth: as we get closer to 2026, these attacks are only
going to get uglier. Republicans are terrified of a future where Ilhan,
Rashida, and every Justice Democrat keep exposing their corruption and
building real power for working people.

We’re not backing down. Every time they come after Ilhan or Rashida,
they’re coming after all of us. And every single time, we’ll rise up
stronger, louder, and more united.

Justice Democrats was built for moments like this: to defend our champions
and elect more leaders who will never compromise with the forces of hate
and greed.

But if we want to fight back with the strength this moment demands, we
need to finish this quarter strong.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250927?refcode=em20250927-37061&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37061_1203867_yfhExw&akid=37061%2E1203867%2EyfhExw ]Will you chip in before Tuesday’s end-of-quarter deadline to help us

Justice Democrats

body:
The stakes couldn’t be higher.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=%2FTR7p7a%2B44kjPXU3TO97y4vvMwaB5DhKTf5fLcl2jPOV5lgQC3yqqEnoBIRYXF5%2Fb5jD6zK4Is%2BP0izQ%2FVPYaEshQXfYeOPLrgQOq%2BT2rP0cK79hV7Hdt%2FNH7DfRe8KIUaHZxQBho1fyD9OIRbT7H6s7NI9BGBSXcjlzn7%2FFNxfTUibDFD0lAOWaWgaK06PLayaUQa88FAQ8NaDLUiuilBMyAHGSY6rbkJzSmXE9dSHW%2FofCXMX%2BMrqqGwV41so8B6vqIi39VMcEjP5hXOGcmOoNky3tFuliO6Js0eiHfdqIyEqdlGcw0HufVLGay9aXcZxTet1br9ROMdE4KgxysNm2qyrhhGb4YE7pUA%2FfWeA%2B3oZpyMjgplLfdpkg4TMe7Z1EURvMsJ2DpVXLsqoBCZfax%2B2tvskIWGJLjiQlnxU%3D)

Thanks to Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans, **chaos has become the default in Washington**. They’ve already:
* **Stripped health care coverage** from 17 million Americans.
* **Gutted SNAP** , leaving families scrambling just to put food on the table.
* **Imposed reckless tariffs** , putting jobs in Southern New Mexico at risk and harming farmers, workers, and small businesses.

Now, Trump is deploying the military into American cities — using fear and force to feed his authoritarian impulses. And now we’re creeping closer to another government shutdown — further proof that Republicans aren’t interested in governing. **They’ve chosen chaos over solutions, and working people are paying the price.** We can’t wait for things to get worse. If we don’t fight back now, we risk losing far more than a congressional seat — **we risk losing our democracy**. Republicans have already set their sights on Southern New Mexico. National operatives and donors are watching what we do next and our end-of-quarter FEC report will show whether we’re ready to hold this line. [We’ve set a $25,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal to prove we’re not backing down. clean_body: The stakes couldn’t be higher. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Thanks to Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans, chaos has become the default in Washington. They’ve already: Stripped health care coverage from 17 million Americans. Gutted SNAP , leaving families scrambling just to put food on the table. Imposed reckless tariffs , putting jobs in Southern New Mexico at risk and harming farmers, workers, and small businesses. Now, Trump is deploying the military into American cities — using fear and force to feed his authoritarian impulses. And now we’re creeping closer to another government shutdown — further proof that Republicans aren’t interested in governing. They’ve chosen chaos over solutions, and working people are paying the price. We can’t wait for things to get worse. If we don’t fight back now, we risk losing far more than a congressional seat — we risk losing our democracy. Republicans have already set their sights on Southern New Mexico. National operatives and donors are watching what we do next and our end-of-quarter FEC report will show whether we’re ready to hold this line. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Team Vasquez | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Vann Bentley, Team Pappas
subject: I challenged Chris to a bet.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I love my husband... and I really want to win!
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2571%2E582294%2EV8Dn0c)
Hi there. It’s Vann, Chris Pappas’s husband. I know I don’t write to you often, so I hope you’ll let me explain why I am today.
Sometimes Chris and I can get a _little_ competitive... Whether it’s Scrabble during game nights or our daily New York Times mini crossword puzzle, our friends and family would agree we take games pretty seriously in our house.
**With Chris’s focus on his big end-of-quarter deadline in a few days, I challenged him to a friendly bet to see who can raise more grassroots money before September 30th.** I told Chris that I could write a fundraising email that would blow his numbers out of the water.
And now I’m counting on your help to back that up.
Here’s the deal: If you donate to this email, your donation goes on my side of the scoreboard. If I win, Chris has to make me dinner next week – and I get bragging rights until the end of the next quarter. If you’re already on Team Vann, here’s my link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250927_2_vann](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250927_2_vann?refcode=em20250927-2571&amount=5&refcode2=2571_582294_V8Dn0c&akid=2571%2E582294%2EV8Dn0c)
I can’t tell you how important this deadline is for Chris. **He’s working hard to raise the money he needs to win this U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire and keep the Democrats’ path to a majority in play.** After he files his report, everyone will be looking to see how much he’s raised, including his potential and current GOP opponents. We can’t show any sign of weakness. And I can’t lose this competition 😅
[**So can I count on you to help me raise more than Chris can? Chip in to Team Vann before the September 30th end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to help me win this bet:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250927_2_vann?refcode=em20250927-2571&amount=5&refcode2=2571_582294_V8Dn0c&akid=2571%2E582294%2EV8Dn0c)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250927_2_vann?amount=5&refcode=em20250927-2571&refcode2=2571_582294_V8Dn0c&akid=2571%2E582294%2EV8Dn0c)**
Thanks for humoring me, and for your continued support of Chris. He’s the real deal, and I know he’ll be the best Senator for New Hampshire.
– Vann
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250927_2_vann?refcode=em20250927-2571&amount=5&refcode2=2571_582294_V8Dn0c&akid=2571%2E582294%2EV8Dn0c)
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20250927-2&t=2&refcode2=2571_582294_V8Dn0c&akid=2571%2E582294%2EV8Dn0c)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=2571%2E582294%2EV8Dn0c)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=2571%2E582294%2EV8Dn0c)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2571%2E582294%2EV8Dn0c)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

Manchester, NH 03105

Steve Thompson, Editor

[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t39li6&__onlt=h)
---

---
This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction.
Of courage.
Of the movement Charlie built. **When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited.** Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. **Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**

---
**For Charlie,** The Turning Point USA Team

name: George Whitesides
subject: Sharing part of my story
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116071109/572378345/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmMzOWUyYy1lNTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXFc3K74G7vcpiRigQ5lwErU_8kMq2z5eDv_4nXsiRM=)
I know you’re hearing a lot from candidates like me, Peter.

So today, I want to share part of my story with you. I hope you read my message the whole way through, but if you’re short on time and want to support my re-election efforts, you can **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116071110/572378346/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmMzOWUyYy1lNTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXFc3K74G7vcpiRigQ5lwErU_8kMq2z5eDv_4nXsiRM=)**.

I am a proud husband and father. When I think about why I first decided to run for Congress, I think about my two kids – specifically, my daughter Maya.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116071111/572378347/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmMzOWUyYy1lNTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXFc3K74G7vcpiRigQ5lwErU_8kMq2z5eDv_4nXsiRM=)
I’ll never forget the moment, eight years ago now although it feels like yesterday, when Maya came home from kindergarten telling me about her day. Instead of sharing what you might expect from a five-year-old, she told me about the special “exercises” they had practiced.

**While she didn't quite understand the concept at the time, she was describing an active shooter drill.**

Thinking back on it now, my heart still sinks – as a father, and now as Congressman. It’s unacceptable that our kids and families grow up in a country where gun violence seems around the corner wherever you are, whether it’s at school, place of worship, or a movie theater.

Moments like those spurred me to action. I wasn’t a career politician, but I knew I had to take a stand for our community in CA-27 – and with your help, I was one of only a few Democrats who flipped Republican-held seats in November.

Now, I’m facing my first re-election campaign. The GOP is already lining up behind one of my challengers and spending big to air misleading ads about me.

I’m in this fight to make life better for all of our families – that includes curbing gun violence, protecting health care and reproductive rights, fighting against rising costs, and much more.

**[If you’re with me, $3 or any amount you can give today would go a long way toward hitting our end-of-quarter goal and protecting this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116071112/572378348/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmMzOWUyYy1lNTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXFc3K74G7vcpiRigQ5lwErU_8kMq2z5eDv_4nXsiRM=)**
__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | ****[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116071113/572378349/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmMzOWUyYy1lNTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXFc3K74G7vcpiRigQ5lwErU_8kMq2z5eDv_4nXsiRM=)**** | ****[$35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116071114/572378350/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.27.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmMzOWUyYy1lNTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXFc3K74G7vcpiRigQ5lwErU_8kMq2z5eDv_4nXsiRM=)****

clean_body: | = I know you’re hearing a lot from candidates like me, Peter. So today, I want to share part of my story with you. I hope you read my message the whole way through, but if you’re short on time and want to support my re-election efforts, you can =. I am a proud husband and father. When I think about why I first decided to run for Congress, I think about my two kids – specifically, my daughter Maya. = I’ll never forget the moment, eight years ago now although it feels like yesterday, when Maya came home from kindergarten telling me about her day. Instead of sharing what you might expect from a five-year-old, she told me about the special “exercises” they had practiced. While she didn't quite understand the concept at the time, she was describing an active shooter drill. Thinking back on it now, my heart still sinks – as a father, and now as Congressman. It’s unacceptable that our kids and families grow up in a country where gun violence seems around the corner wherever you are, whether it’s at school, place of worship, or a movie theater. Moments like those spurred me to action. I wasn’t a career politician, but I knew I had to take a stand for our community in CA-27 – and with your help, I was one of only a few Democrats who flipped Republican-held seats in November. Now, I’m facing my first re-election campaign. The GOP is already lining up behind one of my challengers and spending big to air misleading ads about me. I’m in this fight to make life better for all of our families – that includes curbing gun violence, protecting health care and reproductive rights, fighting against rising costs, and much more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

We’ve set an ambitious goal to get 250 donations before midnight to be a show of force against extreme, partisan gerrymandering.

Peter, this is an extraordinary moment in the fight for fair maps — one that calls for extraordinary pushback from those of us who are passionate about democracy. With the end of the month just days away, we’re watching our fundraising numbers closely, and we can’t risk falling short of our goals. [**That’s why we’re announcing a one-day goal to reach 250 donations to the NDRC so we can stay on track and have the resources to fight back wherever fair maps are under attack.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116070994/572377971/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_EOQ3_email_20250927-NDRC-Tier1-EOQ3_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250927-NDRC-Tier1-EOQ3_&utm_campaign=EOQ3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiODVkZmVjLWU0OWItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ff2GJae-YohKJs8ySS74I_k-sGe805Q-cPhpkt-63rA=) _The amount you give is less important than the fact that you give — so please, make a donation today. _ Let’s be clear — our opponents are watching what we raise as well. They’re looking to see how Americans are responding to Republicans’ desperate mid-decade map redraws. **How much we raise between now and September 30 will send a resounding message that Americans reject these GOP power grabs — and are fighting back with ferocity.[Be one of our 250 donors before midnight tonight so we can deliver for our democracy when it matters most.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116070995/572377976/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_EOQ3_email_20250927-NDRC-Tier1-EOQ3_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250927-NDRC-Tier1-EOQ3_&utm_campaign=EOQ3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiODVkZmVjLWU0OWItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ff2GJae-YohKJs8ySS74I_k-sGe805Q-cPhpkt-63rA=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We’ve set an ambitious goal to get 250 donations before midnight to be a show of force against extreme, partisan gerrymandering. | Peter, this is an extraordinary moment in the fight for fair maps — one that calls for extraordinary pushback from those of us who are passionate about democracy. With the end of the month just days away, we’re watching our fundraising numbers closely, and we can’t risk falling short of our goals. = The amount you give is less important than the fact that you give — so please, make a donation today. Let’s be clear — our opponents are watching what we raise as well. They’re looking to see how Americans are responding to Republicans’ desperate mid-decade map redraws. How much we raise between now and September 30 will send a resounding message that Americans reject these GOP power grabs — and are fighting back with ferocity.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks for all that you do, NDRC HQ = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

subject: MAGA will stop at nothing to defeat me

body:
Up to and including weaponizing the federal government
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5618%2E196590%2EUHhYG-).

---
| Team,

I wanted to make sure you saw this news.
---
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5573?t=3&akid=5618%2E196590%2EUHhYG-)
The National Archives illegally released my personal records to Jack Ciattarelli’s campaign ally. All part of a cowardly attempt to smear my name and a weaponization of the federal government to win an election.

Here’s the truth: they’re scared of the campaign we’ve built, team.

So they’re trying to take me down by undermining my record of service to this nation.

But I’m proud of what I’ve accomplished:

I saved a fellow midshipman’s life on a training exercise. I received numerous commendations and accolades for integrity, “devotion to duty,” and “exceptional initiative.” I've even received the Navy Distinguished Public Servant Award, the highest civilian honor that the Navy awards.

This is an unprecedented weaponization of the federal government to try to win an election.

Jack Ciattarelli has the might of the federal government behind him. But I have something more powerful: a grassroots movement of people like you.

[_**So I’m asking: please split $25 between my campaign and The Long Run today.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5573?t=4&akid=5618%2E196590%2EUHhYG-)

I’m sincerely grateful.

Mikie

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: BREAKING: Trump is sending troops to Portland
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
This is cowardly behavior.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116071326/572378997/-629675555?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ2OTJhMGItZTY5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kdIVY38z4YbmCg7vyfOVFoCRafALLGavwUw8aj5QBuU=) Earlier today, President Trump announced he’s sending troops to Portland and declared war on our city.

This is pure cowardice. Instead of sending us the money we were promised for our roads, our elections systems and our water, President Trump put his tiny little fingers on his phone and authorized the “full force” of the military against his own people.

**I have a message for President Trump, and I hope you’ll sign your name right next to mine on my petition to say loud and clear:[Stay out of our city. You are a coward, President Trump, and we won’t stand for you sending goons to Portland instead of the money we’ve been promised.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116071327/572378998/-653528025?refcode=email_092725_portland&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ2OTJhMGItZTY5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kdIVY38z4YbmCg7vyfOVFoCRafALLGavwUw8aj5QBuU=&emci=8b2f16df-e29b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9d692a0b-e69b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=14434323)** | | [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116071328/572378999/-653528025?refcode=email_092725_portland&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ2OTJhMGItZTY5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kdIVY38z4YbmCg7vyfOVFoCRafALLGavwUw8aj5QBuU=&emci=8b2f16df-e29b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9d692a0b-e69b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=14434323)
---
This isn’t the first time in our history we’ve seen the President unleash the full power of this country on its own people. We saw it during the Civil Rights movement.

But we’ve never seen this level of cowardly behavior, and you better believe I won’t be silent.

I am going to do everything I can to protect our city and our people from Trump’s massive abuse of power, and I’m grateful to the more than 13,000 of you that joined my telephone town hall today.

**[We’re fighting back and making our voices heard, so please add your name to my petition right now to tell President Trump: get your troops out of Portland.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116071329/572379000/-653528025?refcode=email_092725_portland&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ2OTJhMGItZTY5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kdIVY38z4YbmCg7vyfOVFoCRafALLGavwUw8aj5QBuU=&emci=8b2f16df-e29b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9d692a0b-e69b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=14434323)**

Thanks for acting fast,

Janelle

clean_body: This is cowardly behavior. = Earlier today, President Trump announced he’s sending troops to Portland and declared war on our city. This is pure cowardice. Instead of sending us the money we were promised for our roads, our elections systems and our water, President Trump put his tiny little fingers on his phone and authorized the “full force” of the military against his own people. I have a message for President Trump, and I hope you’ll sign your name right next to mine on my petition to say loud and clear: | | This isn’t the first time in our history we’ve seen the President unleash the full power of this country on its own people. We saw it during the Civil Rights movement. But we’ve never seen this level of cowardly behavior, and you better believe I won’t be silent. I am going to do everything I can to protect our city and our people from Trump’s massive abuse of power, and I’m grateful to the more than 13,000 of you that joined my telephone town hall today. Thanks for acting fast, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress Janelle Bynum For Congress 10121 SE Sunnyside Road #300 Clackamas, OR 97015 United States

Hi there — I’m Charlene Fernandez, and I’m honored to serve as the newly elected Chair of the Arizona Democratic Party!
I was born and raised in rural Arizona, and I’ve spent my life in public service — from serving on a rural school board to leading Democrats in the Arizona House, to being appointed by the White House to USDA.
I know what it takes to win: Investing in year-round organizing, expanding voter registration, and building strong relationships across ALL 15 counties so we can turn out the votes we need to win.
**These are my priorities, but if we’re going to build a Party that truly serves the needs of all Arizonans, it’s critical that we hear yours, too.**
**[Will you take a moment to complete my September Priorities Survey today? ## **Frozen Odds Movie Update:**
**I am so thankful to all the people who bought tickets to “Frozen Odds” I was able to put together an amazing setup for equipment and little did I know that AFPI, America First Policy Institute would be so interested in working directly with me to help make content, do presentations, and show my movie all over the country. I have been working with them for a couple months now planning our strategy in Michigan, which is facing a ballot measure to get RCV in Michigan in 2026. The movie will be 45 minutes, the first trailer will come out in October and the movie release will be December or January for Alaska.****I am working directly with AFPI executive team and we plan to bring big name people to various events to get large crowds, their goal is 400-500+ per event and plan to do events across Michigan, having my movie as the main showcase with a panel doing Q &A at the end.****I am not charging AFPI for the movie, videos, or content I have created for them. I believe they will pay for the events, marketing, and flying me to Michigan for the various events. I had no idea that my work would make such a difference and I am very proud and thankful to all the people that have supported all of my efforts.****Seeing Charlie Kirk die reminds me that the work doesn’t stop, it never will and we have to carry on doing what he started.****Our work doesn’t stop in Michigan, I am also working with AFPI in Georgia and Minnesota next.**

---
| | 🕒 Time is of the essence, team! 🕒

The clock is ticking down to our end-of-quarter deadline.

Josh is leading the charge for bipartisan progress. Friend, Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Friend, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind — _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
[**Watch Our Tribute to Charlie Here**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._ For Charlie, \- The Turning Point Action Family

name: Tobias Read
subject: BREAKING: Trump orders troops to Portland in latest deployment to US cities
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250926em-portland-pet [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250926em-portland-pet]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
After weeks of attacking our state, President Trump just ordered troops to Portland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250926em-portland-pet [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250926em-portland-pet]
In the weeks leading up to this decision, he has stood in the Oval Office and called Portland “like living in hell.” He has even attacked our neighbors as “paid terrorists.”
The Portland I know is a beautiful, vibrant, and resilient city. It’s a place where families build their futures, where communities come together, and where people stand up for justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250926em-portland-pet [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250926em-portland-pet]
Like many other major cities across the country, Portland has faced its share of challenges. Denying this doesn’t help move Portland and Oregon forward.
At the same time, Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing.
Let me be clear: we do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon. And his threats have nothing to do with protecting Oregonians. We do not need fear-mongering from Washington. What we need is support for our communities, respect for our rights, and pride in all that makes Portland strong.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me: Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject President Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
Oregon will always rise to meet the moment. And no matter what threats come from Washington, we will stand together, protect our communities, and defend our state’s values.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250926em-portland-pet]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=eZgQ8p70%2BE6zWn4C6xchh9DdzV7zDPrxWFJnaAYBIVQUIbp6QytFjys9nZuvDgZy04gA1tQgkuNulKIm%2BguwFbdO90N1kndsUCLD5MyQCAo799cMjiMuuq5u3bleHdL3yNnmLmHQtH59hC1InyDlTSEOHkuKKAAHp9UkFFdrjvky4gfLctSTA576ir3oBwV0PH%2BRR7DfS2kmU0%2FMqpBLnJBsAheJrjDm2KDbZauVjWyC%2BBBjQozw8kOqzlnRBwbcuz50CRzt%2FLv4h1mqegqGWSFqwDfdoR0WNmoT8mWuMGK8KUTMr8YTR20lLOvdVN5cniBBl5AAnfn%2FwxXQq0HdYDnHy5jAH0jCJfaQcNFXjvLl5m670nBaSk97EXrq%2FfNGIFm3w7R1%2BV%2BaIZg1SUsv1BQ%2FmqubOtnJneXduTzFPEUukWDvTW78JdLaPNV9lqgX .

name: Team Tina
subject: Can $1 really make a difference?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
When we come together, small contributions can add up to something big. |
#
---
Peter, $1. That’s all we’re asking for today. You might be wondering — can pitching in just $1 really make a difference? The answer is _**yes**_. When thousands of grassroots supporters come together, **small contributions add up to something big.** People power — that’s how we fuel this movement, take on tough fights, and deliver real results for Oregonians. Whether it’s protecting Medicaid, making housing more affordable, or strengthening our public schools, Governor Tina Kotek is fighting for a future where everyone has a fair shot. But she can’t do it alone. **So today, we’re asking:** [_**Can you pitch in just $1 to show you’re with Tina before our end-of-quarter deadline? EMILYs List is fighting back — and we want your input. Which of Trump's cronies do you think poses the greatest threat? Is it Kristi Noem , the secretary of the Department of Homeland Security who has been at the forefront of expanding ICE's dangerous operations? Or RFK Jr. , the conspiracy theorist and anti-science extremist in charge of the Department of Health and Human Services?
