Friend,
When President Trump gave me his **COMPLETE AND TOTAL ENDORSEMENT** , my mission was clear – keep Marco Rubio’s former Senate seat firmly in Republican hands.

At the time, many of the dynamics of this race were still up in the air.

**But now, Chuck Schumer’s handpicked candidate has emerged. And this candidate was one of the biggest driving forces behind the woke insanity that we in Florida thought we’d defeated.**

Their prized candidate abused her power by pushing **extreme lock-downs** , **mask mandates** , **boys in girls’ sports and bathrooms** , and **America-hating CRT**.

**This is who the Democrats and Chuck Schumer think should represent Florida.**

Democrats think they can win this seat – and they are about to be flush with _MILLIONS_ of left-wing dollars to try to defeat us as a way to get back at President Trump in his home state.

**Since Governor DeSantis appointed me to replace Marco Rubio, I’ve been working tirelessly to simultaneously carry out President Trump’s agenda and build a massive, statewide campaign from scratch.**

**[And with this news, I must ask for your urgent support before the 3rd fundraising quarter ends on September 30th. Even if it’s just $5, I humbly request that you send it now.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5d2305dd83754aafa549cccfb2bd69d8&_e=dlfKIdE-JVQivNF-e4EVVXyd-hjClWe5XIqjMx9vAt3qcNDj2jTZlHn67CVjpXfY6FlFsQNfWdWfOaNMgQWf3wzTRSsIkGbSDf6NY60JY2fxIoRB3urly55u3HJDUAQZq70JvXugkFS0tKKIgNuT_rEu7_JkpKiRSGtZGL1f3gjQDJ5sFzDiDT7ui2bC8qei94FZM9-3l_IOe68TdIKOqarc1xRhCaUX_pnEvQsNZsKN677mjIMszq4hqWQlK8rukFLyPjCrm3O4dBc36nR33TPvkPO8LUyT-CPUGIShjjxZELVjmHL4qi7Bnm_BsO0Ux3J7hTc4OpLqNKXk5eP0A5mQyaYb0hwbAK-gPcpbqZX0RLLGIiuE3F0wI2CmVZaRiTA2hwYyJJNbSSps4LLoEbJ-BYQLDAbHIh-CCNLSX_FHcAhou1iQqOlDbeLML8GvAMyngHOxMeKMd9G0XOjTqisGSqE14BEL2suPQ_yuKWPQ5FLIzR2mhXQB5b7fRXVLZ91orbK_uWNiEEV-X3WEg5CWRoMXG9S0cc5pCU4QVxhg0Cr4IAzGEyKhP4Moq-fCRxQh36jZSKAMiBj7OjIqKxXFiSM9w0hYtqbalT82vf93yxqopovBAo2wNZMUu1kaZl5iBw2nMFE2Q5eeevotJPRgtcG7hYxcgsc1OcXgEasEjrhJKlZQyolaR6gNbKIySUKe6f9g8WF3mmSssnyVb2hckVTEtHTemsbix77GGn4%3D)**

From our victories in Florida to President Trump’s landslide win, we dealt some crushing blows to the woke agenda – particularly as it relates to our kids in school.

**But this is not close to over. The Left is motivated, flush in cash, and out for revenge.**

If we get complacent, _**we will lose our Senate majority**_. That’s the last thing we need.

[**President Trump put his faith in me to win this critical special election. Now I ask for yours. Don’t delay. Rush in a donation. subject: Cruelty and corruption

body:
As long as I’m governor, we’re going to keep calling out the cruelty and corruption in Washington
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95844?refcode=em20250927-9480&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9480%2E614464%2EG5ft3Y)
Peter,
Donald Trump is motivated by just two things: cruelty and corruption. He grifts off Americans — and savors our suffering.
He’s used every second of his Presidency to rig the system for himself, and his buddies — cutting taxes for billionaires at the expense of childhood cancer research, affordable healthcare, and programs that millions of Americans rely on.
This is a boneheaded approach to government — and the worst part is we risk it seeping into Minnesota. We’ve got a bunch of Trump wannabes running for Governor here with plans to run Minnesota like Mar-a-Lago.
But, I promise you this: I’ll never stop fighting to protect this state we love from Trump’s corruption and cruelty, no matter which of his lackeys is peddling it.
**[If you're with me, will you split a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign so we can continue showing the country that there is a better way forward?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95844?refcode=em20250927-9480&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9480%2E614464%2EG5ft3Y)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tim Walz and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95845?refcode=em20250927-9480&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9480%2E614464%2EG5ft3Y) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95845?refcode=em20250927-9480&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9480%2E614464%2EG5ft3Y) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95845?refcode=em20250927-9480&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9480%2E614464%2EG5ft3Y) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95845?refcode=em20250927-9480&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9480%2E614464%2EG5ft3Y) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95845?refcode=em20250927-9480&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9480%2E614464%2EG5ft3Y) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95845?refcode=em20250927-9480&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9480%2E614464%2EG5ft3Y) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95844?refcode=em20250927-9480&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9480%2E614464%2EG5ft3Y)

Thank you for being with me,
Tim Walz

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I never thought I would run for office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
I'm just a geologist-turned-brewer who entered public service to do what's right for the people of my state.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116072362/572382699/1435897075?refcode=email_092725_bio-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTZhYjM2Yy1lZTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ChX6TklcUP-TKu3j8DG5NIWwwdbmn_O-qHEZDY2tvBk=&emci=c5c51542-099b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=b96ab36c-ee9b-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7280715) I'll be honest, folks. I never saw myself serving in the U.S. Senate.

This is a longer email about my story and how I came to fight for hardworking Coloradans in the Senate, and I hope you’ll read it until the end. **[But if you don’t have time, please, take a moment and chip in a couple bucks to my campaign before time runs out on our end-of-quarter deadline. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116072363/572382700/-984874665?refcode=email_092725_bio-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTZhYjM2Yy1lZTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ChX6TklcUP-TKu3j8DG5NIWwwdbmn_O-qHEZDY2tvBk=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116072365/572382702/-984874665?refcode=email_092725_bio-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTZhYjM2Yy1lZTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ChX6TklcUP-TKu3j8DG5NIWwwdbmn_O-qHEZDY2tvBk=)
---
Back in the mid-1980s, I was a geologist – until I was laid off for 27 months. Then, I took every scrap of savings in my bank account and took a gamble on opening my own business, Wynkoop Brewing Company, in downtown Denver.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116072366/572382704/-8077494?refcode=email_092725_bio-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTZhYjM2Yy1lZTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ChX6TklcUP-TKu3j8DG5NIWwwdbmn_O-qHEZDY2tvBk=)
I remember working 80-hour weeks. I remember lying awake at night wondering how we were going to make it. And I remember being so angry that my government wasn't working for me.

So, I ran for Mayor. And once elected, I focused every day on making decisions based on what was best for Denver.

Then, I was elected Governor on the premise of uniting people, finding common ground, hashing things out, and getting things done.

And after we flipped Colorado’s Senate seat in 2020, I got my hands dirty working hard to deliver real change for Coloradans. We invested billions of dollars to confront the climate crisis, lowered prescription drug costs, made investments to rebuild our infrastructure, and brought thousands of good-paying manufacturing jobs back to America.

But look, I’ve also seen how broken Washington is. I see politicians who only listen to those who cut big campaign checks while ignoring the rest of us. And it’s clear we need more leaders who are willing to cut through the political deadlock and work to move this country forward.

Here's why I'm telling you this: **my story is the reason I remain grounded amid the nonsense and dysfunction that's happening in our government.**

Because with all the chaos in Washington, you need somebody who rolls up their sleeves and fights every day for all of us – not just those they agree with.

Like I said, I never thought I'd find myself in the U.S. Senate, but I’m running for re-election because Coloradans deserve a leader they can trust to do right by them. And I'm just a geologist-turned-brewer who entered public service to do what's right for the people of my state.

That’s why I don't take money from corporate PACs like your typical politician. Instead, I rely on grassroots folks like you. And it’s why I'm depending on your contribution today to help us meet our upcoming end-of-quarter fundraising goal of this election cycle. Even just $5 here or $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
**[So I have to ask: will you make a donation of whatever is meaningful to you before our deadline ends Tuesday night? Together, we can defend this seat we flipped back in 2020 and keep power in the hands of Coloradans:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116072368/572382705/-984874665?refcode=email_092725_bio-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTZhYjM2Yy1lZTliLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ChX6TklcUP-TKu3j8DG5NIWwwdbmn_O-qHEZDY2tvBk=)**

#### [Starting Today--ONLY thru the end of the month!!--Take Advantage of our 20% Sale Off ALL Paid Subscriptions! Act NOW Before it's OVER!](https://substack.com/redirect/1fab3c10-cf9e-48d1-b30d-5ac60e1f7cc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Make Me An Amplifier for 20% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/1fab3c10-cf9e-48d1-b30d-5ac60e1f7cc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ff115c1-e90a-4655-86f1-384dc137247c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Trump administration has long excelled at the vulgar display of power, but has now outdone even its sleaziest past.
This starts with Tom Homan, President Trump's border czar who has managed to be both a crook and a clown.
Homan, amidst snarling about the sanctity of American law and wickedness of foreigners, was caught last year--like a child grabbing and running away with a sack of Halloween candy--[accepting a cava store bag stuffed with fifty thousand dollars](https://substack.com/redirect/0260afb4-af66-430d-8cd1-4b4f80b630e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in cold, crisp bills.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a1fe288b-6b87-4102-ba67-f14b440dbd3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
FBI agents say they recorded Homan in the act of bribery on-camera. And what happened?
Nothing.
We learned this week that the Trump Department of Justice dropped the case like a bad habit, leaving Homan not disgraced but promoted, his slobbering loyalty to Trump rewarded as if it were a medal of honor.
Meanwhile, Attorney General Pam Bondi, who seems to measure achievement by her own capacity to pander, is hailing her Justice Department's success in indicting former FBI Director James Comey.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9389ce40-ef08-435d-bee8-b48178ef157f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Comey allegedly lied to Congress when he denied leaking classified information about the investigation into Russia's 2016 election interference.
Trump's DOJ 1.0 investigated this in 2019 and found no evidence the Comey information was classified and thus declined to prosecute.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.DfMXVOtYdFGccSe-5SpTZqMYuiTYsQRKbq8HcIwY63o?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=174650952)
But now, with a U.S. Attorney in Virginia who has never prosecuted a case in her life. Attorney General Bondi has her Comey indictment. Oh and this attorney has been on the job a whole week.
Mind you, this only happened after the previous Trump appointee resigned rather than move forward with the Comey prosecution farce. Which didn't deter Bondi from laughably tweeting out, "no one is above the law."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a4da7980-339f-4529-bd76-a48443fa6b1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The hypocrisy and lack of self-awareness are being performed with all the subtleties of a marching band in a funeral parlor.
Regarding Comey, even the pundits and hosts on Fox News-Trump's favorite propaganda network, are calling the indictment flimsy. Saying it will collapse under its own pretense.
Fox News legal analyst Andrew McCarthy said, "I don't think there is a case."
Fox News host Howard Kurtz said, "let's not mince words here. I say this as a former Justice Department reporter: this was completely and totally orchestrated by President Trump."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/36a57641-0f19-4862-a877-35cb516e5198?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In other words, witnesses, evidence, and the law, the poor things, have been abandoned like a Trump-bankrupted casino-forgotten, rusting, irrelevant.
The same abandonment of the rule of law applies to Tom Homan's alleged bribery. Here was a man who postured as granite incarnate--the steely defender of borders, the scourge of migrants, the prophet of "zero tolerance."
And yet, faced not with a caravan of asylum seekers but with a shopping bag bulging with cash, he melted into jelly. His stone jaw dissolved into the greasy grin of a slot-machine addict watching the cherries line up.
The border czar, it turns out, is not a sentinel of virtue but a slovenly street-corner hustler with a Trump White House badge.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.DfMXVOtYdFGccSe-5SpTZqMYuiTYsQRKbq8HcIwY63o?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=174650952)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e529b5a7-bdeb-44ae-8147-41d2f6b12af0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The grotesque symmetry of the Homan and Comey investigations is an unprecedented moral tableau.
On the one hand, Homan, a federal official literally takes a bag of cash without fear of consequence. On the other, a feeble, politically convenient prosecution of Comey is celebrated as a heroic DOJ victory.
It is government reduced to a hideous and utterly ridiculous theater. Our nation that once valued law and integrity has now become a carnival freak show [filled with bribery, cowardice, and naked partisanship](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8fa1ec-2d33-4946-aa57-8db9a90410ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The stench of corruption is everywhere and the scent of decency is entirely absent.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a7ff31cd-5f65-479c-9124-730240096605?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Many of us are asking how can our nation endure such moral decay? ](https://substack.com/redirect/8917d6d0-e25c-42e4-92da-d2dcdb8b12d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The answer is that rot thrives in the open air of incompetence and cronyism.
Homan's paper bag, Bondi's self-congratulation, and the Trump DOJ's selective zeal for prosecution are not anomalies. [They are the Trump administration's entire operating procedure. ](https://substack.com/redirect/1dbe50c7-458d-4346-b44b-78e4ba8048de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In this spectacle, the absurd becomes normal, the corrupt is celebrated, and the honest are mocked or ignored.
To be clear, America has certainly faced high-level public corruption before.
During Teapot Dome, Warren Harding's crew stuffed their pockets with oil leases as if they were prize sausages. There was Boss Tweed, strutting around Tammany Hall in suits so finely tailored they could barely contain his bribe-bloated carcass.
Yet Harding's crooks at least had the decency to operate in whispers.
Homan's degeneracy, by contrast, was performed blatantly and with no shame. He was caught in a sting so obvious it could have been scripted.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.DfMXVOtYdFGccSe-5SpTZqMYuiTYsQRKbq8HcIwY63o?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=174650952)
Then, it was all whitewashed by a Trump Justice Department more corrupt than the criminals it is supposed to catch.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b255612-961a-46cb-bee1-f6813a497ef9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump, of course, treats all of this with his customary shrug. In his theology, crime is no sin, provided it is committed in the cathedral of Trumpian loyalty. What, after all, is a little bribery among friends?
The Republic may falter, the laws may be mocked, but the one inviolable commandment is obedience to the Great Orange Man. To be Trump's man is to be untouchable. To oppose him is to be hounded.
It is a system of justice recognizable in any banana republic, though even banana republics occasionally jail their thieves.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bc9d2209-994b-43a9-beda-b22b5b42e0a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In Trump's America though, the thieves are people with black or brown skin, as well as all who oppose Trump.
**If Tom Homan had been an immigrant caught with a forged twenty-dollar bill, he 'd be rotting in a private detention cell before sundown.**
One can only hope that Homan and Trump will be prison mates someday, and [that Democrats step up to make this happen](https://substack.com/redirect/5e94b1cb-2904-417a-97d5-30777cc9de1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Until then, history will record that the Trump administration was a government that substituted loyalty for honesty, noise for reason, and shameless corruption for the common good. James Comey's legacy (checkered as it was as FBI director) will be different.
It'll be that he eventually fought Donald Trump, faced ridiculous administration payback, and [humiliated the Trump DOJ](https://substack.com/redirect/8917d6d0-e25c-42e4-92da-d2dcdb8b12d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in court. (Look for a jury to quickly find Comey not guilty if a judge doesn't dismiss the charges first).
Tom Homan's legacy will be of cowardice and cash.
A Trump border czar undone not by invaders from abroad, but by a grimy grocery bag stuffed with cash. And pressed into his pasty, trembling hands by an FBI agent who must have struggled not to laugh.

subject: Charlie Kirk: A life of faith. A legacy that endures.

body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18733817/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvSndQcXl4enFVQg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JEbA/qP2hpZHM9bmM2dndTWWdvVDVsZGFscw/gaNhj1A/s0pbb537c50)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Patriot, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind — _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[**Watch Our Tribute to Charlie Here**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._ For Charlie, \- The Turning Point Action Family

name: Team Deb Haaland
subject: Stand with University of New Mexico resident physicians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4680%2E400544%2EieZWLi)
**New Mexico is in the midst of a healthcare crisis.**
Donald Trump is raising healthcare costs, and New Mexico is facing the second-worst physician shortage in the country.
Right now, people are waiting months for care, traveling out of state to see a specialist, or going without care. At the same time, healthcare providers are stretched thin, underpaid, and overworked.
**Supporting our doctors has never been more urgent.** But instead, the University of New Mexico refuses to raise resident physicians' pay — _among the lowest in the Southwest_ — and is trying to remove strong anti-discrimination language from their contracts.
**Failure to invest in healthcare providers and tackle our healthcare crisis head-on will have long-term consequences for care across our state.**
That’s why Deb is urging the UNM Board of Regents to increase salaries for resident doctors and preserve anti-discrimination language in their union contracts. And it’s why, as governor, she’ll protect Medicaid, lower healthcare premiums, invest in rural hospitals, and recruit and retain healthcare providers.
**[Will you add your name now to stand with Deb and UNM’s unionized resident physicians? When we stand with resident physicians, we’re standing up for patients, for families, and for a future where every New Mexican can get the care they need.](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_ms_DH_20250927_solidarity/?source=em20250927-4680&akid=4680%2E400544%2EieZWLi)**
**[Add your name »](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_ms_DH_20250927_solidarity/?source=em20250927-4680&akid=4680%2E400544%2EieZWLi)**
In solidarity,
— Team Deb Haaland
* * *

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

clean_body: New Mexico is in the midst of a healthcare crisis. Donald Trump is raising healthcare costs, and New Mexico is facing the second-worst physician shortage in the country. Right now, people are waiting months for care, traveling out of state to see a specialist, or going without care. At the same time, healthcare providers are stretched thin, underpaid, and overworked. Supporting our doctors has never been more urgent. But instead, the University of New Mexico refuses to raise resident physicians' pay — among the lowest in the Southwest — and is trying to remove strong anti-discrimination language from their contracts. Failure to invest in healthcare providers and tackle our healthcare crisis head-on will have long-term consequences for care across our state. That’s why Deb is urging the UNM Board of Regents to increase salaries for resident doctors and preserve anti-discrimination language in their union contracts. And it’s why, as governor, she’ll protect Medicaid, lower healthcare premiums, invest in rural hospitals, and recruit and retain healthcare providers. In solidarity, — Team Deb Haaland

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Reveals New Breakthrough Solar Generator – Demand Skyrockets!
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24489629/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvWGVWQlJ5Z0dFRA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsZ2tCU1FNdg/qP2hpZHM9bmNwTEJTZzllVVF6TkVscw/gaNhkdA/s0k971cc58c)

**FOX & Friends Reveals
New Breakthrough Solar
Generator - Demand
Skyrockets!** _**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24489629/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsZ2tCU1FNdg/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1BJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQQ/gaNhkdA/sap9591ba92) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24489629/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsZ2tCU1FNdg/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1BJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQQ/gaNhkdA/sap9591ba92) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **NATIONAL SECURITY EXPERTS FEAR IMMINENT THREAT TO OUR POWER GRID** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24489629/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsZ2tCU1FNdg/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1BJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQQ/gaNhkdA/sap9591ba92). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** **YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW AND IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2500X** [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24489629/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsZ2tCU1FNdg/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1BJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQQ/gaNhkdA/sap9591ba92) The [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24489629/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsZ2tCU1FNdg/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1BJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQQ/gaNhkdA/sap9591ba92) now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. With this NEW Patriot Power Generator 2500X...
* You get MORE power...
* You get FASTER recharging...
* And it can even power your FRIDGE!

It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2500X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24489629/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsZ2tCU1FNdg/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1BJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQQ/gaNhkdA/sap9591ba92) is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,500 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it.
1. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight.
2. Plug in the solar panel.
3. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun!

Amazingly, it takes just 90 minutes to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **ORDER TODAY AND GET 15 FREE GIFTS WORTH $1,391.70!**
* FREE 100-Watt Solar Panel ($499.95 Value)
* FREE Roll & Go Generator Cart ($69.95 Value)
* FREE Patriot Power Cell CX ($29.95 Value)
* FREE LED Light String ($49.95 Value)
* FREE 25-Foot Solar Panel Cord ($49.95 Value)
* FREE Online Event With Expert ($149 Value)
* FREE Survival Digital Library ($19.95 Value)
* FREE Report: Top 7 Reasons Grid Will Fail
* FREE Report: Blackout Response Guide
* FREE Report: Generator Survival Checklist
* FREE Report: Solar Discount Secrets
* FREE $25 Gift Certificate
* FREE Lifetime Technical Support ($149 Value)
* FREE Private VIP Phone Line ($99 Value)
* FREE Shipping & Handling ($200 Value)
* FREE Senior & Military Discount ($50 Value)
* **Total Savings of $1,391.70!**

**_And YES! There's also an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!_** **PLEASE DON'T WAIT
TO LEARN MORE** Demand is surging... Don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. [**CLICK HERE TO SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24489629/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsZ2tCU1FNdg/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1BJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQQ/gaNhkdA/sap9591ba92) You'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **CUSTOMERS LOVE THEIR PATRIOT POWER GENERATORS!** [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24489629/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsZ2tCU1FNdg/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1BJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQQ/gaNhkdA/sap9591ba92) **_Joe B._**_
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!"_ _**Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!"_ _**Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!"_ _**Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!"_ _**Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!"_ _**Angel H.**
"Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver."_ _**Sharon P.**
"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic."_ [**CLICK HERE TO SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24489629/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI2LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5Mjc/LbmNsZ2tCU1FNdg/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzQ4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVBQRy0yNVgtMTgzMC0yMDI1MDkyNy1BJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1QUEctMjVYLTE4MzAtMjAyNTA5MjctQQ/gaNhkdA/sap9591ba92)

Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW AND IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2500X The now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. With this NEW Patriot Power Generator 2500X... You get MORE power... You get FASTER recharging... And it can even power your FRIDGE! It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas. You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2500X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY The is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,500 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it. 1. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight. 2. Plug in the solar panel. 3. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun! Amazingly, it takes just 90 minutes to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. ORDER TODAY AND GET 15 FREE GIFTS WORTH $1,391.70! FREE 100-Watt Solar Panel ($499.95 Value) FREE Roll & Go Generator Cart ($69.95 Value) FREE Patriot Power Cell CX ($29.95 Value) FREE LED Light String ($49.95 Value) FREE 25-Foot Solar Panel Cord ($49.95 Value) FREE Online Event With Expert ($149 Value) FREE Survival Digital Library ($19.95 Value) FREE Report: Top 7 Reasons Grid Will Fail FREE Report: Blackout Response Guide FREE Report: Generator Survival Checklist FREE Report: Solar Discount Secrets FREE $25 Gift Certificate FREE Lifetime Technical Support ($149 Value) FREE Private VIP Phone Line ($99 Value) FREE Shipping & Handling ($200 Value) FREE Senior & Military Discount ($50 Value) Total Savings of $1,391.70! And YES! There's also an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! PLEASE DON'T WAIT TO LEARN MORE Demand is surging... Don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. You'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. CUSTOMERS LOVE THEIR PATRIOT POWER GENERATORS! Joe B. "My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" Bob A. "Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" Carla U. "The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" Bernice L. "Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" Patricia T. "This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" Angel H. "Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." Sharon P. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic."_

name: Jared Golden
subject: I represent the reddest district held by a Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I need your help to protect Maine’s second district.
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94251?t=6&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp) Friends,

Following the last election, I now represent the reddest district held by a Democrat in Congress. That means I will be a top target for the GOP establishment and one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country next election.

**I refuse to take corporate PAC money, so I need your help to start building our coffers for the next cycle so we can keep this seat in good hands.**

[Will you split a donation between me and the Voter Protection Project to help protect this seat?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94251?t=7&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jared Golden and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94252?t=8&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94253?t=9&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94254?t=10&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94255?t=11&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94256?t=12&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp)
Look, friends: Maine’s second district re-elected me because they know I am someone who will work across the aisle and put working families first. And we’ve won some of the closest races in the country with your support.

**But the GOP establishment sees that as a vulnerability and I expect they will spend millions of dollars to defeat me - even more than they did last year!**

[I’m counting on your support to start building up our resources. If you are able, please chip in any amount to help kickstart our fundraising for the next cycle.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94251?t=13&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp)

I can’t thank you enough for your continued support,

\- Jared
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21340%2E878179%2EwVFbKp)

That means I will be a top target for the GOP establishment and one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country next election. I refuse to take corporate PAC money, so I need your help to start building our coffers for the next cycle so we can keep this seat in good hands. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jared Golden and VPP will go through immediately: | Look, friends: Maine’s second district re-elected me because they know I am someone who will work across the aisle and put working families first. And we’ve won some of the closest races in the country with your support. But the GOP establishment sees that as a vulnerability and I expect they will spend millions of dollars to defeat me - even more than they did last year! I can’t thank you enough for your continued support, \- Jared | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. body:

Peter,
Katie Porter is running to be California’s next governor—and this race is heating up. She’s counting on grassroots supporters to power her to victory, so here are **[5 reasons to chip in $5 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250927_2_ak?refcode=em20250927-40203&amount=5&refcode2=40203_3422442_5HWSoF&akid=40203%2E3422442%2E5HWSoF)**

**2\. Trump is trying to steal our democracy.** California needs a governor who will stop Trump from tipping the scales in his favor. Katie held him accountable during his first term and she’ll do it again as governor.
**3\. Republicans want to flip California red.** The closest candidates to Katie in recent polls are both Republicans—who will stop at nothing to see us lose.
**4\. Our opponents are spending big.** A billionaire has already spent over a million dollars on campaign ads. Unlike them, Katie relies on grassroots donations to power this campaign.
**5\. Katie’s in the lead—and we need to keep it that way.** Three polls in a row show Katie is the Democratic frontrunner, but we can’t afford to get complacent.
**[Peter, can you pitch in $5 to help us lower costs, protect democracy, and elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250927_2_ak?refcode=em20250927-40203&amount=5&refcode2=40203_3422442_5HWSoF&akid=40203%2E3422442%2E5HWSoF)**

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: The Trump administration is weaponizing the government to defeat me
body:
Please read this.
Peter —
I need you to hear about the reporting from Thursday:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250927-1?refcode=em-20250927-1&refcode2=674_1086043_F3hQnb&akid=674%2E1086043%2EF3hQnb)
**CBS News is reporting that the Trump administration improperly released my personal records from my time in the Navy. It’s a shameful attempt to smear my record.**
This is a wildly unprecedented — and blatantly illegal — weaponization of the federal government. All part of an effort to ensure that the president’s preferred candidate wins an election.
These military records detail my early life, and go so far as to include my Social Security Number and insurance records. There are supposed to be several layers of checks set up to prevent something like this.
This isn’t just about me. Any member of the United States military that the Trump administration sees as an enemy can have their personal data exposed.
And it’s incredibly dangerous.
**[Peter, Donald Trump and MAGA extremists have shown that they will stop at nothing to defeat me. So I’m asking: please rush a split donation to my campaign and Wes Moore to help me fight back against the attempts to smear my name.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250927-1?refcode=em-20250927-1&refcode2=674_1086043_F3hQnb&akid=674%2E1086043%2EF3hQnb)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250927-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250927-1&refcode2=674_1086043_F3hQnb&akid=674%2E1086043%2EF3hQnb)**
Thank you,
Mikie Sherrill

name: Andy Kim
subject: I’m proud to stand with Nellie
body:
Right now, Nellie is under attack from the NRCC.

| |
---
One thing I’ve learned in public service is that integrity matters. When people lose trust in their government, our democracy suffers. **That’s why I’ve made it my goal in the Senate to put honesty and service above politics, and why I’m proud to stand with Nellie Pou.** Right now, Nellie is under attack from the NRCC. They’re manufacturing fake memos, stamping them with the Democratic logo, and handing them to reporters as if they were real. It’s dishonest. It’s desperate.**And it’s exactly what’s wrong with our politics today.** But this is just the beginning. Republicans have already rolled out waves of false ads and are prepared to spend millions in shady Super PAC money to bury Nellie in lies. Why? Because they know NJ-09 is one of the most competitive districts in the country. Here are the facts:
* Trump carried NJ-09 in 2024.
* Nellie is a frontline Democrat.
* If Republicans flip this seat, they keep their majority in Congress.

_**We can’t let that happen.**_ Nellie is fighting for the truth, for working families, and for a Congress that serves the people — not special interests. I know firsthand how hard this fight is, and I know what it takes to win it. **[That’s why I’m asking: Will you split a contribution today between Nellie Pou and my campaign so we can stand strong against the lies and keep integrity in politics alive?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116072740/572383773/-603027761?refcode=250927_kim_pousplit_l1&ms=250927_kim_pousplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQzNmU3MDgtZjM5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=az2Zdxt48BoXOblX9eQLavkayljzPMn1nVCWnklt-xg=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116072747/572383780/-603027761?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250927_kim_pousplit&ms=250927_kim_pousplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQzNmU3MDgtZjM5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=az2Zdxt48BoXOblX9eQLavkayljzPMn1nVCWnklt-xg=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116072748/572383781/-603027761?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250927_kim_pousplit&ms=250927_kim_pousplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQzNmU3MDgtZjM5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=az2Zdxt48BoXOblX9eQLavkayljzPMn1nVCWnklt-xg=)

name: LCV Shop
subject: We’re FALLING for you, public lands
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI5OTMwODIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjMwMDM2Nzc4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
https://links.messages.lcv. Photo of Dolores Canyons, Colorado, Credit: Bob Wick Peter, Fall is here, and nature is calling! Whether your plans include jumping into a
fresh pile of leaves, hiking in a national park, or sitting outside with friends
and family, don’t let the season pass by without adding one important item to
your fall pastime list: working to protect public lands. From national parks and monuments, to national wildlife refuges, wilderness
areas, seashores, and forests, our public lands benefit all of us in many ways.
Yet despite overwhelming nationwide support for protecting these irreplaceable
treasures, the Trump administration is continuing to threaten public lands and
attempting to sell them off to the highest bidder. Public lands protect natural ecosystems and safeguard habitats, migration
routes, and breeding grounds for thousands of different species. They mitigate
climate change, sustain our clean water sources, and provide recreation
opportunities that drive local economies. And they’re historically and
culturally significant, protecting sites that are sacred to Tribal and other
communities. These lands are too important to lose — for now and for future

clean_body: To view this mail in a browser, copy into your browser. Photo of Dolores Canyons, Colorado, Credit: Bob Wick Peter, Fall is here, and nature is calling! Whether your plans include jumping into a fresh pile of leaves, hiking in a national park, or sitting outside with friends and family, don’t let the season pass by without adding one important item to your fall pastime list: working to protect public lands. From national parks and monuments, to national wildlife refuges, wilderness areas, seashores, and forests, our public lands benefit all of us in many ways. Yet despite overwhelming nationwide support for protecting these irreplaceable treasures, the Trump administration is continuing to threaten public lands and attempting to sell them off to the highest bidder. Public lands protect natural ecosystems and safeguard habitats, migration routes, and breeding grounds for thousands of different species. They mitigate climate change, sustain our clean water sources, and provide recreation opportunities that drive local economies. And they’re historically and culturally significant, protecting sites that are sacred to Tribal and other communities. These lands are too important to lose — for now and for future generations. Spread the word about protecting public lands and clean water to your friends, family, and community with the LCV Shop! GO TO SHOP This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: You deserve an explanation...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hi Peter —
[**I’m writing to ask, humbly, if you will chip in $5 to my reelection campaign ahead of our important FEC fundraising deadline this Tuesday.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250927-2-f&t=1&akid=831%2E5691347%2EquwFr5)
Here’s why this request is so important, especially today:
The end of this month marks the most important fundraising deadline we’ve faced so far in our campaign, and one of the most critical tests of the movement we’ve built in Georgia.
After the deadline, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission — and shortly after, those numbers will be made public.
Everyone from Donald Trump to my Republican opponents and their billionaire allies are going to look at our fundraising numbers closely. Very closely.
If they think we look weak, you can bet they’ll flood the airwaves with even more attack ads designed to distort my record. Attacks we can’t afford this early in the campaign.
We have to show everyone that our movement in Georgia is thriving and unstoppable — that we have what it takes to build the strongest voter outreach and mobilization program our state has ever seen. Because that’s what it’s going to take to win this race.
That’s why I’m personally asking:
[**Will you make a contribution to my campaign before our critical FEC deadline Tuesday night? Every donation counts. Each one sends a powerful message that people like you have my back.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250927-2-f&t=2&akid=831%2E5691347%2EquwFr5)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250927-2-f&t=3&akid=831%2E5691347%2EquwFr5)**
Thank you for everything.
Jon

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=831%2E5691347%2EquwFr5) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=831%2E5691347%2EquwFr5) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: If God is for us, who can be against us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
This is very personal to me – I’m only sharing it with close friends.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Friend,
Since the day I returned to the White House, I have felt the mighty hand of God guiding this movement. His Word reminds us: **__“If God is for us, who can be against us?”__** **____**
The enemies of freedom thought they could break us with lies, with courts, with endless persecution – but they were WRONG.
Our strength does not come from man. It comes from the LORD. Always has. Always will.
Let me tell you this: the fight to restore America’s foundation of FAITH, FAMILY, and FREEDOM is just beginning.

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
The early patriots faced impossible odds, but they stood together. We must do the same. United by prayer. United by conviction.
So here’s the deal. I need you NOW.
**_[Please, if you can afford it, chip in and show the Radical Left that we will NEVER surrender. And together, with God, we’ll RESTORE the values that made America GREAT.>>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
And remember this – when you give, you are not just contributing to a political cause. You are sowing a SEED OF FAITH into the future of our Nation.
The Bible tells us faith as small as a mustard seed can move mountains. And together, our faith will move America back to GOD. Back to TRUTH. Back to GREATNESS.

[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
But if you cannot give right now, I want you to know this: your PRAYERS, your FAITH, your SUPPORT are worth more than all the gold in the world.
With God as our refuge, and with YOU by my side, we will SAVE AMERICA.
Thank you and may God bless you,

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Donald John Trump

[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Mark Warner
subject: From the Oval Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Last week, from the Oval Office, Donald Trump had a complete and total meltdown, attacked me and my good friend Tim Kaine, and smeared our record of delivering for Virginia. Look folks, I’m not losing sleep over the fact that Donald Trump thinks I’m a “bad guy” or "among the worst” Democrats.

And I’m sure as hell not going to hesitate to call out his administration for their corruption, chaos, and downright incompetence.

But here’s what I _am_ worried about: **Trump’s allied super PACs are paying attention, and they have their marching orders now.**

This is how it goes – first Trump attacks you, then the super PACs swoop in.

And frankly, with control of Congress on the line, I’ve got to be prepared for my toughest and most expensive campaign yet.

**That’s why I called my campaign manager and increased our fundraising goals for the quarter. With just 3 more days left in the month, it’s going to be an all hands on deck moment for our campaign.**

[**_This is not something I do lightly, but we need to be ready. So if you can spare $10 or $25 or even $50 – I’m asking you to split a donation between my reelection campaign and Maggie Hassan before the end-of-the quarter. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Please lend me a minute of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250927-999&t=1001&akid=1007%2E251025%2EJTnABD ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250927-999&t=1002&akid=1007%2E251025%2EJTnABD ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

I’ll be honest up front. I’m about to ask for your support. But before you
close out of this email, I just ask that you lend me a minute of your time
to share why this moment is so important and what your help would mean.

Still reading? Thank you... I appreciate you. 🙏

The Democratic Party is in a do-or-die moment. We lost a winnable election
to a creepy authoritarian billionaire. But our party leaders and
establishment consultants learned the wrong lessons. They want to entrench
us even further as the do-nothing, stand-for-nothing party. A party with
no excitement, no moral clarity, and no agenda.

Our race in Michigan is the epicenter of the battle for the soul of the
Democratic Party. If we screw it up here, we’re doomed elsewhere. We are
the key swing state with a wide-open primary to determine who’ll take on
Mike Rogers for a must-win U.S. Senate seat.

The same establishment leaders who botched the last election have their
thumb on the scales in this primary. They’ve handpicked a Democrat who
votes at times like a Republican, who schmoozes with corporate PACs, and
wins over AIPAC. They believe the way to win is to be as quiet as possible
about key issues. And they’ll sell their loyalty to whoever writes the
largest check as long as it affords them enough money for an extra TV ad
or two.

They’re dead wrong. And if their milquetoast moderate wins this primary,
we could lose not only Michigan’s Senate seat, but any shot we have at
reshaping the future of this party to give us a fighting chance at taking
power back from Donald Trump.

Now, it’s easy to critique. And folks will ask, “Abdul, what do you
propose?” I’ll answer that.

* How about a Democratic Party with candidates we are — for once —
excited to vote for? Candidates who aren’t afraid to speak their minds
and capture attention in an age where social media is such a critical
and powerful tool.
* How about a Democratic Party that stands for something concrete and
popular? Medicare for All. Tax the billionaires. Stop funding genocide
in Gaza.
* How about a Democratic Party that brings in new voters, young voters,
and disillusioned voters? Offer a real alternative to the false choice
between “status quo moderation” and “right-wing authoritarianism.”

My friends, we can be that Democratic Party. But if we lose to the
establishment here in Michigan, we may be set back in that mission for
years to come.

So today, I’m asking you for help. Not just to elect me as the next U.S.
Senator from Michigan — but to transform the Democratic Party as we know
it into an exciting, purpose-driven, and tent-expanding team that can
defeat Trumpism and wannabe oligarchs for decades to come.

I don’t want to come off as overconfident, but depending on the poll,
we’re nearly tied for first or second place in this race. Winning isn’t
some unachievable feat. And if we out-raise our opponents in this critical
quarter, we will do two things:

1. We will have enough resources to spread the word about our campaign
and build a solid lead heading into the primary.
2. We will attract serious attention from the national politicians and
pundits who will see that our campaign represents the best path
forward for the Democrats to win in November.

Not everyone can give the same amount — and that’s the beauty of a
people-powered campaign. Some will step up with larger gifts, others with
smaller ones. Together, we build something stronger than corporate PACs
ever could.

* If you can afford it, please consider contributing more for those who
can’t. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250927-2-ak?amount=500&refcode=em20250927-999&refcode2=1007_251025_JTnABD&akid=1007%2E251025%2EJTnABD ]Click here to donate $1,000, $500, $100, or as much as you
can.
* If you can pitch in at the grassroots level, [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250927-2-ak?amount=25&refcode=em20250927-999&refcode2=1007_251025_JTnABD&akid=1007%2E251025%2EJTnABD ]click here to donate
$25 or any amount you’re comfortable with.
* If you can’t give right now, that’s okay too. Help share our message
on social media, forward this email to a friend, or [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/339?utm_source=em20250927-999&t=1004&akid=1007%2E251025%2EJTnABD ]sign up to
volunteer. Your support is just as essential to this movement as any
donation.

I can’t thank you enough for taking the time to read this. I know it was
long, but I hope it left you feeling hopeful heading into this primary.

We have work to do, but we can win.

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1005&akid=1007%2E251025%2EJTnABD
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1006&akid=1007%2E251025%2EJTnABD

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: The Trump administration is weaponizing the government to defeat me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Please read this.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2355%2E135344%2EYx2eyX)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherill-feb25.OCNMSH&refcode=em250927-1&refcode2=2355.135344.Yx2eyX&t=2&akid=2355%2E135344%2EYx2eyX)
---
Team —
I need you to hear about the reporting from this week:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherill-feb25.OCNMSH&refcode=em250927-1&refcode2=2355.135344.Yx2eyX&t=3&akid=2355%2E135344%2EYx2eyX)
**CBS News is reporting that the Trump administration improperly released my personal records from my time in the Navy. It’s a shameful attempt to smear my record.**
This is a wildly unprecedented — and blatantly illegal — weaponization of the federal government. All part of an effort to ensure that the president’s preferred candidate wins an election.
These military records detail my early life, and go so far as to include my Social Security Number and insurance records. There are supposed to be several layers of checks set up to prevent something like this.
This isn’t just about me. Any member of the United States military that the Trump administration sees as an enemy can have their personal data exposed.
And it’s incredibly dangerous.
[**Donald Trump and MAGA extremists have shown that they will stop at nothing to defeat me. So I’m asking: please rush a split donation to my campaign and Elissa Slotkin to help me fight back against the attempts to smear my name.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherill-feb25.OCNMSH&refcode=em250927-1&t=4&akid=2355%2E135344%2EYx2eyX)

clean_body: Please read this. Team — I need you to hear about the reporting from this week: CBS News is reporting that the Trump administration improperly released my personal records from my time in the Navy. It’s a shameful attempt to smear my record. This is a wildly unprecedented — and blatantly illegal — weaponization of the federal government. All part of an effort to ensure that the president’s preferred candidate wins an election. These military records detail my early life, and go so far as to include my Social Security Number and insurance records. There are supposed to be several layers of checks set up to prevent something like this. This isn’t just about me. Any member of the United States military that the Trump administration sees as an enemy can have their personal data exposed. And it’s incredibly dangerous. name: James Carville
subject: This is so important

body:
Believe me when I tell you

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=919%2E49239%2EJdWg25)

[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6385?t=3&akid=919%2E49239%2EJdWg25)
null, it’s James Carville.
I’ve worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won – and I’ve lost – tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you:
**Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support – right here, right now.**
**[Please chip in every dollar you can spare to Sherrod’s and Haley Stevens’ campaign. He just got back in the fight, and they need folks like you by his side ASAP.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6386?t=4&akid=919%2E49239%2EJdWg25)**
We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt – the list goes on.
We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd!
We have to get our country back on track – and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio.
Sherrod has spent his life fighting for workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people.
**But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) – and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win.**
[**null, if anyone can flip Ohio’s Senate seat, it’s Sherrod Brown. But he can’t do it alone – nobody can: Will you chip in $5 or even $25 right now, split between Sherrod Brown and Haley Stevens, to power his campaign forward and send him to the Senate?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6386?t=5&akid=919%2E49239%2EJdWg25)

body:
Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/57CdP-wFgkuQm58EpOgxvQ2?unsubscribedata=88LDfJkNKF08fDY65j%2BfGVHnZevjhD%2BOdA3dRBmZtcBpvNhvOiinYAPK1%2BTjh9p8jh8YzFknWMMe8EcK79PK%2BVryTrs%2FxrJKps%2BVTovovvbsQQRygCojWl%2FsuGbw0G78h%2B97Bs382RN786Ovb0ycvNVM4iVJU5mO%2FTQb4GgKgI7v7R%2BthSI4YGk%2F7zAsDxJj16Qmd7ECsQayPkWLL99jnHmXpnE49fbbSRilJovvPtfJlmOeSiZJb59QVbv5ev%2BIke7nZ%2F%2BBtczRydjGVPD28rGG7twd1P3OT5UP1Zb%2BZtMmpgytjCyCVPNLYCpk774s8zholMmRKLGGOJUocNWss665CLBBrfppXIDQuh8pv%2BtbvF3UNfL2ndgX%2BODsulupSjUkiaXjNZTwBBZ1CzM%2B%2Fm6KqNSvsM9xd6WUBNyX%2BlVjIZZKHmP7ItEh%2FSijZ578)
---
| |
---
Here at Team Stelson HQ, we're racing against the clock to raise $15k for Janelle Stelson's bid for Congress by Tuesday at midnight. The fact of the matter is, **we're behind where we should be right now.** While we're a little stressed and short on time, we know you're getting _a lot_ of emails asking for money this week, so we wanted to pause for a second and explain. (If you hate Scott Perry or want to support a Democrat with strong values like Janelle, [**you can donate here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116073722/572387133/-315274212?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_092725_Offenses_30DO_D2_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q4ZTc3MGMtZjg5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xeWih_6ANWSZ-3lhWgF7uoVbvJuujN_QRcnUc6VziYA=) But if you need to be convinced, read on...) **Scott Perry has a laundry list of offenses.**
His tariffs are causing healthcare premiums to skyrocket. He helped pass the most significant cut to Medicaid in history and funded tax breaks for his wealthiest donors. He's in favor of a national abortion ban and is constantly pushing new conspiracy theories _**(most recently RFK Jr.'s dangerous lies about Tylenol causing autism).**_ Oh, and remember when the FBI had to confiscate his phone because of his involvement in the attempted January 6th coup? Us too. _**Scott Perry is nothing but a slimy politician, and PA-10 deserves better. Period.**_ **So, why chip in now?**
This deadline is a big deal because it isn't just our deadline; it's set by the FEC. We have to publish our numbers after midnight on Tuesday, and the amount of money we've raised this quarter will go public. If national Republicans and their dark money groups think Janelle looks vulnerable, they're going to give Scott Perry _even more_ of their dirty dollars! [**We can't let that happen.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116073723/572387134/-315274212?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_092725_Offenses_30DO_D2_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q4ZTc3MGMtZjg5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xeWih_6ANWSZ-3lhWgF7uoVbvJuujN_QRcnUc6VziYA=) **Where is your money going?**
Your generous donations help us support the robust field operation we're going to need to run to flip this toss-up district. From buying water bottles for volunteers, to printing campaign lit, to paying for the software we need to connect with voters, none of it is possible without your grassroots support. Janelle has a powerful message worth sharing far and wide: We can make life better for _everyone _by electing a leader who cares about the issues that matter and is willing to fight for what's right. _So did we convince you?_ [**If you're on board with our efforts to oust Scott Perry and send Janelle to fight for us in Congress, donate $10,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116073724/572387135/-315274212?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_092725_Offenses_30DO_D2_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q4ZTc3MGMtZjg5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xeWih_6ANWSZ-3lhWgF7uoVbvJuujN_QRcnUc6VziYA=)[**$25, or even**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116073725/572387136/-315274212?amount=25&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_092725_Offenses_30DO_D2_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q4ZTc3MGMtZjg5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xeWih_6ANWSZ-3lhWgF7uoVbvJuujN_QRcnUc6VziYA=)[**$50 right now before our deadline expires →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116073726/572387137/-315274212?amount=50&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_092725_Offenses_30DO_D2_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q4ZTc3MGMtZjg5Yi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xeWih_6ANWSZ-3lhWgF7uoVbvJuujN_QRcnUc6VziYA=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.
