clean_body: Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Here at Team Stelson HQ, we're racing against the clock to raise $15k for Janelle Stelson's bid for Congress by Tuesday at midnight. The fact of the matter is, we're behind where we should be right now. While we're a little stressed and short on time, we know you're getting a lot of emails asking for money this week, so we wanted to pause for a second and explain. (If you hate Scott Perry or want to support a Democrat with strong values like Janelle, = But if you need to be convinced, read on...) Scott Perry has a laundry list of offenses. His tariffs are causing healthcare premiums to skyrocket. He helped pass the most significant cut to Medicaid in history and funded tax breaks for his wealthiest donors. He's in favor of a national abortion ban and is constantly pushing new conspiracy theories (most recently RFK Jr.'s dangerous lies about Tylenol causing autism). Oh, and remember when the FBI had to confiscate his phone because of his involvement in the attempted January 6th coup? Us too. Scott Perry is nothing but a slimy politician, and PA-10 deserves better. Period. So, why chip in now? This deadline is a big deal because it isn't just our deadline; it's set by the FEC. We have to publish our numbers after midnight on Tuesday, and the amount of money we've raised this quarter will go public. If national Republicans and their dark money groups think Janelle looks vulnerable, they're going to give Scott Perry even more of their dirty dollars! = Where is your money going? Your generous donations help us support the robust field operation we're going to need to run to flip this toss-up district. From buying water bottles for volunteers, to printing campaign lit, to paying for the software we need to connect with voters, none of it is possible without your grassroots support. Janelle has a powerful message worth sharing far and wide: We can make life better for everyone by electing a leader who cares about the issues that matter and is willing to fight for what's right. So did we convince you? = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = We're in this fight together, —Team Stelson | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson is someone we can trust. She has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for over three decades as an Emmy Award-winning journalist. Now, she is taking on MAGA extremist Scott Perry and fighting for what we deserve — standing up for abortion rights, investing in high-quality healthcare and education, and bringing good-paying jobs to the district. =** | = = Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson Friends of Janelle Stelson P.O. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: 👊 🇺🇸 🔥 FACTS you will NEVER see on FOX News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Thank you for your attention to this matter!

We have been getting a lot of attention on Fox News lately, but here are some cold, hard FACTS you won't hear on that network.
💰 Middle class families in California pay LESS in taxes than in states like Texas, Oklahoma, and Arkansas.
👷 50 million of the 52 million jobs created since the Cold War have been created in Democratic administrations. Republican presidents have one thing in common: recession.
🔴 Life expectancy, infant mortality, deaths of despair, wages and uninsured rates are all worse off in red states.
🚨 For Greg Abbott and Texas Republicans talking trash: California is the fourth largest economy in the WORLD. We contribute $83 billion to the federal government while Texas takes $71 billion.
🥇 California is #1 in manufacturing, #1 in farming, #1 in new business starts, #1 in tech and VC investments, #1 in Fortune 500 companies, and the #1 public higher education system in the country.
👨👩👧👧 California has some of the strongest gun laws in the country and as a result has a 43% lower gun death rate than the rest of the U.S. according to data from the CDC while President Trump oversaw the largest spike in homicides recorded in U.S. history.
😡 Republicans across the country are fanning the flames of culture wars to distract from the fact that on health, wealth, and economic outcomes they are failing.
🗳️ When Democrats go on OFFENSE, we WIN.
THANK YOU FOR YOUR ATTENTION TO THIS MATTER!
Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
I have heard the calls do "Do something!" and I agree. If Texas wants to redraw their maps, California will fight fire with fire.
God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
[**Please make a contribution to help us get it done. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. I need to know you're with me as we press forward.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250927-Fox&refcode2=2613_4767699_TLrRfD&akid=2613%2E4767699%2ETLrRfD)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em250927-Fox&refcode2=2613_4767699_TLrRfD&akid=2613%2E4767699%2ETLrRfD)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&refcode=em250927-Fox&refcode2=2613_4767699_TLrRfD&akid=2613%2E4767699%2ETLrRfD)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=2613%2E4767699%2ETLrRfD).
Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee. Committee Top Funders: Fund for Policy Reform, HMP for Prop 50, California Teachers Association.

name: Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
subject: MAGA wants us to fail. We can’t let that happen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Time’s running out to prove we won’t give up.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250927-5478-footer&t=1&akid=5478%2E420207%2Ey39C7O)
Hi Peter, Lauren here.
I wanted to reach out and update you on our upcoming end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.
**As it stands, we still need to raise another $14,000 before Tuesday’s midnight deadline.**
In just a few days, our campaign’s fundraising numbers for the last quarter will go public. And the second that report is released, people will be scrutinizing every single detail, searching for any sign that the progressive movement is losing momentum.
If they see our fundraising numbers slowing down, it could be taken as a signal that Trump and the MAGA movement’s attempts to silence our dissent, wear us down, and crush our hope are working. **That can’t happen.**
With our freedoms, our democracy, and our communities under attack, now is not the time for a setback. Pramila is leading the charge in Congress and across the country to build a movement that fights back, but she can’t do it alone.
Since day one, this campaign has never taken a dime from corporate PACs, and Pramila has never sought out billionaires to use as ATMs.
**She has something much stronger: you.** When everyday people come together and chip in what they can, it turns into a movement that can take on Donald Trump, corporate greed, and far-right extremism — and win.
[**So Peter, with $14,000 more left to raise before our deadline, can we count on you to pitch in $3 today to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250927-2?refcode=em20250927-5478&amount=3&refcode2=5478_420207_y39C7O&akid=5478%2E420207%2Ey39C7O)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250927-2?amount=3&refcode=em20250927-5478&refcode2=5478_420207_y39C7O&akid=5478%2E420207%2Ey39C7O)**
Thank you for your support,
Lauren Lalonde
Campaign Manager, Pramila for Congress
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250927-5478-footer&t=2&refcode2=5478_420207_y39C7O&akid=5478%2E420207%2Ey39C7O)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: We need to sound the alarm.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
We need to sound the alarm.
A brand-new poll shows Democrat Mikie Sherrill and Republican Jack Ciattarelli tied at 43% in New Jersey’s governor’s race. Another polling average has Mikie up just 4 points.
That’s within the margin of error in a state where Democrats can’t afford to stumble.
Republicans see New Jersey as their big chance to prove they can flip blue states in the Trump era. If they pull this off, it will send shockwaves into 2026 and embolden MAGA extremists everywhere.
So, Peter, can you rush $15, $25, or whatever you can to GOTV PAC today to help us keep New Jersey blue and prove that Democrats have the strength to win everywhere? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09272025]

name: Mark McLaughlin (via Democrats.org)
subject: Introducing myself
body:
My name is Mark McLaughlin, and I recently started a new role as Chief Financial Officer at the Democratic National Committee.
---
Hi Derek, My name is Mark McLaughlin, and I recently started a new role as Chief Financial Officer at the Democratic National Committee. Here’s what you should know about me: It’s my job to make sure that we are raising enough money to elect Democrats up and down the ballot — in 2025, 2026, and beyond. It’s also my job to make sure that every dollar we raise is being spent in the most cost-effective manner possible. I’ve been doing this work for more than 25 years, and I am eager to use those skills at the DNC, because in this critical moment, we need all hands on deck — and every dollar we can raise — to safeguard our democracy from the harm being done by Trump and his billionaire buddies. [**That’s why today I am asking you to chip in $3 or whatever makes sense for you to the DNC to support our mission — because all hands on deck means we need everyone to do whatever they can to help us win these critical upcoming elections. No donation is too small to make a difference, I know that better than anyone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250927_4679_fr&refcode2=4679_22930333_s8UFA-&akid=4679%2E22930333%2Es8UFA-) $3, that's the ask. $3 to help win rapidly approaching elections in states like Virginia, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania. $3 to help Democrats flip Congress next year. $3 to protect our democracy and prevent more damage and destruction. [**If this work matters to you, I hope you’ll use these links to chip in:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250927_4679_fr&refcode2=4679_22930333_s8UFA-&akid=4679%2E22930333%2Es8UFA-) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250927_4679_fr&refcode2=4679_22930333_s8UFA-&akid=4679%2E22930333%2Es8UFA-)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This is why I’m asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2662%2E4032634%2E9s5tOV)
---
I’ll get right down to it: Our next FEC fundraising deadline is coming up at midnight on Tuesday, and we haven’t quite hit our goal yet, so I’m going to ask if you can pitch in. **But first, I want to talk about a few reasons why your contribution would make a real difference right now.** Hitting our quarterly fundraising target will ensure we can power our movement that’s fighting back against Donald Trump and the far-right — and making the case for the Democratic party to embrace economic policies that will make big, structural change for working people. Your support will ensure our team can continue traveling across the country to connect with voters and bring them into our movement ahead of the midterms. And your donation will also show how many people in Pennsylvania and across the country support the big ideas we’re fighting for — like passing a wealth tax and making billionaires pay their fair share, getting Big Money out of politics, banning members of Congress from trading stocks, and reining in Big Tech, to name a few. After this deadline, when our fundraising numbers go public, Republican operatives and powerful special interests will scour them to try to gauge our strength. So let’s use this opportunity to show them how many of us are pushing back against their extremism and fighting to get corruption out of our politics. [**If it makes sense for you right now, please chip in $28 or any amount before Tuesday’s midnight FEC deadline to help fuel our work and send a powerful message to the special interests we're fighting against.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3161?amount=28&t=8&akid=2662%2E4032634%2E9s5tOV)
